| | Friend,

---
Our movement, much like our beautiful country, is the most resilient in history.

---
We will not bend, we will not break, and we will _NEVER_ _SURRENDER_ to tyranny – _even when Crooked Joe has his corrupt DOJ try to put me in jail for 400 YEARS as a completely innocent man. _

---
**But what better way to display that resilience – and at what better time – than to hold our next MASSIVE rally in South Carolina right before Independence Day! **

---
And that’s not all, Friend...

---
_At this next rally, I want _YOU_ standing right by my side.
_
---
[](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=c3e5d5b539e7482b9ff2a9145d5e330b&_e=eH2KgcpbOl72WZV-qMj4jQxpzeaWH5jtjCFTylYQHq9ijhLvcd1SzFwo3M38aaUrjSJGn68-ToSmd975F7VEl2lKsjP9F1FJ0WrFBmKFcM1V7c6PA0-aBjIUh1lkPzjP4QXppESYgnlYP5o1PCzugpM9hlVZqKb4Wi4qdV72JY9QR3OXwuj2Sm3CMRK0w7vQYdBdMhYflMjYxn8v0hHirNKkUZ5Eo6AkRmHIb-Psp9dQohthvffhWTQQYVRSPU1rasu2xMQND6Ze82TXQQ64N8C7ppEQXSLoAgEkoLoNxim2JpaXoHZI0tsNpkJcRuRjca_TNckYGbXpXhX0zSNfknqf-IdDHGMGb6gVA7dXRdWNXKnoGTlsiFgVccl7yf0-xEJuLFK-avWx9OWYFEtj6HkxcGVs_i7x1UkaKJ5OI5NBuvdzhVVRMjyC8dKOWDoRSWoFWduh-SgwCVAuTUjdlW_ogJghrwIDRUZw1SasiJ-Dfsg90PTIYKvWqLVEX1gv)

__I’ll fly you and a guest of your choice to the rally for**FREE**. Your hotel will be covered, you’ll get to meet yours truly, and we’ll even get to take a commemorative photo together so that you’ll ALWAYS remember this special day.__

---

It’s hard to believe just how far our nation has fallen in only a few short years under Crooked Joe.

---
Just think back to my 2020 State of the Union Address as your President...

---
_Our economy was booming like never before.

Overseas jobs were pouring back into the country.

Cost of living was affordable.

We were not only energy independent, we were energy DOMINANT.

Our border was SECURE.

The wall was being built.

Our streets were SAFE.

Washington swamp creatures were finally beholden to THE PEOPLE.

We were respected on the world stage.

We were TOUGH on China and Russia.

Your God-given freedoms were protected.

Simply put, we were WINNING!
_
---
**But don’t you worry, Friend, all of this can be had again – and more.**

---
_**Very soon, because of YOUR support, I’ll be back in the White House, and our country will come ROARING back! **_

clean_body: A HUGE rally in celebration of Independence Day.| | | | | Friend, Our movement, much like our beautiful country, is the most resilient in history. We will not bend, we will not break, and we will NEVER SURRENDER to tyranny – even when Crooked Joe has his corrupt DOJ try to put me in jail for 400 YEARS as a completely innocent man. But what better way to display that resilience – and at what better time – than to hold our next MASSIVE rally in South Carolina right before Independence Day! And that’s not all, Friend... At this next rally, I want YOU standing right by my side. I’ll fly you and a guest of your choice to the rally forFREE. Your hotel will be covered, you’ll get to meet yours truly, and we’ll even get to take a commemorative photo together so that you’ll ALWAYS remember this special day. It’s hard to believe just how far our nation has fallen in only a few short years under Crooked Joe. Just think back to my 2020 State of the Union Address as your President... Our economy was booming like never before. Overseas jobs were pouring back into the country. Cost of living was affordable. We were not only energy independent, we were energy DOMINANT. Our border was SECURE. The wall was being built. Our streets were SAFE. Washington swamp creatures were finally beholden to THE PEOPLE. We were respected on the world stage. We were TOUGH on China and Russia. Your God-given freedoms were protected. Simply put, we were WINNING! But don’t you worry, Friend, all of this can be had again – and more. Very soon, because of YOUR support, I’ll be back in the White House, and our country will come ROARING back! Thank you, Donald J. name: Team Thompson
subject: we’d love to see you at Rock the Ride 2023!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress [unsubscribe](https://support
body:
|
---
| | Peter,

We are thrilled to announce that Mike will be participating in the sixth annual Rock the Ride Napa Valley event on Saturday, June 24. We would be delighted to have your presence at the event!

Rock the Ride is a dedicated platform that aims to raise funds in support of local and national organizations committed to putting an end to gun violence in our country. Your participation in the event will not only contribute to the cause but also help create awareness and foster a sense of community around this critical issue.

**_[If you or someone you know are looking for a way to get involved with fighting for common-sense gun legislation to protect our country, this is the event for you. Click here to sign up and see more details>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65002697/411981494/313167857?source=EM_NBI_MT_20230617_INV_RTR_0_ID_TeamThompson_NA_NA_RocktheRide3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGNjMGVhNC03MDBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NAY_4lOPsVZkX0jnsPsX7tu91msWtrQLzLXvKX7oJfE=&emci=32f470cf-6c0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=28cc0ea4-700d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2678920)_**

_**– – – Begin forwarded message from Mike Thompson – – –**_

Peter,
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65002698/411981496/313167857?source=EM_NBI_MT_20230617_INV_RTR_0_ID_TeamThompson_NA_NA_RocktheRide3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGNjMGVhNC03MDBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NAY_4lOPsVZkX0jnsPsX7tu91msWtrQLzLXvKX7oJfE=&emci=32f470cf-6c0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=28cc0ea4-700d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2678920)
Our nation has endured far too much suffering due to gun violence epidemic. Each day, 30 lives are tragically lost, and hundreds more individuals are injured.

Nothing is more important than the safety of our families and our communities, that is why I have taken the initiative to introduce bipartisan legislation aimed at implementing universal background checks and closing dangerous loopholes. In Congress, I am leading the effort to compel House Leadership to put gun violence prevention legislation on the floor to save lives.

If you are interested in actively participating in the advocacy for gun violence prevention, I invite you to join us on Saturday, June 24 for Rock the Ride Napa Valley! It will be an opportunity for you to contribute to the cause and support the work of local and national nonprofit organizations that are tirelessly fighting for common-sense gun measures to protect our country from the devastating impact of gun violence.

**_[We’ve finally started to make progress on reforming gun legislation, but we can’t stop now. Will you join us for Rock the Ride on June 24 and demand action>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65002700/411981497/313167857?source=EM_NBI_MT_20230617_INV_RTR_0_ID_TeamThompson_NA_NA_RocktheRide3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGNjMGVhNC03MDBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NAY_4lOPsVZkX0jnsPsX7tu91msWtrQLzLXvKX7oJfE=&emci=32f470cf-6c0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=28cc0ea4-700d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2678920)_**
| | [SIGN UP](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65002702/411981499/313167857?source=EM_NBI_MT_20230617_INV_RTR_0_ID_TeamThompson_NA_NA_RocktheRide3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGNjMGVhNC03MDBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NAY_4lOPsVZkX0jnsPsX7tu91msWtrQLzLXvKX7oJfE=&emci=32f470cf-6c0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=28cc0ea4-700d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2678920)

name: Don Huffines
subject: veto the liberal, bloated TX budget
body:
Can a budget that increases spending by 44% really be called “Republican”?
No images? [Click here](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-e-ztjkydk-yuddtktydi-x/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-ztjkydk-yuddtktydi-r/) **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** Press Manager
Contact: [Press@HuffinesLiberty.com](mailto:Press@HuffinesLiberty.com)
## HLF Session Review: The Texas Budget
## _" Can a budget that increases spending by 44% really be called "Republican"?"_
[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-ztjkydk-yuddtktydi-y/) DALLAS, TX, June 17, 2023 -- The Texas Legislature's budget is the biggest increase in government spending in modern Texas history, supported and written by almost every Democrat in Austin.Can a budget that increases spending by 44% really be called "Republican"?**[NEW: Our latest whitepaper explores just how bloated Texas Budget is.](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-ztjkydk-yuddtktydi-j/)** Meanwhile, there was ZERO property tax relief for Texans in the 88th session. The current divide over property taxes is, in many ways, unnecessary. Conflicts over homestead exemptions, corporate tax abatements, and the property appraisal system would disappear if property taxes were eliminated.The first step in eliminating ALL property taxes is to eliminate school property taxes. If Texas leaders are going to get serious about eliminating our school maintenance and operations property tax (M&O), Governor Abbott must VETO the bloated Texas budget and call a special session for the Texas Legislature to take [**five steps that lock the state into a path to accomplish this within eight years:**](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-ztjkydk-yuddtktydi-t/)**1\. Limit State Spending Growth: **Limiting state spending growth to no more than 5.9% per biennium (2.9% annually) would provide budget surpluses that could be dedicated to property tax relief.**2\. Freeze School M &O Property Taxes:** Freezing school M&O property tax revenue at the current level stops school districts from undermining efforts to eliminate the M&O tax with constant increases.**3\. Use 90% of Texas' Budget Surpluses:** Using 90% of state funds budget surpluses will provide enough funds to eliminate the M&O property tax in 8 years (or less).**4\. Require Voter Approval to Exceed the No-New-Revenue Tax Rate:** Cities, counties, and special districts must ask voters for permission to Exceed the No-New-Revenue Tax Rate.**5\. Enshrine Property Tax Relief in the Texas Constitution:** Property tax relief must be made permanent by passing an amendment to the Texas Constitution. [Read Paper](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-ztjkydk-yuddtktydi-h/) The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) non-profit, non-partisan research institute. Our mission is to advance the cause of **liberty** , **prosperity** , and **virtue** in the State of Texas by educating and equipping citizens so they may hold their elected officials accountable and better informed to tackle the toughest challenges.###
### _Help us advance liberty and prosperity in Texas:_

Fellow American, The U.S. government's funding of gain-of-function experiments in the Wuhan Lab - which many experts believe likely caused the COVID pandemic - is the most infamous and dangerous waste of taxpayer dollars we've uncovered. _But, the National Institutes of Health's deplorable animal experiments go far beyond bats, China, and COVID. _ **With YOUR tax dollars, the federal government is giving dogs cocaine, infesting beagles with biting flies and ticks, and even cutting off these puppies' vocal cords so they can't cry in the lab.** Every year, there are more than 40,000 animals locked in federal labs, and the government's white coats typically kill survivors - even the healthy adoptable ones - rather than let taxpayers adopt them, or retire them to sanctuaries. [**Will you help the White Coat Waste Project fight to save the lives of lab animal survivors, including dogs like Violet? Please sign our urgent national petition to support Violet's Law right away.**](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDAwODcifQ/u3T0OXaSPU08qlrs9INTKw)
---
[Help save dogs like Violet!](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDAwODcifQ/xd-k_cw-Ix4rjh4Z7uyRVw)
---
The House and Senate have re-introduced the bipartisan **Violet's Law** (S 707/HR 1465). **The bill is named after a hound - named Violet (formerly gov't ID #CEGMBN) - who was saved from a taxpayer-funded lab by our team.**
---
[](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDAwODcifQ/Z10q66cak1uKkBduvVrx6g)
---
When Violet was rescued, she was scared for months - terrified to explore her house or go outside. But, with assistance, Violet learned to embrace her new life, and now enjoys kisses and scratches ... NOT being poked and prodded by government white coats. _But most animals aren't as fortunate as Violet. _ Records obtained by the White Coat Waste Project show that the National Institutes of Health and the University of Iowa rounded up more than a dozen abandoned PETS, strapped containers full of hungry sand flies to their skin, and locked the discarded dogs in cages so the _**flies would eat them alive**_.
The heartless white coats killed and dissected these dogs ... then admitted to our investigators that they destroyed many of the documents describing the experiments.
And this is just ONE experiment of many your tax dollars are funding every year! **_Those animals who are lucky enough to survive these heinous experiments - and wasteful spending - of our government are usually slaughtered and incinerated._** Thanks to our work at the White Coat Waste Project, the Department of Veterans Affairs, the Department of Defense, the Food and Drug Administration, and the National Institutes of Health have created some retirement policies for lab animals ... but not all federal bureaucrats are on board. [**Your signature on this national petition today will help us show Congress overwhelming support from the American people to demand the federal government retire and re-home ALL animals from their cruel and wasteful taxpayer-funded labs.**](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDAwODcifQ/iugcZAoCrBn-3MzS7O_sqg)
---
[Help save dogs like Violet!](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDAwODcifQ/HeeH6PVOM5eX74_0LiHUGQ)
---
At the White Coat Waste Project, we've championed Violet's Law - the only one of its kind! **This legislation would require the U.S. government animal labs to place adoptable animals in loving homes and ensure other survivors are placed in animal sanctuaries. ** Polls show that 71% of Democrats and 72% of Republicans want to see these animals retired - not killed. And scientific research shows that animals released from labs make great pets. While there is broad bipartisan support for animal retirement, agencies that experiment on animals - including the Center for Disease Control and Prevention, the U.S. Department of Agriculture, and the Environmental Protection Agency have yet to create policies allowing it. Bottom line: government bureaucrats are too lazy to retire survivors like Violet. It's easier to just slaughter and burn them-like garbage. Let's make them do the right thing! Let's help animals like Violet to get a second chance at life, and to be freed from sadistic big government white coats.
---
[](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDAwODcifQ/BuBsVRQ965kh1BERBHvq_A)
---
[**Please sign the national petition RIGHT AWAY to help the White Coat Waste Project ensure Violet's Law is passed in the House and Senate ... and that innocent animals being harmed and killed by the U.S. government are given a second chance at life.**](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDAwODcifQ/xyv5CvmnKRI4xyq9gg_hBQ) Thank you for your support!
---
Anthony Bellotti President & Founder White Coat Waste Project
---
PO. Box 26029, Washington, DC 20001
---
Liberty Ledger P.O. Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.libertyledger.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTY5LWU0ZTMyNzU1YTVlMDQyMjM4ZDMxMDVlM2U1NDJmOTc0IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/6Us5p4Kx-k6XrgED9CEIiw) to unsubscribe.
---

subject: ALERT: NC Governor issues State of Emergency to stop school choice

body:
Teachers unions will continue pouring money into races like this nationwide because they are scared.

**Chicago Teachers Union spends historic money, installs one of its own as mayor**
---
“Chicago Teachers Union (CTU) **violated its own policy by using member dues to donate $2.3 million to Mr. Johnson’s campaign**...according to the Illinois Policy Institute.”
---
[**DEFEAT TEACHERS UNIONS >>>**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26725%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Sil1alS2G5nL%2b2t25FE7ow&sysid=1)
---
| | Friend, the Chicago Teachers Union just spent **$2.3 MILLION** to elect anti-school choice activist Brandon Johnson to Mayor of Chicago. Johnson has already denounced school choice and will work to rip away education options from Chicago families. Teachers unions will continue pouring money into races like this nationwide because they are scared. **A school choice revolution is sweeping the nation, and they’re doing everything in their power to derail it.**
---
[**DEFEAT TEACHERS UNIONS >>>**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26725%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Sil1alS2G5nL%2b2t25FE7ow&sysid=1)

| | We have teachers unions on the ropes, but we need your help to keep them there. **We're counting on your immediate support by MIDNIGHT tonight to help double our efforts and combat the deep-pocketed teachers unions.** Your donation will help us keep the pressure on the teachers unions and send a message that **parents and students are not backing down.** Every dollar counts, and your contribution can make a real difference in this critical fight for our children's future.**[Rush an urgent donation now to help us keep the teachers union on their heels.>>>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26726%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=576Pk0tLUd6Inbk%2fW9WiBg&sysid=1)**

name: American Update
subject: The greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c669685%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rhs28NewWr0I6SxSYVwC7w&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c669686%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NU%2bcFAd8hLO4M2e0X8GutA&sysid=1)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c669687%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=keelWaQb7zEKaWn8bbXSmw&sysid=1),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c669688%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BvQsnQSxEWGslZVucP090A&sysid=1) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c669687%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=keelWaQb7zEKaWn8bbXSmw&sysid=1)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c669689%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qHCXn5l25a5pAQNtdiyWzw&sysid=1) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

name: Trump Alerts [via House GOP]
subject: Mark Levin is exactly right.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We will never forgive them

|
---

name: Your America
subject: The greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from Your America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26723%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=utGhVaa75Vz5zJ8Ma5hYvQ&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26724%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UQde3C3yHtuLuwDJglj4SQ&sysid=1)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26735%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zj5HLsEL8kTmAlL9QjxLYA&sysid=1),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26736%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2biTXetOzbbMBnpCF4SOGIA&sysid=1) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26735%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zj5HLsEL8kTmAlL9QjxLYA&sysid=1)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26737%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aZJXzEiVAqAJhtPo28TIag&sysid=1) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

---

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhmnhk3ttji0tc89pbc697nr0pda9q4r5getautg_rp22sh2s8i66o77c1ie8ob6clh2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkq63d42fobqvb0rcel6rq8leqdkt85qadkvk55o_rp22sh2s8i66o77c1ie8ob6clh2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi03k0j35v3kb5c82cnaicbr58dgfub5p1qgp52g_rp22sh2s8i66o77c1ie8ob6clh2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

---

name: American Defense News
subject: Before they’re gone
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways.

This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z98kuj762566k877hji34cs2e4vvndmlhc45okh0_rp22sh2s8i66o77c1ieao32cph2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkga83oeqhsrull7hcm682l6k9qkfjvc9p22r8dg_rp22sh2s8i66o77c1ieao32cph2bs)**[The Second World Wars.”](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zr6rdlc033o0bk1dfqpor4e054d50a652u26ugmo_rp22sh2s8i66o77c1ieao32cph2bs) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zbqu00ottuup2lf61pphrc4kv8tosn2jel9mt6b0_rp22sh2s8i66o77c1ieao32cph2bs)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zuap932gdeaj9dsuekf7ardugjtq4tjfd9klmkbg_rp22sh2s8i66o77c1ieao32cph2bs)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

American Defense News

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zilgvs5hup1ap3d2t819kjio7jkn70o1fbtlgsh0_rp22sh2s8i66o77c1ieao34cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3v18oq4rdeg5mvrgkh0fdb6l5licl0hama0kni8_rp22sh2s8i66o77c1ieao34cjh2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhjjgbphcpd0jqb653jgj1rvq603qofdubobdj0g_rp22sh2s8i66o77c1ieao34cjh2bs) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Former Home Depot CEO issues dire warning for Americans
body:
Something strange is happening in our financial system.

| Dear Reader, Something strange is happening in our financial system. According to analysts at UBS, more than 50,000 retail locations could shut their doors in the months ahead. Already, Walmart, Foot Locker, Bed Bath & Beyond, and Macy’s are cutting stores. And former Home Depot CEO Bob Nardelli recently issued a grim warning:
> "We’re going to see a lot of bankruptcies. [This is] different than anything I have seen in my 52 years..."
What does it all mean for your family and your money? Dr. Nomi Prins has dug deeper into the research, and she’s found something startling. Amid all the turmoil predicted by Nardeni and UBS, Prins has found a single firm that could be the canary in the coal mine foreshadowing the next major crisis in America. All it takes is one look at this troubling chart to see why - [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbrurai502vnmnr1opbnraijo18cptpsne7grtto_rp22sh2s8i66o77c1ieao36c3h2bs) Dr. Prins says:
> ** "This chart tells you everything you need to know about the next crisis in America. In short, what we’re about to see is a currency crisis - but not the kind of currency crisis most folks expect. This firm - along with many others - will almost certainly go bankrupt as a result." **
According to Dr. Prins, our money is about to change forever... and the overhaul is set to happen in just a few weeks. To help folks prepare, she’s recorded a briefing that explains all the details of what she calls a 'reset' to our financial system. In it, she lays out all the evidence of this currency crisis, and what you can do to prepare. [Click here now to see her full (and free) presentation.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdo1cthq5122ihm8t0tfs0op72038lhip6jd92a8_rp22sh2s8i66o77c1ieao36c3h2bs) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar transformations to our money, folks who failed to prepare were blindsided. But those who moved their money beforehand had the opportunity to multiply their nest-egg as a result. [Click here to see why.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zas27ptf4p122pvkph9eqoim3a0s0hd0rlagmmsg_rp22sh2s8i66o77c1ieao36c3h2bs)

| | Friend, the Chicago Teachers Union just spent **$2.3 MILLION** to elect anti-school choice activist Brandon Johnson to Mayor of Chicago. Johnson has already denounced school choice and will work to rip away education options from Chicago families. Teachers unions will continue pouring money into races like this nationwide because they are scared. **A school choice revolution is sweeping the nation, and they 're doing everything in their power to derail it.**

body:
To all the fathers, and father figures, who are trying their hardest to give their children a strong future. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65015725/412034501/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ14O_HOL_E_20230618_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTAyMGJjYS1lMDBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hb3yHvVPktIhlf-l48Mlhc89ZvskNoI1FaKEGAPZ8FE=&emci=89020bca-e00d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=91020bca-e00d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
---
It’s Father’s Day, and if this holiday is hitting you hard, my heart goes out to you. I’m wishing I could give my daddy a call. After my mother died, I called him every night. Most weekends, we watched sports together, with him in Oklahoma and me in Massachusetts. We called back and forth on the phone after a really good (or bad) play. I wanted to keep him company, and I wanted to hear his voice. He taught me to dream big. In the 1920s, he had big dreams of his own: He wanted to fly airplanes. He was barely out of high school when he rebuilt a two-passenger, open-cockpit airplane and taught himself to fly above the prairies of eastern Oklahoma. I always pictured him landing and taking off in vast wheat fields, a tiny plane in an immense blue sky. He survived the double blows of the Dust Bowl and the Great Depression in the small town where he grew up. Decades later, both my parents still talked of bank failures and families who lost their farms during some of the toughest times for our country. By the time World War II came along, they already had three young boys. Daddy tried to enlist to be a fighter pilot in the war, but the Army Air Forces (as it was known then) said he was too old, or at least that’s the explanation I heard. When the war finally ended, he desperately wanted a job flying the new passenger planes for one of the fast-growing airlines like TWA or American. But that didn’t work out either. My mother told me that those jobs also went to younger men. So he moved from one job to another: He was a salesman, he fixed cars, he ended up as a janitor. He liked working with his hands, doing repairs around the house. And like a zillion other families, we got by. When I was a senior in high school, I started thinking about college. I wanted to be a teacher, and that meant I needed a college diploma. But my mother said it was out of the question. She pointed out that we couldn’t afford college, that she and Daddy just didn’t make enough money. Besides, he’d had a heart attack, and now it took both of my parents’ paychecks to manage. I knew how much my parents sacrificed for my future and for my brothers’ futures, but I wanted to teach. It was my big dream, and I wouldn’t give up. My mother kept saying no, and we argued back and forth. Then Daddy surprised both of us, saying: “Let her try, Polly.” And I was off and running. There were lots of bumps and wrong turns along the way. I got married at 19 (it didn’t work out). I moved. I dropped out of school. But eventually, I made it. Whatever I did, my daddy believed in me and my big dreams. He would say, “That’s my Betsy." In truth, I think he found it pretty miraculous that his baby girl had ended up a teacher. He nearly busted his buttons the first time I was quoted in the newspaper. When he got sick, I came across a video series about the airplanes of World War II. I bought all the videotapes and took them to him. I was sure he would love seeing the old planes, that he would point out this or that plane he remembered from the war. But the only thing he wanted to talk about was how much he missed my mother. For months — for years, actually — after he died, I would see or hear something and think, Oh, I’ll tell Daddy about that. And then I’d get a little jolt all over again. He was gone. I would not be here if he hadn’t pushed open a door so that I could have a chance. That is how this daughter of a janitor ended up as a public school teacher, a law professor, and a United States senator. And our story isn’t unique. Parents all across our country are working hard to give their children the opportunities they themselves never had. That kind of sacrifice — a sacrifice fueled by love — is why I’m in this fight all the way. All of our children deserve a chance to succeed. And all of our parents deserve the peace of mind of knowing their hard work created a better future for their children and grandchildren. That is the promise of America, and I’m fighting to make sure we keep that promise. My daddy is gone, but I want to wish him a Happy Father’s Day anyway — and to all the fathers, and father figures, who are trying their hardest to give their children a strong future, setting the example every day of what it means to care for the people you love. Elizabeth

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: The greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9d978001f3204d3990da15806c794b49&_e=OVuJWpZ6WXdU4tz1ILeF8tJFtRMRA_daAVoUb7z50wJDPMbebDSy0-lrE0eAgOhSITdNi_pIez5rIqZHgmWbG6lhjlmm0UapYepl78OLJ_RRF4wI1cpgi1hYE_mTSRAZE-VRat9hJFYhMxcuBHW2AuGlHK5hYhoqW78KUDLq3VH46JHo0K91BYvqmgdDne6bdl_pa5giugsGUub_0XwISqiW8Rx25JeO9K5RuzETinNPljbBbu4R4u2GehdMPafAZUIu8yQdxyOgCizESswWEEsrOCAzKkzpnoyAQ0QSNDkIz5kr_s59XE3UQWYFfwRkR3Db3AVBVJPNKg3P_zexg162Zc3h7-ArhYqDQdLUV_9ZF73Q4MFNRsHjmQ55dbdl2MRQFtWStLlB_e90LnxDmLPdr43gGZKBPcNKNg8vxVcIQcu3nL1Bt9Lpxnrzbuxy) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **"[ An Introduction to C.S. name: Conservatives Give
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1905c4af33eb4d509d73e30d1758dbea&_e=Kbw3f6Sf_-7gN6WZrlc5wZGfS1U7V3Q8o2TkGZRBEeYnPLPQVSuHmOjGzUBqRJ7RTsOP-UWUKUxXTlynxtkp0We2j-tBgyqss9Fkwq4FMUqwrX4bAyRHKSkLf4oOpcGRufaBmMVA2Pc4MZU50qkPVGP-BHvYWN4yWYsCuAbKUZL2WmD4uxhLAxuHL1U0nB2UejQRHjbQoH7UipivRF0IZJw8d9_ABlgfDmxIhhGZ7mEMIyIfR1puIKgZPMLUE56pXAFxKbuCcuxJf8Y-T0kIxWeVPSjRvlsf4g_fvnAlB1aHk3hrjslEOnUhAPbIviyAeIZxbMFRx4fRP_HNNYtO1rK0sTB5WHebiJNo_pEcnoyOQP0lsaBQCZbGGrXCwnp-3q0Of68oTlNOY1PVWNdfWp8EO8rdKjezifNZzMwztMM%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight." By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." ** Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1905c4af33eb4d509d73e30d1758dbea&_e=Kbw3f6Sf_-7gN6WZrlc5wZGfS1U7V3Q8o2TkGZRBEeYnPLPQVSuHmOjGzUBqRJ7RTsOP-UWUKUxXTlynxtkp0We2j-tBgyqss9Fkwq4FMUqwrX4bAyRHKSkLf4oOpcGRufaBmMVA2Pc4MZU50qkPVGP-BHvYWN4yWYsCuAbKUZL2WmD4uxhLAxuHL1U0nB2UejQRHjbQoH7UipivRF0IZJw8d9_ABlgfDmxIhhGZ7mEMIyIfR1puIKgZPMLUE56pRoPYJhWoetJVh-ZegP9FNi3imSzceYAKzajErONkdSSSodDT0bC-UISh0lGGBZZyskrObK6k3fcC74-BqNAH9hv7aCwPreiAGvhwgxcY262BYCyxv7DGfffiONWcEV9zP8_c0mggPn5IpAt_fD5GwSVqP6u5xMiZTOF_Ve-8XJM%3D)

I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1905c4af33eb4d509d73e30d1758dbea&_e=Kbw3f6Sf_-7gN6WZrlc5wZGfS1U7V3Q8o2TkGZRBEeYnPLPQVSuHmOjGzUBqRJ7RTsOP-UWUKUxXTlynxtkp0We2j-tBgyqss9Fkwq4FMUqwrX4bAyRHKSkLf4oOpcGRufaBmMVA2Pc4MZU50qkPVGP-BHvYWN4yWYsCuAbKUZL2WmD4uxhLAxuHL1U0nB2UejQRHjbQoH7UipivRF0IZJw8d9_ABlgfDmxIhhGZ7mEMIyIfR1puIKgZPMLUE56pvQx7XNHHJR1uTF3f2EXTUtnzR4SNbjPDgZhl8jbh2oxAxZc4kMuCIG-zpv-f74_Z8PDF7ha5pzv2g0FbhPysFhAefICocE6qG6bY6iFGyzckXPqf9xdQwLX8W88_WeVMybukyCh2VEekXuC5hP2OiSnD2vtxsQ_huY4rVqqn4Xc%3D) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: The greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a58847cc0b98443794156e8dd6a98870&_e=1rr-XtM33T8N5dx5JLYfEnEKcGeaxuF1lENj0iNOPl8dUpk-k9liN_MSFUuZX3xH7Kx5zH6myjgzAD_XFaVnDVxBCywO01Mb1Ado0FIjKhVG3Rk_qSLL08A76oxYn64IccrkADAdA-WkQG-bYuTiq3TMttEgFR-xargyQ5ZdW4cGURSZDaJ3_LJhJOKEkRDRifqPbN0_o5tTcvb92UIi9TMtbEuzg108er-6-MFGzQ0SEeSmvswjrAUI2sCk7N-iSbAlEQDBZrFmjPI9xNSCmRf-0Ck_3RhySVMewVVcUekuA09wYf8syBZvDg3wnKyG72XONAk0Nm5hbWDsj5i64asuvT_tIifsSt1MmzDDP4pO2gMvmn0ypElatcpNxdAW0H93xJIisbJv9eB8AZXrQBbZU4xNv7S5dMPOd-8ENJ7WnJF1CCUSrdQ0n_djFBG4) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **"[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a58847cc0b98443794156e8dd6a98870&_e=1rr-XtM33T8N5dx5JLYfEnEKcGeaxuF1lENj0iNOPl8dUpk-k9liN_MSFUuZX3xH7Kx5zH6myjgzAD_XFaVnDVxBCywO01Mb1Ado0FIjKhVG3Rk_qSLL08A76oxYn64IccrkADAdA-WkQG-bYuTiq3TMttEgFR-xargyQ5ZdW4cGURSZDaJ3_LJhJOKEkRDRifqPbN0_o5tTcvb92UIi9TMtbEuzg108er-6-MFGzQ0SEeSmvswjrAUI2sCk7N-iSbAlEQDBZrFmjPI9xNSCmRf-0Ck_3RhySVMewVVcUelJFcIiBBPc9Zzz2ExsfQPnYCCvudnzNmd1ARxp-2egRYkdbTIpSUktzB3UV49smcNOSekrFukaGQwortrk5-Yq1BqlxU2FNR4w4zBk9qEnSdXDKse6w7b66hNxe0rIKpAKuOkkb8WTm8wEd9dcoZKz)" **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a58847cc0b98443794156e8dd6a98870&_e=1rr-XtM33T8N5dx5JLYfEnEKcGeaxuF1lENj0iNOPl8dUpk-k9liN_MSFUuZX3xH7Kx5zH6myjgzAD_XFaVnDVxBCywO01Mb1Ado0FIjKhVG3Rk_qSLL08A76oxYn64IccrkADAdA-WkQG-bYuTiq3TMttEgFR-xargyQ5ZdW4cGURSZDaJ3_LJhJOKEkRDRifqPbN0_o5tTcvb92UIi9TMtbEuzg108er-6-MFGzQ0SEeSmvswjrAUI2sCk7N-iSbAlEQDBZrFmjPI9xNSCmRf-0Ck_3RhySVMewVVcUekKWTdoApQKmTeEQyveLN8RfYLkH8fCdmpNG1D1nOJBjP42BuRWNobC981FVIChvohV65PiujV0NMQIdk5dsZVH4aG2J5Err9XcV6AfZbK7RDmvcSpL0vKB2Y-71h62Yp8PcwmirVNG360yKgQJ-ia4)," **we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings. body:

name: Shift WA
subject: Top News: Questionable campaign finances
body:
We hope you are enjoying the first weekend of June! As we enter the summer months, we have you covered on what's going on in your own backyard. Read on... | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61929337:sjO_rzDuN:m:1:2610672541:94963A772F21F5471C75BC75BF0C899D:r "Shift Washington")
---
|
Friends, Democrat AG Bob Ferguson has some explaining to do - especially given his lack of accuracy in his latest financial reports. And, as always, we have you covered on what's going on in your own backyard. Read on... _** **_ _**This week 's Newsmaker Interview...**_ _Sean O 'Brien,_ [_the new Eastern Washington Director_](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61929338:sjO_rzDuN:m:1:2610672541:94963A772F21F5471C75BC75BF0C899D:r) _for the Washington Policy Center (WPC), joined us for this week 's Newsmaker Interview. O'Brien returned to Washington state after spending eight years in Washington, D.C. as the Deputy Chief of Staff for Congressman Dan Newhouse (R - Sunnyside) and as the Executive Director for the Congressional Western Caucus. Among other topics, O'Brien reflected on how Governor Jay Inslee misled the public about the dramatic increase in the price of gas caused by his cap-and-trade policies and how his administration failed to follow the law to exempt Washington State farmers from the significant (more 45 cents a gallon so far) rate increase. _[Read more](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61929339:sjO_rzDuN:m:1:2610672541:94963A772F21F5471C75BC75BF0C899D:r) _. _ _ _ **This week 's top story...** As the race for the next governor of Washington state continues, quite a few more financial reports will be filed. Already, Attorney General Bob Ferguson has come under scrutiny for tipping the scales in his favor illegally. His campaign reported raising approximately $2.2 million during the month, though $1.2 million of that was actually transferred from a "surplus" (ie, slush fund) account, bringing his total funds raised to around $2.4 million. State Lands Commissioner Hilary Franz, who is AG Ferguson's main financial rival, raised around $176,000 in her first month of campaigning. [Read this story and more](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61929340:sjO_rzDuN:m:1:2610672541:94963A772F21F5471C75BC75BF0C899D:r). **In case you missed it ...** While Seattle is often in the spotlight for drug-related issues in Washington state, the negative impact of drug problems extends beyond the city. According to the Spokane County Medical Examiner's office, there has been a significant increase in deaths investigated, with a 49% rise between 2019 and 2022, primarily due to overdoses, accidents, and heart disease. Overdose deaths make up approximately 30% of the medical examiner's workload, with 250 deaths attributed to overdoses in 2022 alone. [Read this story and more](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61929341:sjO_rzDuN:m:1:2610672541:94963A772F21F5471C75BC75BF0C899D:r). **This week 's bit of inspiration...** Take a moment to enjoy the beautiful photography of Iron Creek Falls, courtesy of Former U.S. Congressman Rod Chandler.
| [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61929342:sjO_rzDuN:m:1:2610672541:94963A772F21F5471C75BC75BF0C899D:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14227180&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/osjO_rzDuN).
---

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Putting them on trial
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time.

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv6bq9c7rrmoo8bdhqel0so48bvvkv6l02m0ffo8_rp22sh2s8i66o77c1ie1or2c1h2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfh5q5b497bu96v22sviri63fgbvmrdvjs8abp48_rp22sh2s8i66o77c1ie1or2c1h2bs)
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zg9pmis5i9h4pgjf6f72gs43jttvq01c8lfqioeg_rp22sh2s8i66o77c1ie1or2c1h2bs)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. name: Ron DeSantis
subject: what I don’t believe about politics.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62838589:JqTfFbINi:m:1:3299561967:FA5D009ADC54F2408791134EA6D584C8:r)
---

Patriot, During my time serving as Florida's 46th governor, we went through one of the most pivotal moments in our nation's history: the Covid crisis. It fell upon the shoulders of our nation and tested every one of our elected leaders. And that test was about more than just getting the policy right--_**it was about demonstrating true leadership. **_

Before, during, and after the pandemic, I've led Florida my own way--**bucking Fauci,** **bucking the establishment,** and **bucking the media. **
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62838589:JqTfFbINi:m:1:3299561967:FA5D009ADC54F2408791134EA6D584C8:r)
---

Unsurprisingly, this refusal to back down, my unwillingness to waiver, has brought on incoming daily assaults and smears like no governor has ever faced while many supporters have warned me to change course so I can remain in politics.

But, a leader does not put his own short-term political calculation ahead of the greater good. Leadership is not about entertainment. It's not about building a brand. It's not about virtue signaling. _**Leadership is ultimately about producing results for the people that you represent --the people that you serve.**_ To produce these results, we must defeat Biden, restore energy to the executive, and reinstate common sense as a common virtue across our nation.

This starts with:
* Swiftly and completely securing our Southern border

* Rebuilding the post-Covid economy in a way that supports our working families and our seniors hardest hit by inflation

* Ensuring our school systems are designed to focus on educating our kids--NOT indoctrinating them

In Florida, even my most significant political adversaries have acknowledged that when the governor says he's going to do something, he is going to do it.

You can take that to the bank.

As I lay out my vision for America, you can rest assured that I WILL follow through. I do not make campaign promises that I do not mean or cannot achieve.

I pledge to you, that as President, I will be an energetic executive who will go on offense to take the big issues head-on. I will never shy away from a fight because the media or the Left doesn't like it. We are going to reverse Biden's disastrous policies. _**And we are going to start on DAY ONE. **_

As the campaign heats up and the Left begins to pour even more money into attack tactics to cripple our Great American Comeback, I'm going to need your support to stand up and stand strong. **[Will you join me?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62838589:JqTfFbINi:m:1:3299561967:FA5D009ADC54F2408791134EA6D584C8:r "Will you join me,
Patriot?") **

Ron DeSantis

---

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62838589:JqTfFbINi:m:1:3299561967:FA5D009ADC54F2408791134EA6D584C8:r)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). * This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.

* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Patriot, During my time serving as Florida's 46th governor, we went through one of the most pivotal moments in our nation's history: the Covid crisis. It fell upon the shoulders of our nation and tested every one of our elected leaders. And that test was about more than just getting the policy right--it was about demonstrating true leadership. Before, during, and after the pandemic, I've led Florida my own way--bucking Fauci, bucking the establishment, and bucking the media. | Unsurprisingly, this refusal to back down, my unwillingness to waiver, has brought on incoming daily assaults and smears like no governor has ever faced while many supporters have warned me to change course so I can remain in politics. But, a leader does not put his own short-term political calculation ahead of the greater good. Leadership is not about entertainment. It's not about building a brand. It's not about virtue signaling. Leadership is ultimately about producing results for the people that you represent --the people that you serve. To produce these results, we must defeat Biden, restore energy to the executive, and reinstate common sense as a common virtue across our nation. This starts with: Swiftly and completely securing our Southern border Rebuilding the post-Covid economy in a way that supports our working families and our seniors hardest hit by inflation Ensuring our school systems are designed to focus on educating our kids--NOT indoctrinating them In Florida, even my most significant political adversaries have acknowledged that when the governor says he's going to do something, he is going to do it. You can take that to the bank. As I lay out my vision for America, you can rest assured that I WILL follow through. I do not make campaign promises that I do not mean or cannot achieve. I pledge to you, that as President, I will be an energetic executive who will go on offense to take the big issues head-on. I will never shy away from a fight because the media or the Left doesn't like it. We are going to reverse Biden's disastrous policies. And we are going to start on DAY ONE. As the campaign heats up and the Left begins to pour even more money into attack tactics to cripple our Great American Comeback, I'm going to need your support to stand up and stand strong. "Will you join me, Patriot?" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Let's prove to the Left that we have the strength to defeat any adversary. Success is attainable. Decline is a choice. And freedom is worth fighting for. Are you ready to join the team? body:
Election Tuesday!

| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfd657f5d-3ee3-4b7c-8d82-602e028bc10b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | Peter, [**This is it, our final chance to fully protect abortion rights for over eight and a half million Virginia residents.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te227ca0b-7aa2-426f-8909-54dc369d1427/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_As a reminder, we only have a one vote pro-choice majority in the VA State Senate, because_ _one "Democratic" Senator, Joe Morrissey, is anti-choice._**_ From his relationship with a 17-yr old at his law firm while in his 50s--leading to his spending time in prison--to his opposition to abortion rights, Morrissey is anti-decency, anti-choice and anti-woman. It's despicable this person holds any position of power. _ _From the Associated Press:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T38722b61-c0b8-4a83-ad62-cd047fea58f2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) That's why _Tuesday's Democratic primary is so important, because we can replace Morrissey _**_with progressive fighter, Laschrecse Aird!_ _S_**** _he's running on protecting abortion rights, calling her campaign "Roe not Joe,_"** _with the **support of every female VA State Senate Democrat, Congresswoman Abigail Spanberger**_ and many male VA State House & State Senate members. [_We have **only 2 days until an election **that may **determine whether millions of VA women retain their right to choose. **_**_Will you please join our "Roe Not Joe," campaign by rushing Lashrecse Aird $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can, so she can be a critical vote to protect abortion for millions of Virginians?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T709fab3a-7ce2-4c41-bc40-775557ec1a42/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for fighting for our constitutional rights. Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Reason with precision
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ed082abbbb144601b67e2a639ce6cfd0&_e=eUaaND1EDlg52j_W9skaqorLaE-iRbQRUs-ehAOZaYPWNkw-NatX68cmtUwm_G91aqUd5IS76YKLLVPBDLTdfhDxUqS2T_kS_AHGEqxbGeRlEzxXwJjslugCLRHTGaQh7Sill_UGcSBAvRIRzerWipxZj68XweBN0XvEvX-9IIvvBtCVr6NzGf2eKWz6WUvbDmoZkWW1tv0Ix6JqC7R0CYVBq2xwVa0UuDdOCoJpTrPGm9415gGbFy-kcPr0b0yJWrA-FYgdvqgIBJW9I686K85jxf4RXnKrkOQ12QPLMoGMjKUueehz3iXIalndV0IoNnQQlYE4YvB3EKeBwOg1c56sCeehP1195HcilHzWBCdh7M-IVv2o6NWbqOh34gwL3Zbh2XmAS4Z4IzStjjSuyyfBjVno0pIWkteBCt-fm8M%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight." By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." ** Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ed082abbbb144601b67e2a639ce6cfd0&_e=eUaaND1EDlg52j_W9skaqorLaE-iRbQRUs-ehAOZaYPWNkw-NatX68cmtUwm_G91aqUd5IS76YKLLVPBDLTdfhDxUqS2T_kS_AHGEqxbGeRlEzxXwJjslugCLRHTGaQh7Sill_UGcSBAvRIRzerWipxZj68XweBN0XvEvX-9IIvvBtCVr6NzGf2eKWz6WUvbDmoZkWW1tv0Ix6JqC7R0CYVBq2xwVa0UuDdOCoJpTrPGm9415gGbFy-kcPr0b0yJnyYneinmArOLrP-Nb8D1xbsi3UkNFwIsYQuSM8s2cx4aaNTEgngI2mneFFBkA4Mh2VNa0n60pAFcPF4TpqaFQ15koGFY_Dpql10hJ_cfZ3TQ3H2DDEdSQJHJhEv4N4-Fq-znz7dQ5jXoFsl4jKoLRRy2CdG2EjLqQXn-RqdFe18%3D)

clean_body: Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight." By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic " Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." Through "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry," you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life. | | Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group. You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. | | | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. More than that, it has caused significant societal harm that will unfold for years to come in ways we cannot currently imagine. On the heels of the Durham report--which revealed an unprecedented effort by the DOJ to take down a political opponent--they have once again taken a further step down a road of unparalleled action that appears intended to destroy a political opponent of the ruling regime..." _ America First Legal will continue to fight hard in court to expose the Deep State conspiracy to control our country. _With your critical support, we will be victorious and the Biden Administration will be finally be held accountable for its corruption_. _**Please support us now.**_

body:
I'm in.
