---

Friend,

**I 'm running for President of the United States!**

_I believe we live in the greatest country on God 's green Earth, Friend.
I believe that America can do for ANYONE what she has done for me.
And I believe I am living proof that America is a Land of Opportunity, not a land of oppression._

**_[If you agree with me, then I ask you to please chip in anything you can afford to help me restore faith in America and get our country back on track.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=51b93ee46e1844dd87c4debd030da992&_e=867DZEWv8WwNe9tGIMUeMZR5Mc3qL0ap4M2EadfvjDUm3K0FaS3hYkVFkBtnokDW1tfXVIOjiQDWGtvPhOklAJhmJDHAUOxnHroLY39B_Czn0pJRpxF6w_msrlPYTZwNRpd200ytfTqfresAE2c4HbpFfzUNqmh70eVvAV82SfI5UB01irnnlrgIc3GW9z98wHVAPMkovrGYCH3TX2rXG01fupdzK7cehedSsW1kfS6MQ71diZmH_4uyd5pdIGdwVOrDIBtE5_-ssCQW5YUjH5JT0CzJLD9Gy_g56Ui0f9x9jGQyEiJlvJp_DNAV-rjK7B6xnoSCREy-zolmshII8RaVTSFX2iBPvclvQTtE7Cd6buRzuqI7hkPFb2Kmey_l7qjtvUXXSPHzppcvsAsnvWa6KeFe4wz2D9wgvNbX6uR_lEW8RaSm5H0irF0F848ydcTFW634cN4JMAD3IEFU-g%3D%3D "If you agree with me, then I ask you to please chip in anything you can afford to help me restore faith in America and get our country back on track.")_**

---
| | | [CHIP IN TO HELP ME RESTORE FAITH IN AMERICA](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=51b93ee46e1844dd87c4debd030da992&_e=867DZEWv8WwNe9tGIMUeMZR5Mc3qL0ap4M2EadfvjDUm3K0FaS3hYkVFkBtnokDW1tfXVIOjiQDWGtvPhOklAJhmJDHAUOxnHroLY39B_Czn0pJRpxF6w_msrlPYTZwNRpd200ytfTqfresAE2c4HbpFfzUNqmh70eVvAV82SfI5UB01irnnlrgIc3GW9z98wHVAPMkovrGYCH3TX2rXG01fupdzK7cehedSsW1kfS6MQ71diZmH_4uyd5pdIGdwVOrDIBtE5_-ssCQW5YUjH5JT0CzJLD9Gy_g56Ui0f9z2a3wEPMlAoN8gS_EMQtJZe0BFXjKMlMFmCAETpKVexxyK7Em32uW-09e7Z2wRJxXbEMulgK0gAhAAO9rpCWkkIphTStOO3Tb5OEiqWk1SLxJkfwBimF33wAblRzywr1fT365XCHKtMq3CxG78NOUPTzmFCwAEOne949xkonr2XA%3D%3D "CHIP IN TO HELP ME RESTORE FAITH IN AMERICA")
---

No longer will we allow our kids to grow up in a culture **where everyone is a victim.**
No longer will we allow our kids to be **indoctrinated,** able bodied people to **avoid work,** and violent criminals to **roam our streets with no repercussions.**
No longer will we ignore the **necessity of individual responsibility.**

I'm determined to tell the truth, Friend, but I need your help to do it.

**_[Will you please chip in before midnight?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=51b93ee46e1844dd87c4debd030da992&_e=867DZEWv8WwNe9tGIMUeMZR5Mc3qL0ap4M2EadfvjDUm3K0FaS3hYkVFkBtnokDW1tfXVIOjiQDWGtvPhOklAJhmJDHAUOxnHroLY39B_Czn0pJRpxF6w_msrlPYTZwNRpd200ytfTqfresAE2c4HbpFfzUNqmh70eVvAV82SfI5UB01irnnlrgIc3GW9z98wHVAPMkovrGYCH3TX2rXG01fupdzK7cehedSsW1kfS6MQ71diZmH_4uyd5pdIGdwVOrDIBtE5_-ssCQW5YUjH5JT0CzJLD9Gy_g56Ui0f9wQQrJBAj9WkuZErkjMsgqttPwA-BNwLOW3lcY47lYjtvrSBEqH82LHVH6ZDPdVHNmHtvxWS3VrVQMlvhc7xUfm9OjnWr5juLxlnwAWqQcbKFMVZRwbGiIxJAJQ1aXtmZGFJyJ4dXbH5AmL2fiPifZi0-agL0UbTXKJdKDIOp4LOw%3D%3D "Will you please chip in before midnight?")_**

---
| | | [CHIP IN BEFORE MIDNIGHT](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=51b93ee46e1844dd87c4debd030da992&_e=867DZEWv8WwNe9tGIMUeMZR5Mc3qL0ap4M2EadfvjDUm3K0FaS3hYkVFkBtnokDW1tfXVIOjiQDWGtvPhOklAJhmJDHAUOxnHroLY39B_Czn0pJRpxF6w_msrlPYTZwNRpd200ytfTqfresAE2c4HbpFfzUNqmh70eVvAV82SfI5UB01irnnlrgIc3GW9z98wHVAPMkovrGYCH3TX2rXG01fupdzK7cehedSsW1kfS6MQ71diZmH_4uyd5pdIGdwVOrDIBtE5_-ssCQW5YUjH5JT0CzJLD9Gy_g56Ui0f9yj-m442OIbyvF0OApLeSpwhStTxxOp2eg6uW7jR1kQel5SXMXIO0giu6HsHPv9aiE1AHtHDz3pnxoz7coJOrRDz5LglCsG_Q7_R8lYkAGXq0_aTn11QPauztGepMBvH5cuq5-LNL26nyzDaqMPKY10HHCdM3yzEg7UOzctMz93pA%3D%3D "CHIP IN BEFORE MIDNIGHT")

Tim

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=51b93ee46e1844dd87c4debd030da992&_e=867DZEWv8WwNe9tGIMUeMZR5Mc3qL0ap4M2EadfvjDUm3K0FaS3hYkVFkBtnokDWL-v4IPL_n3Wo-TjKGMPx7I51o5T4OkZJ6q7vihUoitF-o465jKz9Up2Q1lF54MJUsLaRbS9fxzLA7O8SVrEzrwez1X1VeZZ4NNJAeJX1nT3qQs4SZFAXtlhY0bvSBk3XyxfHvNF7MS4qxwhWP1rRGs53yJXYAxqbngmPmpboTpMj4S3yuTIXNnHHvb5awWs30_k-kIOoYrczSpuXi-RNZdXPgv2grjg0Py0u-hKi24guFbyqOYW30_HIy0tNcyve18_QCZOInlmDCKW3v2YbA0WSLbrn3lDOJqWW5-0W7qYqpCC5JjtQnaDicjk0US2p0yraFL6W_0BYuFFF8qNUqOzVWFZXZoz9VS7nPN_CLauyyKFxLKHvvXqs9KNsKgSd4Up3oQC3XYGE5d4RaN7rfULG6KiGOU1U3baBF8LibjY%3D "TIM SCOTT IS RUNNING FOR PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES - TELL TIM HE'S GOT YOUR SUPPORT!")
---

Friend, I believe our country is hungry for positive, conservative leadership.

It is time for us to restore hope, create opportunities, and protect America. **It is time for us to be proud to be Americans and proud of our president.**

**_[That's why I announced I am running for President of the United States.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=51b93ee46e1844dd87c4debd030da992&_e=867DZEWv8WwNe9tGIMUeMZR5Mc3qL0ap4M2EadfvjDUm3K0FaS3hYkVFkBtnokDWL-v4IPL_n3Wo-TjKGMPx7I51o5T4OkZJ6q7vihUoitF-o465jKz9Up2Q1lF54MJUsLaRbS9fxzLA7O8SVrEzrwez1X1VeZZ4NNJAeJX1nT3qQs4SZFAXtlhY0bvSBk3XyxfHvNF7MS4qxwhWP1rRGs53yJXYAxqbngmPmpboTpMj4S3yuTIXNnHHvb5awWs30_k-kIOoYrczSpuXi-RNZdXPgv2grjg0Py0u-hKi24guFbyqOYW30_HIy0tNcyveyoVtOaQENUZOWK7z7Z_uHA7beblrn0LUjIS_U6sY8e-Zmu6xlcFy9iQT5MJsdcl3LPERTsv5O4eVhxnEydp0k9LnSA5O8RBnSvP8JyerrM_VlcWcrx8hiMaMiAIly2HfIfjumjLSPZwxRx7d4NI6MuC7Z6Mz9jD3qqWA3edImbE%3D "That’s why I announced I am running for President of the United States.")_**

---
| | [SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN HERE](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=51b93ee46e1844dd87c4debd030da992&_e=867DZEWv8WwNe9tGIMUeMZR5Mc3qL0ap4M2EadfvjDUm3K0FaS3hYkVFkBtnokDWL-v4IPL_n3Wo-TjKGMPx7I51o5T4OkZJ6q7vihUoitF-o465jKz9Up2Q1lF54MJUsLaRbS9fxzLA7O8SVrEzrwez1X1VeZZ4NNJAeJX1nT3qQs4SZFAXtlhY0bvSBk3XyxfHvNF7MS4qxwhWP1rRGs53yJXYAxqbngmPmpboTpMj4S3yuTIXNnHHvb5awWs30_k-kIOoYrczSpuXi-RNZdXPgv2grjg0Py0u-hKi24guFbyqOYW30_HIy0tNcyvejfIlr2YjQ29C4ODghqsogpstVorDCTmae5gzXcVN1wze_9hIEgguCfkOH0f9uPr8mMHpssKsovu129wB_lBp_F2WHCsAuxWOMPuu6-hqv4Xa4Uy7ks6VFFeI_-nI8RWQaMZUjw2f-mOF-N-fziBWVv3ZEiqu0BLw_2kAFqKRBAU%3D "SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN HERE")
---

The Democrats have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness. Here's the thing though - I know the power of the American Dream _because I have lived it._ My family went from cotton to congress in a **single lifetime.**

subject: Stand Against Chemical Abortion
body:
Chemical abortion is being touted by abortion activists as a "safe" and "pain-free" way to abort unborn children.

| [ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=188e0e6d27c348c992b14a7340991957&_e=ZMCeWzW6NvHjegdMeyWrwj6GwVT8OXm1WGKVTN_u_i-eU1UFDmlfdNOAIISGTGQE1yY0LF_MBj4IPtrQ9eJF-U-EMhbS79z7wy8V7WAEah4mg_pOR14-mIe7KhS3b2E4aSbayIOiTEUFOkXb6Qg0kNyCX3gZWNtcMp3GvCdGpqzKArSoJI3ZCw6uxEv2ci7u2vH84ECyLAZ79e3CB_8kdhDlLrNJqJNnvI1hlkY_QgsHNISHoj836XZHHaad9m0g8ZyNwyyCJsCUXx8kvoLKbVIv2tEarVqg08W191vxKJM84sNw7QSKUG933OA4A6sURK4XJhW8fDSwbDnX_-Ass2mXmxmSGqKsN9od4McPSzm8_-5-LU2a8tiRzfWwTy7AhEhdJWHNQWoH7_eN9OnxRikUgbPA7fyAjGd7fXSF0Og%3D)
---
#
Hello Friend,

As proud Americans, we stand for our values of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. However, in recent years, the** **[**sanctity of life has been under attack, particularly through the proliferation of chemical abortions.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=188e0e6d27c348c992b14a7340991957&_e=ZMCeWzW6NvHjegdMeyWrwj6GwVT8OXm1WGKVTN_u_i-eU1UFDmlfdNOAIISGTGQE1yY0LF_MBj4IPtrQ9eJF-U-EMhbS79z7wy8V7WAEah4mg_pOR14-mIe7KhS3b2E4aSbayIOiTEUFOkXb6Qg0kNyCX3gZWNtcMp3GvCdGpqzKArSoJI3ZCw6uxEv2ci7u2vH84ECyLAZ79e3CB_8kdhDlLrNJqJNnvI1hlkY_QgsHNISHoj836XZHHaad9m0g8ZyNwyyCJsCUXx8kvoLKbZsjsT6H6f4LNO4ansBDYzHhmEBjJSlP7cjAh5BKfnB9fQETJstx8KWyUMfacpUPkqF5rmPR_hDobkbXdXTVud1Hap33CdAZ6s5ni5U-g18noGW1anRdeY9yOf2T6ayJfNfn-Z1-PxoKsaPZVD8kWjQ%3D)

Chemical abortion is being touted by abortion activists as a "safe" and "pain-free" way to abort unborn children. The reality is that chemical abortion not only takes the life of an innocent child, but also poses grave risks to a mother's health.

For mothers, chemical abortion can cause serious health problems, including heavy bleeding, infection, and even death. Moreover, the safety of this procedure has been called into question in recent years due to the rising number of incidences of incomplete abortion, ectopic pregnancy, and other complications.

For unborn children, chemical abortion means grisly death. The drugs used in this procedure are designed to stop the heart of the developing fetus, leading to its expulsion from the womb. This callous disregard for the sanctity of human life is a tragedy that we must do all we can to prevent.

We must make sure that mothers have the truth about what chemical abortion is and the effects it can have on their health. [**Will you step forward and pledge to stand against abortion?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=188e0e6d27c348c992b14a7340991957&_e=ZMCeWzW6NvHjegdMeyWrwj6GwVT8OXm1WGKVTN_u_i-eU1UFDmlfdNOAIISGTGQE1yY0LF_MBj4IPtrQ9eJF-U-EMhbS79z7wy8V7WAEah4mg_pOR14-mIe7KhS3b2E4aSbayIOiTEUFOkXb6Qg0kNyCX3gZWNtcMp3GvCdGpqzKArSoJI3ZCw6uxEv2ci7u2vH84ECyLAZ79e3CB_8kdhDlLrNJqJNnvI1hlkY_QgsHNISHoj836XZHHaad9m0g8ZyNwyyCJsCUXx8kvoLKbaMBwS9pcXdOe_Ict2jPXzwWSz_gYtwcyhsnVctFzn0fqjjW88lV-OFYxNmRDtzlTZf3rVAu1Ph2prUafQksb6THm1kDpURYaALBtJaXyvD9QjFeyp61_7yuDrzIuaJwdEMT1g1qA6aLlJ2K7PTuKg4%3D)

By signing this pledge, you will be joining more than 1 million concerned citizens who are taking a stand against this barbaric practice and urging lawmakers to enact legislation that protects life at all levels of government.

We need your voice to help us put pressure on lawmakers to draft and pass laws that protect the unborn and their mothers from the dangers of chemical abortion. Sign the pledge here: **[https://action.sbaprolife.org/chemical-abortion-pledge](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=188e0e6d27c348c992b14a7340991957&_e=ZMCeWzW6NvHjegdMeyWrwj6GwVT8OXm1WGKVTN_u_i-eU1UFDmlfdNOAIISGTGQE1yY0LF_MBj4IPtrQ9eJF-U-EMhbS79z7wy8V7WAEah4mg_pOR14-mIe7KhS3b2E4aSbayIOiTEUFOkXb6Qg0kNyCX3gZWNtcMp3GvCdGpqzKArSoJI3ZCw6uxEv2ci7u2vH84ECyLAZ79e3CB_8kdhDlLrNJqJNnvI1hlkY_QgsHNISHoj836XZHHaad9m0g8ZyNwyyCJsCUXx8kvoLKbRPn_9yt8NuusNh2ib1z-GlFSjSzI5uaABfIJzo4jOt42Ifr4OVIPEGV3cecMhbtpEEBIUnt1CE9IEQpC45-H0ClntIicQCuy4ZVbdpK0WNKDwrYbOxPSmtUIo5aAjAD62FIiBGRni4yeKhHwZ4q54I%3D)**

Please don't wait to make your voice heard. Join us today and let's fight for life together.

Sincerely,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, 2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr., PO Box 803, Arlington, VA, 22206

Freedom Nation Today

name: Wiley
subject: Being a dad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306-q2-wn?refcode=230618-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306-q2-wn?refcode=230618-email]
Friends –
I’m reaching out to wish you a very Happy Father’s Day!
Being a dad to my two children is the greatest! Watching them grow, supporting their ideas and goals, laughing together, and seeing the world through their eyes is such an honor, and while I love serving my community in Congress, being a dad is by far my favorite role that I play.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306-q2-wn?refcode=230618-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306-q2-wn?refcode=230618-email]
My heart goes out to all of those who find days like today more difficult than others. Today, we recognize that not all families fit into the traditional mold, and that many face unique circumstances or have experienced loss. This Father's Day, let’s not only express gratitude to our own fathers but also extend our support and empathy to those who may find this occasion challenging.
From my family to yours, I wish you a joyful and memorable Father's Day. May this special day be filled with love, laughter, and cherished moments with your loved ones.
Be well,
Wiley Nickel

body:
We’re so excited to have you on the team because we have work to do – and we can’t do it without you.
| Hey — it’s NextGen PAC again.

Look, we want to be *very* clear about this.

**Young voters saved our democracy in the 2022 midterms. And if we invest in youth turnout efforts now, they will save us again in 2024.**

While the rest of the country discounted them, young people, especially young people of color, showed up in record numbers to fight for our basic rights and protect our freedoms.

**_That’s why our work is important and effective. And that’s why we need you on our team._**

**[But, before we ask for your support, we want to know what issues or priorities are most important to you. So, will you click the link below to take our survey?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65007570/412011285/-926187387?refcode=NG_EM_Welcome_NTL_surv_2022q2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS85OTMyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjEyMTdkNS1kODBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F-859oO3MAJ7dpvrItZpkPgKXDvq1XZ9j1siD5MX-bo=&emci=0afae7c6-56eb-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=bf1217d5-d80d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172)** [TAKE OUR SURVEY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65007571/412011286/-926187387?refcode=NG_EM_Welcome_NTL_surv_2022q2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS85OTMyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjEyMTdkNS1kODBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F-859oO3MAJ7dpvrItZpkPgKXDvq1XZ9j1siD5MX-bo=&emci=0afae7c6-56eb-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=bf1217d5-d80d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172)

We can defeat them at the ballot box, but **ONLY** if we invest in youth turnout early. We stopped the supposed “red wave” in the 2022 midterms, and we can do it again in 2024. Are you with us?

**[Want to join the grassroots movement to power the youth vote? NextGen PAC

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65007580/412011297/1711913910?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2712-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIxZDg4NWI5LWQ4MGQtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KKMrJVnDe6U5jDDMqIQYoYkvQtLafCic6fnTLAYFn50=) Friend, I'm writing to ask you to chip in $15 to help me defeat Ted Cruz and expand our Democratic Senate majority, but first, I want to explain why this is so important.

But here's the problem: Ted Cruz's mega-donor allies are set to funnel millions into his campaign to keep Texas red – and he's already launching attacks against me.

**It might not seem like much, but your $15 will make a huge difference in our ability to fight back and win. I don't take a cent from corporate PACs – because I believe elected officials should serve their voters, not special-interest lobbyists – so I'm truly relying on your grassroots support.**

2️⃣ **_Wisconsin:_ Democrats push for gun safety legislation**
In Wisconsin, Democrats are reintroducing three commonsense gun safety bills this session, including [**measures to expand background checks, storage requirements, and a red flag law →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDGM4k4AkU7RTbjOC3OfpJYqAuKZZ_9-CpXjO91sJ_-fziNk2PjoFONgSTQ6gZtsgP6828fuFunkHHvYwJFZdmeJwu5xRHHo2RVHEC8P3bLKyTLyFNo4mWmm_mig7E1jCKn_nZyqzcCMcu-RY3alXI2BrOEKVXBI8OXo8aq9Xu8fKOU7DsH-YJvcomQb26N7cnEK4TkHZF6Mo7PfkYxUKr4NhCu6klA6y_E4Q2MQ9yy_ANtCGJtFazV98RI1rf9PLt0pk3TwPFhPyG7be7x2PuxmZcsVJH9dVQzD9DXZkVmqNkAWrgMDC_h1C1x91qTY6eTbNxCh72KZtYbVUMuNVFI49HPZdptG7ikI9q0aohClYrIx-KqhQsOv9pt-liIcninKts_9FR3rfwelFljlJFNb3KA-0uoS132pOuMIovpYx_D9jzKHTpRJKCKJVvXX0sZT7dv1eL1p7B3HqreOXPpSI7kP4Ly6855TEMM9kCo7UpN9-8IQpD2EQk0ICw8FdqsY8VekSia_d1ZSR4jSCwAAJIHwvGdF2jwydS90SfNt5PB3957nHf-wT5OO08OOrtt_3OtRxYsbaJ67DZYSXx1P46Cn2uUxxOqgCXOxn0PlFwkoysEMX1AweKoSfduTnSrt5dYhEAauqiZuJkrCFV4U/3x5/nFFomQPiQcOtlKNVnXk8-g/h2/q-nYN7_PXgchysl90qEY1URYhyJDyIVOL8KWX-jjA_g)
3️⃣ **_Michigan:_ Democrats pass early voting bills to expand access to the ballot box**
In Michigan, Democrats passed legislation to implement early voting, allow voters to opt-in to receive an absentee ballot in every election, and [**give voters more flexibility in casting their ballots →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDKjcpxeGcqhSItwQi0La3SFLqa1FNP9kCkvBxm70RCgYLhiYj2HVpFdk6J9jrlw9dQoo17c-M16HgTyllErF-b1bEzMsQxy-O6f3RcDv72snYnPZqdI7Qm2_qla-b0NgwkDrvgg3t_3jDYvfdv3hHCnYAu2tl94Fcj2Ivc6dGwEhcwwGWhUolgaLk45XKfL5NSkcwgPeJpf-oN1CVtbcE7M2B90QNzlN-YdBLz-b9kNxCQ_BDFgwk0L_cItRA2sk2b7_xxd4oJd-ugVr-aY5NzqwoHcYmC2HnN_T46358ugy63M2WGJc2HmHPsam8CRA091dulREWDSf0rkEB3pssJswcIS2p2y0TYaA_yTP08sVwI_RQ7rDQsu1MhB1wU1SaCHDp2URMK3CF3eLmkDaHeNpGcrwiDgvCUG8CZFIWlvXVBJD3K8_xti9uHrEwrRCJT5WbQ-9GU_xP34U6sCsGedEYYBokhrlungLHjkwplAaM6xNrguUjpPIq7bK1JpiVnExCmhQKL5s3hKokKmI6wpA2aoY-rNuiadBZzBL661QzuN7s2-mAw2omPccwlnE8tKYGAq8s3rTPLWQnrdfcdgd9QRJHDcChYlua1_7hkd5fkyH-K0mfTDIJ5U2nzy23oQiYv8pF_ADOucrHuRTjFbVbW07PKkWvzOAfk_nCeo5WMtrcRH3go8TolgOS_oWCA/3x5/nFFomQPiQcOtlKNVnXk8-g/h3/32VM0yMf-j_wEva3S62uBFkBUCrY3U9wdMiRujuNthU)

Monday marks Juneteenth, the annual commemoration of the end of slavery in the U.S., click here to [**learn more about the history and celebration of the holiday →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDNtKfojBOtDdfzDhmsuaYam4Eb8GpoGe99nwKSBngOLyfXmAxYx5u0yFEAxmUwANRp7QEN0wTjzr_eLoGWxSLZfxgY6rVm2IPyPWEvR_Xi0jHKc5EiE9mTjKM5pkuYwKyrbDObmVZsyXY41imqv2UBUW_DZzG9KEGlA49KGDdSeA0JMe1gTpgk0qLWTkbkMvjaudOc_b0A-Fp6cCyr291S1U8aRaUGn_yx3IZ9YCqOcGbgXUTQiD17U10h5yUHZESUFFSUQykwY_vp6kfovWFgiNKdKF7J9ktkgI7iA4iUGd4kWLs7bwEyW185UoFHNPXUQZm1M4RccilLHYU0Mik9YhAj6rlEGW0z6QPSJVCuObgEeqAU8YDKX-gTCVL_cmIrk9xo78Z19FPswXuLfrJ0sHid77wFxmTA4x0M2AKb2k8-cjYIZHBzhkf43iRA3MS_shICxv_9Wmt_lVb-BM1tX4NgiLaIz3LUvNgWq7PYd5GAb9SPJ3TCDgGNPHfNldp3S8wLAEwqvqx2MSoJg-vAftDlev-YiqFAfIMZPVdooN9zEBLbFh6sTT0-o2QniXNvH4icJypX_hdgipbkOzzUHpqnQiAbtsH0mlmMaR9lit/3x5/nFFomQPiQcOtlKNVnXk8-g/h4/yZStMeX0D7JwJqR7SjnvcbFGDU6D46l2fhZv6Qvj05U)

subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
[](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkLFu8yAURp8GNltwSbh4YPilX97SoUtHROA6JrXBwkRR3r5ypO59gO_oO-fr4i4-LSnfPvxKtq6u7q5szX37fe7uugtzSdWBANUJ3UnjFI9WD4BGcrJSG5QCzyfgs40TnicarlcAjMYECqSMn1QcQAaSyJM9OEJLI5VEJXuNKCMMeJ7UpNEIdhKVtsd1ScHn1d9LTe3VZ2p8sXNr287UPwYjg3Gn8KjUP1OuFPtQVgZjLNk3aiX6F4PxLbD57u6zfkscQzU-2upaYOr_56X7fcOrjdszLUvaNbKTuK0-LQeUtz8V-QkAAP__nuVldw)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkLFu8yAURp8GNltwSbh4YPilX97SoUtHROA6JrXBwkRR3r5ypO59gO_oO-fr4i4-LSnfPvxKtq6u7q5szX37fe7uugtzSdWBANUJ3UnjFI9WD4BGcrJSG5QCzyfgs40TnicarlcAjMYECqSMn1QcQAaSyJM9OEJLI5VEJXuNKCMMeJ7UpNEIdhKVtsd1ScHn1d9LTe3VZ2p8sXNr287UPwYjg3Gn8KjUP1OuFPtQVgZjLNk3aiX6F4PxLbD57u6zfkscQzU-2upaYOr_56X7fcOrjdszLUvaNbKTuK0-LQeUtz8V-QkAAP__nuVldw)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkLFu8yAURp8GNltwSbh4YPilX97SoUtHROA6JrXBwkRR3r5ypO59gO_oO-fr4i4-LSnfPvxKtq6u7q5szX37fe7uugtzSdWBANUJ3UnjFI9WD4BGcrJSG5QCzyfgs40TnicarlcAjMYECqSMn1QcQAaSyJM9OEJLI5VEJXuNKCMMeJ7UpNEIdhKVtsd1ScHn1d9LTe3VZ2p8sXNr287UPwYjg3Gn8KjUP1OuFPtQVgZjLNk3aiX6F4PxLbD57u6zfkscQzU-2upaYOr_56X7fcOrjdszLUvaNbKTuK0-LQeUtz8V-QkAAP__nuVldw)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkLFu8yAURp8GNltwSbh4YPilX97SoUtHROA6JrXBwkRR3r5ypO59gO_oO-fr4i4-LSnfPvxKtq6u7q5szX37fe7uugtzSdWBANUJ3UnjFI9WD4BGcrJSG5QCzyfgs40TnicarlcAjMYECqSMn1QcQAaSyJM9OEJLI5VEJXuNKCMMeJ7UpNEIdhKVtsd1ScHn1d9LTe3VZ2p8sXNr287UPwYjg3Gn8KjUP1OuFPtQVgZjLNk3aiX6F4PxLbD57u6zfkscQzU-2upaYOr_56X7fcOrjdszLUvaNbKTuK0-LQeUtz8V-QkAAP__nuVldw)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkLFu8yAURp8GNltwSbh4YPilX97SoUtHROA6JrXBwkRR3r5ypO59gO_oO-fr4i4-LSnfPvxKtq6u7q5szX37fe7uugtzSdWBANUJ3UnjFI9WD4BGcrJSG5QCzyfgs40TnicarlcAjMYECqSMn1QcQAaSyJM9OEJLI5VEJXuNKCMMeJ7UpNEIdhKVtsd1ScHn1d9LTe3VZ2p8sXNr287UPwYjg3Gn8KjUP1OuFPtQVgZjLNk3aiX6F4PxLbD57u6zfkscQzU-2upaYOr_56X7fcOrjdszLUvaNbKTuK0-LQeUtz8V-QkAAP__nuVldw)

clean_body: Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? 188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no " deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It's time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Click below to show your support today! Support the January 6th Families Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor Status: MISSING Goal: 1,000 Donors I launched the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out. Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. Please hurry. And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored. For Freedom, Kash Patel The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible. Republican Majority PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Kellyanne Conway
subject: a few pressing matters to update you on:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
YOU are key to my goal.

| |

---
| | | | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zc99161srbs1vci8ej8dpec19n49ruf0fg91mclo_rp22sh2s8i66o77chg6eor2c5h2bs "Kellyanne Conway")
---

Hey there, it's Kellyanne...

_**[This might just be the single most important email I've ever sent. I have a few pressing matters to update you on as soon as possible:](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2za2naaqcdp4dpur8dpblehuj57dg00u45s1h3878_rp22sh2s8i66o77chg6eor2c5h2bs "I have three urgent matters to discuss with you:")**_
** 1. ** Republicans have an **EXTREMELY** slim Majority in the House - if we lose even a handful of seats, our Majority will be destroyed and Democrats will retake control ** 2. ** Roll Call reported that a top Liberal Super PAC is **UNLOADING** $80,000,000 in New York and California alone - there are enough battleground seats in those two states alone to tip the balance of power ** 3. ** The latest FEC reports have Democrats **OUTRAISING**
Republicans by _$12,000,000+_ since we took back the House in January
**When I ran the presidential campaign in 2016, I never minced words with anyone. I always told it like it is... _[So here it goes: our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us. Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim House Majority before our FINAL June deadline?](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z5tvpsbtd4mre00lmvba91ppm5fs9us94e78n17o_rp22sh2s8i66o77chg6eor2c5h2bs "So here it goes: our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us. Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim House Majority before our FINAL June deadline?")_**
---
**[**YES**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zngp9g9249kgqta66bsedov7bohr1dp03prvlekg_rp22sh2s8i66o77chg6eor2c5h2bs) _[**NO**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zkaos5c4e5s42eqdl8utmsfvos5j7v1k1p26535g_rp22sh2s8i66o77chg6eor2c5h2bs)**
---
Look, I don't like sending emails like this - the Democrats have driven our economy off a cliff and I know times are tough. Unfortunately, fundraising can mean the difference between victory and defeat, resulting in Republican policies stewarding our financial future or Democrat policies.

Democrats control the Senate and the presidency, so House Republicans have the most important job in DC.

They are the ONLY firewall we have to stop Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer's radical agenda. And even then, our Majority in the House comes down to just a few seats. **That 's why this email is especially important.**

**_[Here's my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zpo67g66314oi6c9348k7mcala64g8vg3d8c35c0_rp22sh2s8i66o77chg6eor2c5h2bs "Here’s my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars.")_ **

If everyone reading this gives that much, we'll catch up just in time before our June deadline.

YOU are key to my goal. We've stood together before, and I know we can win big again! Can I count on you?
---
**[**YES**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z902s1fn25l8sepagsmjljjqq5aamso1itl9igmg_rp22sh2s8i66o77chg6eor2c5h2bs) _[**NO**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zuigqpetqvaj9utn2mrs61r8ojobib8q3022n5tg_rp22sh2s8i66o77chg6eor2c5h2bs)**
---
Thanks for all you do for freedom.

- Kellyanne Conway
---
* * *
---
|
---

| Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC.
---

body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65008878/412016130/-1246499856?refcode=fl_em_act_20230618fathersday_dm_180da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2FhYzE2NS1kYTBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b3I6DD3SXrTlahoiMnv1VQQYqUi-zmdj_1xMfs63YMY=)

To all the Maryland dads out there – a very happy Father's Day to you! I could not let the day pass without celebrating my husband Wes, a truly amazing dad to our two kids, Mia and James. Moving into the governor's mansion has changed our lives in so many ways, but Wes and I committed to keeping as much constant for the kids as we could. **He still plays football with them in the front yard, but now that yard is the lawn of Government House. And we still do Saturday night dinners as a family.** **[I want to show Wes how much we appreciate all he does for our family, so I'm inviting you to sign our Father's Day card for him. I know messages from this team will mean so much to him!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65008879/412016131/-634939536?ms=fl_em_act_20230618fathersday_dm_180da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2FhYzE2NS1kYTBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b3I6DD3SXrTlahoiMnv1VQQYqUi-zmdj_1xMfs63YMY=&emci=6a297302-bb0a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=13aac165-da0d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=24635485) ** | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65008880/412016132/-634939536?ms=fl_em_act_20230618fathersday_dm_180da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2FhYzE2NS1kYTBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b3I6DD3SXrTlahoiMnv1VQQYqUi-zmdj_1xMfs63YMY=&emci=6a297302-bb0a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=13aac165-da0d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=24635485)

subject: Expose the College Cartel
body:
I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the BIGGEST and most IMPACTFUL pro-America student organization

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d0422d63ddf94e31bf9996e0fe9b02a7&_e=vO7O7ZQv5_OIKEUdYeEN455HoXgtCJBxgqfAzp5U0wxkEXg-TQx7xUNNWSvqywVgZWaatFnIwVRzlvU6swUEi6hjWCpXTDI59tNyq_fCTrY0C72GYJHA8PWDE_E60fhnXKnvhvS7L4egYV3Meu9jJ_kYDPNB832_Vte3Ltyc-vblXCvFQQHLDgWZP1ifgaBYSz_TM1h0fjTEMi9390g_f1ztysMNi3PxkEUgrU5Yj3uJIHRKohALigtuWIbr7936KXhRum0InJGK2NxOqQo1mllaC2PPR62YO9aU06V3rL0%3D)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d0422d63ddf94e31bf9996e0fe9b02a7&_e=vO7O7ZQv5_OIKEUdYeEN455HoXgtCJBxgqfAzp5U0wxkEXg-TQx7xUNNWSvqywVgZWaatFnIwVRzlvU6swUEi6hjWCpXTDI59tNyq_fCTrY0C72GYJHA8PWDE_E60fhnXKnvhvS7L4egYV3Meu9jJwi2b9WxVoSh-VjAQEAfyd5Sr5nxQOUtAMfQ-sxtOcTmos0X7_rUdO3BjXLo0vq6wAvedWrJBDx9wQVmDvZUMVBFETJ-MbxeAa3gI3BWpChyiNHfKRHKeiZfiLjYjQtdlQ6uj17WhwcmrZ79VXOmdEg%3D)
---
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d0422d63ddf94e31bf9996e0fe9b02a7&_e=vO7O7ZQv5_OIKEUdYeEN455HoXgtCJBxgqfAzp5U0wxkEXg-TQx7xUNNWSvqywVgZWaatFnIwVRzlvU6swUEi6hjWCpXTDI59tNyq_fCTrY0C72GYJHA8PWDE_E60fhnXKnvhvS7L4egYV3Meu9jJ5bJQLvjbfmvbxPby-1dtgU1rBjFnT7LX9QYkuLxWQh9gpebCttRdqHLlXnjlsMi3BM71vG0bVRcBlpOpNuODwIBauzJNStg1eC_rEOfD98Xkn69xINmzlZl809_cMFtKaWWOokYogn71uQvEarZM14%3D)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d0422d63ddf94e31bf9996e0fe9b02a7&_e=vO7O7ZQv5_OIKEUdYeEN455HoXgtCJBxgqfAzp5U0wxkEXg-TQx7xUNNWSvqywVgZWaatFnIwVRzlvU6swUEi6hjWCpXTDI59tNyq_fCTrY0C72GYJHA8PWDE_E60fhnXKnvhvS7L4egYV3Meu9jJxVNenReonDpw9XXaCDMYos6Kc4NvWqXNsMvIE4QWQHLH4EqlpnD08YYletSBDWajz4p8ZqPplCQjS27QOfykKqCrE2DmvWDMlN40j15OLnVXzMEeA2e2x1UU3hN2kjkvaOcYdWuILkQPc7kC33FEQo%3D)
---
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d0422d63ddf94e31bf9996e0fe9b02a7&_e=vO7O7ZQv5_OIKEUdYeEN455HoXgtCJBxgqfAzp5U0wxkEXg-TQx7xUNNWSvqywVgZWaatFnIwVRzlvU6swUEi6hjWCpXTDI59tNyq_fCTrY0C72GYJHA8PWDE_E60fhnXKnvhvS7L4egYV3Meu9jJ9WpSpjYpVdWugE59qgb42KUX8lWkY8CiYUQBTWsCwrHruzIQYS7r9ys2Zn-7QWYotPk1OPzacw5ZmIHaMfiDStEsVdHYj1kr2FiygxCSlCkh3yJi8eSOY-EgTD2l0LaYpA5lA8Jf1bEE51QOhEnd8c%3D)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: The most important race in the country
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
The outcome will determine control of the Senate, and probably control of the White House as well.
#

Peter -
In just a moment, we are going to ask you to make a contribution to Ruben Gallego's campaign for Senate. Please let us explain why this request is so important.
Here is the truth:
Arizona's Senate race is probably the most important race in the country.
The outcome will determine control of the Senate, and probably control of the White House as well.
Kyrsten Sinema has no path to victory, so if Ruben loses and Republicans flip this seat, Democrats have zero chance to hold the Senate.
But also, if Ruben loses, it probably means that Joe Biden loses Arizona as well. And if that happens, the presidency probably goes with it.
In 2022, Mark Kelly's dominance helped Joe Biden across the finish line. He pulled in a lot of voters that made the difference. We have to do the same -- and we have a path to do it with Latino voters and first-time voters.
But we can't do it without you. So please:
[**Can you use this link to contribute $3 to Ruben Gallego's campaign today? We need to reach our goals before the FEC deadline ends. These are goals we need to reach to WIN.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june23.4TsbMb&refcode=em230618-1-f&t=1&akid=718%2E734936%2EtGqYxg)

name: Glenn Grothman
subject: Happy Father’s Day!
body:
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=f9ef163c38f94024905cc6b5e55f222e&_m=591f182fbd0b4dbca1f46b5bfe0c0658&_e=J63Fz6_viZNP4v3P3V2grUXoxT2yj24FnOsjKgB7ThIBWW13LBtlgR4i4UVf4i5jyZdvuQJNJS3SFwrEHOt3czy21edDIR_d55LcOfviDbIT20jMdi7g_2x9KUHR8P4AObsUaZgt0x3Hu1jhF-E_pn0q_5w0coaG7C0eFv6TQ9mUHydia0VaP2xbR5_LYluWy_lO0SV4Iwf6gjbvvmZkMw%3D%3D)
---
My friend, Please join me to honor all fathers this Father’s Day! Today we celebrate fatherhood, both past and present, with this special day proclaimed over 50 years ago: _To have a father—to be a father—is to come very near the heart of life itself._ _In fatherhood we know the elemental magic and joy of humanity. In fatherhood we even sense the divine, as the Scriptural writers did who told of all good gifts coming "down from the Father of lights, with whom is no variableness, neither shadow of turning"—symbolism so challenging to each man who would give his own son or daughter a life of light without shadow. _ _This is fitting and good. Let each American make this Father's Day an occasion for renewal of the love and gratitude we bear to our fathers, increasing and enduring through all the years. _ Today we gather with family to honor and reflect on all fathers, and recognize the contributions they've had in our lives. Sincerely, **Glenn Grothman**
---
|
---
| | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=f9ef163c38f94024905cc6b5e55f222e&_m=591f182fbd0b4dbca1f46b5bfe0c0658&_e=J63Fz6_viZNP4v3P3V2grXqs1HbwaqaCb1D5xAlVPjKCjuHwcgVbxdMyL5zRBFjlOSradcRODNTNxbXawSA62SSjJr8ewJ4d3E8R6dgOdwpX6Ij12XIWAjf96jT-f43HOAgtTNyTAtmSDCw0QEYzp7UkbDr_iqvMxkJoK7Sryq0znEl2UVwGVDOqi2_zSqOgeVPlCtlnmWGaZQS1il9JSyDeqx733RVBh8I6ps6x-4w%3D)
---

clean_body: | | | My friend, Please join me to honor all fathers this Father’s Day! Today we celebrate fatherhood, both past and present, with this special day proclaimed over 50 years ago: To have a father—to be a father—is to come very near the heart of life itself. In fatherhood we know the elemental magic and joy of humanity. In fatherhood we even sense the divine, as the Scriptural writers did who told of all good gifts coming "down from the Father of lights, with whom is no variableness, neither shadow of turning"—symbolism so challenging to each man who would give his own son or daughter a life of light without shadow. This is fitting and good. Let each American make this Father's Day an occasion for renewal of the love and gratitude we bear to our fathers, increasing and enduring through all the years. Today we gather with family to honor and reflect on all fathers, and recognize the contributions they've had in our lives. Sincerely, Glenn Grothman | | | | | Follow Glenn Grothman on Social Media! | | | ---|---|--- | | Glenn Grothman for Congress P.O. Box 1215 Fond du Lac, WI 54936 You are receiving this email because you expressed an interest in Glenn Grothman.

Friend,
To get access to Crooked Joe, you apparently need to own a corporation tied to the Chinese Communist Party or be a Ukrainian energy oligarch.
Biden will make you pay an arm and a leg just to shake his hand.
_**But that’s certainly not how I do things!**_
In fact, I’m asking YOU to contribute just $1 to be automatically entered to win the chance to be my VIP guest at my July 1 Rally in South Carolina in honor of Independence Day.
Friend, and if you win, I’ll cover the flight and hotel for you and a friend – and we’ll even take a picture together so you can remember this day forever.

name: Zak Malamed
subject: Before I head out the door…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
I wanted to share a quick note with you about the values my dad has instilled in me and how they’re shaping my campaign for Congress.
#
I’m about to head out the door to go celebrate Father's Day with my family, but first I wanted to share a quick note with you about the values my dad has instilled in me and how they’re shaping my campaign for Congress.
Before I do that though, I want to say: I know today is not easy for everyone. I never met my grandfather and every Father’s Day I see the pain that causes my father. That pain is full of love for the man who raised him and pride my father has in the children he raised.
For so many reasons, I know today can be filled with a range of mixed emotions. So if you need to stop reading here, I understand. I hope you are able to take care of yourself today.
**My dad, Jonathan, has been my role model for as long as I can remember.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230618?amount=5&refcode=em20230618&refcode2=112_8507_Nl0kM1&akid=112%2E8507%2ENl0kM1)
He taught me how to **persevere** in the face of unexpected challenges when he had to leave his career in the garment industry because those jobs were being moved overseas.
He demonstrated the value of **taking risks** in order to create a better future for those around you when he transitioned to a totally new career path and taught himself everything he needed to know to succeed.
And he showed me that there’s no shame in **asking for help** when we had to rely on the support of family and neighbors to make ends meet.
**These same values drive me in my everyday life, but especially in my campaign for Congress.** To defeat George Santos, stop the MAGA madness, and flip this seat blue, we are going to have to work through challenges, take risks, and — of course — ask for help along the way.
[**Which leads me to an important question: will you chip in any amount today to power our campaign? Winning this race will be our greatest challenge yet, and I know I can’t do this alone.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230618?amount=5&refcode=em20230618&refcode2=112_8507_Nl0kM1&akid=112%2E8507%2ENl0kM1)
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230618?amount=5&refcode=em20230618&refcode2=112_8507_Nl0kM1&akid=112%2E8507%2ENl0kM1)**
With gratitude,
Zak
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=112%2E8507%2ENl0kM1)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.zakforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=112%2E8507%2ENl0kM1)

To give by check:
Zak for Congress
PO Box 220421
Great Neck, NY 11022
Email us: [info@e.zakforcongress.com](mailto:info@e.zakforcongress.com)
PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS

body:

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d657c14b28b64f91a38953c6f16f2c18&_e=Izwj5EJ_aXVWVppNKBAGiJDuYvfH7ER_whF3Etc-CMsHueXBQKMGgFlwVwajN3SPwTVPyfZ7O_L6xnzLaLaEkkAMJP6zZz3FHTpHGcbbz7sfX0CP4nl4MHqiqjUIHdilTmUyZihu6Xhuq_UNhLkYMjyIKVBMNQWnvQm1zG0FIlz1HlgetJ5YdrY1dufNDcof57AWiQp6ht_FFHnPedrbT9AHMreghVjFujO8M4_7iFbNBjGpeiInvcltm5fWiYLYRmjB4x2lFsDHnWhkfGC0IjKMcfZnFpccP5Az64Ky3y0rs5qdwmKsoSoLw6x_FQgL)

Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d657c14b28b64f91a38953c6f16f2c18&_e=Izwj5EJ_aXVWVppNKBAGiJDuYvfH7ER_whF3Etc-CMsHueXBQKMGgFlwVwajN3SPwTVPyfZ7O_L6xnzLaLaEkkAMJP6zZz3FHTpHGcbbz7sfX0CP4nl4MHqiqjUIHdilTmUyZihu6Xhuq_UNhLkYMoe72lP_bWHqRkXEZoSkybfJjguG8rzZJGXugUqkycLQFzEKAH8zLNoOG2oiOVXtbAe8EuSR5Cg7RdDCWfVOXAuxEFpM1I2OfPZtXvhcwmXe9ojgwWbDTpcfgkqSHjvvFloeUPJFPKda7fI8FHj0JFofovSpC8WNHDBzbQ9Md6RY)

_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d657c14b28b64f91a38953c6f16f2c18&_e=Izwj5EJ_aXVWVppNKBAGiJDuYvfH7ER_whF3Etc-CMsHueXBQKMGgFlwVwajN3SPwTVPyfZ7O_L6xnzLaLaEkkAMJP6zZz3FHTpHGcbbz7sfX0CP4nl4MHqiqjUIHdilTmUyZihu6Xhuq_UNhLkYMqlwd_DrwFS1dz5DTE1bGoF-K1rehYKLFFXP9bducHpwUv55UvR03-p6QG8Mlagjz48SykgtsdzrRTkyiL4i4_GrnFYhNxav3i_Oz4ncLcoasG-_OodG4-otr4V0yl2SYdjzImlBArGt1fgmxRr-iRNphhLggFoB5woEBmSB_miA)
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d657c14b28b64f91a38953c6f16f2c18&_e=Izwj5EJ_aXVWVppNKBAGiJDuYvfH7ER_whF3Etc-CMsHueXBQKMGgFlwVwajN3SPwTVPyfZ7O_L6xnzLaLaEkkAMJP6zZz3FHTpHGcbbz7sfX0CP4nl4MHqiqjUIHdilTmUyZihu6Xhuq_UNhLkYMkZMjYyf4RhwNSnlCth_4VgnKWDJ3uhW6N8fV5UIupZ3PQhA2-o6koGJBmnqUsKo1136elczs-8F-iYHndiESz0zOWBOABgRhEzgMmyGeBmZQy85Kq6UPl0f33qPUahc4Q0kkZvf4LFGMHHKcO42VXU67bJybY6WqWyWYL_glc3K)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d657c14b28b64f91a38953c6f16f2c18&_e=Izwj5EJ_aXVWVppNKBAGiJDuYvfH7ER_whF3Etc-CMsHueXBQKMGgFlwVwajN3SPwTVPyfZ7O_L6xnzLaLaEkkAMJP6zZz3FHTpHGcbbz7sfX0CP4nl4MHqiqjUIHdilTmUyZihu6Xhuq_UNhLkYMvaWbYbrMNkQCHwgBlg7_IL2cWiBzySdRhekiQVmRof1C1jO0OWhQ_d87AQtdr-OsH6QNdrqTaDvuHxTZ01FdipaFAoUjlVerUYzq68gQzg5kq5ZXTpJZ7aDsrIpSO22FSAZytOF7XIupcvzcbFUYJ5rW80xwzIETLI8pTjlFrKU) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left's college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d657c14b28b64f91a38953c6f16f2c18&_e=Izwj5EJ_aXVWVppNKBAGiJDuYvfH7ER_whF3Etc-CMsHueXBQKMGgFlwVwajN3SPwTVPyfZ7O_L6xnzLaLaEkkAMJP6zZz3FHTpHGcbbz7sfX0CP4nl4MHqiqjUIHdilTmUyZihu6Xhuq_UNhLkYMuGRO1hzfF_WmiBHn3w_L9AVGe_I9AqPEyhWBi5l5E3eiTocXhLzgqvlIkIUb0FNK-se0r0HMXTxFCW8Xy7EBUv5Y5jP7KkseuhMN2kh17vVulE7SobuwsK0AZcoErB-LXj8eZipLYac5IEk4SMKPqKWVAN9X3uduyQfEXXMNSwB)

All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d657c14b28b64f91a38953c6f16f2c18&_e=Izwj5EJ_aXVWVppNKBAGiJDuYvfH7ER_whF3Etc-CMsHueXBQKMGgFlwVwajN3SPwTVPyfZ7O_L6xnzLaLaEkkAMJP6zZz3FHTpHGcbbz7sfX0CP4nl4MHqiqjUIHdilTmUyZihu6Xhuq_UNhLkYMjxsZVgJ5_esLu7vtmyZXbeeeUwq-iLBPFGQA5VTykT2KcdOnyztBLu3YU1xUiU4KGB4zvn2MXPGC5OWCPCsxtl3lbo47QC908_WDHyaDnOQ6JMWLPhc-zc3DTSgMruH4OnuhnDVnSoRp3FGZPUnnM-EtuuAgafRnsu729TsdfkO) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!

I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,The College Scam. Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with The College Scam to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read The College Scam, you'll learn: my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left's college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War! The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War! Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 Reclaiming American Freedom 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: I don't see your response -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi there, it’s Diana, the Research Director here at the DSCC.

I'm reaching out because President Biden is _officially_ running for re-election and polls show him statistically tied with Donald Trump -- but we’re _still_ missing your response to our presidential approval poll!

The president’s standing among voters like you is a key driver of voter turnout patterns, so it’s _**critical**_ that we have accurate data to help us make necessary strategic decisions.

Unfortunately, we’re still 138 answers short in Pennsylvania, and without your response, we will NOT be able to reach statistical significance for our poll to take on the GOP!

**Our Live Poll is closing at 11:59 P.M.,_so please answer immediately:_**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/13653?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230618-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalPostAnnouncementRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230618-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalPostAnnouncementRF-Pros-sl1&akid=11070%2E9716520%2EwxRILC)

name: Courier Newsroom
subject: The New York Times’ in-kind contribution to Trump
body:
Too many news organizations are giving Trump wall-to-wall coverage in an attempt to boost ratings.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1127%2E120351%2EN7N2rT)
The media coverage leading up to Donald Trump’s first election in 2016 was abysmal, Peter.
TV news channels aired countless hours of his rallies, his speeches, and even his plane idling on the tarmac. Meanwhile, even print publications uncritically parroted his wild claims and conspiracy theories, failing repeatedly to provide the context that would have made it clear such musings were untethered from reality.
**Unfortunately, it’s clear that this time around will be no different. Despite the media’s duty to inform the public, too many news organizations are already giving Trump wall-to-wall coverage in an attempt to drive profits and boost their ratings.**
[**Will you chip in $5 today to help us fight back against this kind of sensationalized, profit-driven coverage? Courier Newsroom is committed to providing reliable, in-depth reporting for audiences in ‘news deserts’ across 8 battleground states, but we can’t do it without your support.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230618?refcode=em20230618&refcode2=1127_120351_N7N2rT&akid=1127%2E120351%2EN7N2rT)
**Just take a look at the front page of _The_ _New York Times_ from last Wednesday:**
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230618?refcode=em20230618&refcode2=1127_120351_N7N2rT&akid=1127%2E120351%2EN7N2rT)
**The fact that 185 million Americans say they don’t trust the news should be a wake-up call for mainstream media organizations who continue to put ratings and profit ahead of informative coverage and our democracy.**
But rather than focusing on the 37 charges brought against Trump by the Justice Department or the widespread misinformation campaign he’s pursuing, the _Times_ chooses to center the fact that he pled not guilty, calling it a “momentous scene.”
As the presidential race ramps up, this kind of coverage is only going to help Trump in the long run — just as it did in 2016. **And that’s why we’re dedicated to doing things differently.**
At Courier Newsroom, we’re focused on providing informative, fact-based coverage of local events in 8 battleground states. We serve audiences in ‘news deserts’ that lack other reliable sources of local reporting, and our journalists pick up the national media’s slack by calling misinformation out for what it is.
[**But this work takes resources, Peter, and we rely on the generous support of people like you to help fund our efforts. So if you’re tired of the media constantly putting profits ahead of informative coverage, will you chip in $5 today and help us keep bringing the facts to communities that need it?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230618?refcode=em20230618&refcode2=1127_120351_N7N2rT&akid=1127%2E120351%2EN7N2rT)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230618?refcode=em20230618&refcode2=1127_120351_N7N2rT&akid=1127%2E120351%2EN7N2rT)**
Thanks for supporting us in our mission,
The Courier Newsroom Team
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=2&refcode2=1127_120351_N7N2rT&akid=1127%2E120351%2EN7N2rT)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1127%2E120351%2EN7N2rT)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

| | | FIRST: The Supreme Court ruled that Alabama’s congressional map discriminates against Black Voters

THEN: We learned this ruling could reverberate to other states that have gerrymandered maps — _l_ _ike Georgia, North Carolina, South Carolina and Louisiana._ **This could result in the creation of 2-4 new Black majority districts**

NOW: We only need to pick up 5 seats to take back the House, and with new Black majority districts being drawn — **that’s where we come in!** In 2020, we provided** _over 70,000 rides to voters_** during the Georgia runoffs and made massive investments in GOTV efforts all over the country.

In 2022, we **_contacted 3.1 MILLION Black voters_** to get them to the polls and invested **_over one million dollars_** into Black candidates.

**In 2024, we can mobilize Black voters in these new districts and****TAKE BACK THE HOUSE.**

Peter, our team knows that 2024 feels like a lifetime away. Making a contribution right now might not seem _THAT_ important.

**But here’s the truth of it:** when you want voters to turn out, you have to organize early and often. You have to put the resources on the ground as early as possible — organizing is not only for the “on-year,” it’s for every single year, and every single day.

Grassroots activism like this isn’t cheap, Peter, and we desperately need your help.

[It’s time to step up. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | | FIRST: The Supreme Court ruled that Alabama’s congressional map discriminates against Black Voters THEN: We learned this ruling could reverberate to other states that have gerrymandered maps — l ike Georgia, North Carolina, South Carolina and Louisiana. This could result in the creation of 2-4 new Black majority districts NOW: We only need to pick up 5 seats to take back the House, and with new Black majority districts being drawn — that’s where we come in! In 2020, we provided over 70,000 rides to voters during the Georgia runoffs and made massive investments in GOTV efforts all over the country. In 2022, we contacted 3.1 MILLION Black voters to get them to the polls and invested over one million dollars into Black candidates. In 2024, we can mobilize Black voters in these new districts andTAKE BACK THE HOUSE. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Peter, our team knows that 2024 feels like a lifetime away. name: Dr. Brian Williams
subject: To my fellow dads, happy Father's Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65018968/412047034/1633369994?refcode=EM_C_230618FathersDay_DBW_4_Actives_logo&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGM1NDNiM2ItZTgwZC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8q05-1QZokfD7l78s7q6_PvTlKHH8E3o3c7paM8RLPY=)
Peter,

I’m wishing all my fellow dads a very happy Father’s Day. Being a father to my amazing daughter, Abeni, is one of my greatest joys, and I’m lucky to watch her grow every day.

Abeni is 12 going on 16, as I like to joke, and we try to spend some time together every afternoon, either at our local Starbucks or TCBY. Now that I’m running for Congress, I use those moments to bond and share with her why I’m taking this step – I want to ensure Abeni and every child in America is able to grow free from the threat of violence, and safe to thrive to become the best version of themselves.

My father, Bill, was a career Air Force non-commissioned officer and a major influence on my decision to pursue service above self in every step of my career. I carry the lessons he taught me as I mature as a father and raise my own daughter.

To all the fathers and father figures, I hope that you’re able to enjoy time with your loved ones on this day of celebration and appreciation.

Happy Father’s Day,

Brian | Dr. Brian Williams is an Air Force Academy graduate, a Harvard-trained surgeon, a former congressional health policy advisor, and a nationally recognized leader at the intersection of public policy and structural racism, gun violence, and health equity. Dr. Williams is ready to bring his years of experience to Congress to fix our broken systems and save lives.

You can support Dr. Williams’ campaign for Texas’ 32nd Congressional District by making a one-time contribution here:

clean_body: = Peter, I’m wishing all my fellow dads a very happy Father’s Day. Being a father to my amazing daughter, Abeni, is one of my greatest joys, and I’m lucky to watch her grow every day. Abeni is 12 going on 16, as I like to joke, and we try to spend some time together every afternoon, either at our local Starbucks or TCBY. Now that I’m running for Congress, I use those moments to bond and share with her why I’m taking this step – I want to ensure Abeni and every child in America is able to grow free from the threat of violence, and safe to thrive to become the best version of themselves. My father, Bill, was a career Air Force non-commissioned officer and a major influence on my decision to pursue service above self in every step of my career. I carry the lessons he taught me as I mature as a father and raise my own daughter. To all the fathers and father figures, I hope that you’re able to enjoy time with your loved ones on this day of celebration and appreciation. Happy Father’s Day, Brian | Dr. Brian Williams is an Air Force Academy graduate, a Harvard-trained surgeon, a former congressional health policy advisor, and a nationally recognized leader at the intersection of public policy and structural racism, gun violence, and health equity. Dr. Williams is ready to bring his years of experience to Congress to fix our broken systems and save lives. name: Eugene DePasquale
subject: I’ll defend the rights of the LGBTQ+ community
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for Attorney General
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65019362/412048752/-531765509?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDFiNTllNS1lODBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ipyH22DtTyeENoF1qefbcVOo7-kHTQmMaBLpDLEOj8A=&emci=2a1b59e5-e80d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=301b59e5-e80d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=10203249) Team,

Growing up, my parents owned a bar right across the street from The Holiday, Pittsburgh’s oldest gay bar. At a time when the gay community was under constant threat and forced to hide, the owners, Chuck and Chuck, were my parents' friends and neighbors.

They had an incredible impact on me. Seeing gay people simply being themselves when I would run to borrow some ice taught me important lessons about love and acceptance — and also reminded me how they had so few places where they were allowed to live openly without fear.

When I look back on the strides the LGBTQ+ community has made in demanding — and winning — equal rights and acceptance, I think back to the people at the Holiday who simply wanted to be true to themselves and the people they loved.

However, I don't have to tell you there are still powerful forces in our country actively fighting to turn back the clock. The rights of millions of people and families are at stake and the people of Pennsylvania deserve leaders who will fight for every single citizen, no matter who you are or who you love. Leaders who will fight to expand equality and fight discrimination.

When I served in the state House, one of the first bills for which I fought was to protect workers from discrimination. Throughout my career I've used my platform to speak up for and defend the rights of LGBTQ+ Pennsylvanians.

As your Attorney General, I pledge discrimination will have no home in Pennsylvania.

Thank you,

clean_body: Team, Growing up, my parents owned a bar right across the street from The Holiday, Pittsburgh’s oldest gay bar. At a time when the gay community was under constant threat and forced to hide, the owners, Chuck and Chuck, were my parents' friends and neighbors. They had an incredible impact on me. Seeing gay people simply being themselves when I would run to borrow some ice taught me important lessons about love and acceptance — and also reminded me how they had so few places where they were allowed to live openly without fear. When I look back on the strides the LGBTQ+ community has made in demanding — and winning — equal rights and acceptance, I think back to the people at the Holiday who simply wanted to be true to themselves and the people they loved. However, I don't have to tell you there are still powerful forces in our country actively fighting to turn back the clock. The rights of millions of people and families are at stake and the people of Pennsylvania deserve leaders who will fight for every single citizen, no matter who you are or who you love. Leaders who will fight to expand equality and fight discrimination. When I served in the state House, one of the first bills for which I fought was to protect workers from discrimination. Throughout my career I've used my platform to speak up for and defend the rights of LGBTQ+ Pennsylvanians. As your Attorney General, I pledge discrimination will have no home in Pennsylvania. Thank you, Eugene DePasquale | | = | Make sure this email goes to your inbox. Add to your address book. This campaign is powered by grassroots donation. name: Mark Mullet
subject: what being a father has meant to me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Mark Mullet
body:
| | Today, like we do each year on Father’s Day, my family and I will head out to hike in the Cascade Mountains and spend time together. This year, I’m particularly proud to be celebrating two graduations this week, with Caroline graduating middle school and Eloise graduating high school!

I truly don’t think there’s a better place to be raising kids than right here in Washington – from our state’s natural beauty that we must protect, to our public schools and higher education opportunities, to our commitment to defending crucial rights like reproductive freedom and LGBTQ+ equality.

Growing up, I was taught that if you work hard and play by the rules, you can be successful. I’m running for Governor to make that a reality for my own kids and for future generations across Washington.

Skyrocketing housing costs, barriers to higher education, the growing effects of climate change, concerns about public safety – right now, all of these ongoing issues are making it more difficult for young people to truly build a family and a future in our state.

This Father’s Day, I’m re-committing myself to making Washington safer, more affordable, and a place where everyone can thrive.

To all the dads in your life, from my family to yours, Happy Father’s Day!

– Mark

---
|
* * *
---
Mark Mullet is running for Governor to make Washington safe, affordable and prosperous.

subject: Sustaining this campaign

body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2558%2E5257348%2EcvRYhW ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek —

When I first ran for office, I spent lots of time knocking on doors and
meeting voters in every corner of my state Senate district. We spent hours
putting up yard signs in my neighbors’ front yards, and I tried to shake
the hand of every voter in my community.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2023_abs_em.JzRsbz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230618_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2558%2E5257348%2EcvRYhW ]Old photo of Adam and Eve Schiff with an Adam Schiff for State Senate
yard sign

Flash forward to today: I’m now running in my first statewide election,
and it’s certainly a larger campaign operation than we had back then.

Nowadays, I am traveling across California, introducing myself to millions
of new voters and explaining why I’m running for the United States Senate.
And yes, I’m still trying to shake every hand I possibly can (some things
never change).

Derek, we’re
working to build the largest grassroots movement California has ever seen
— but to do that takes significant resources.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2342?c0=jun2023_abs_em.ETTk-h&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230618_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=2558%2E5257348%2EcvRYhW ]One of the most meaningful ways you can support our movement is by
making a monthly recurring donation.

When you activate a recurring gift each month, our team can allocate our
resources more efficiently. We can plan an extra campaign stop, add
another ad to the airwaves, and order extra yard signs (more on those
soon!).

So far, nearly 10,000 supporters have signed up to make a recurring
contribution, and I can’t tell you how big a difference this makes in our
campaign’s work.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2342?c0=jun2023_abs_em.ETTk-h&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230618_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=2558%2E5257348%2EcvRYhW ]So, Derek,
will you join the thousands of recurring donors today by starting a
monthly contribution?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
monthly recurring donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2343?c0=jun2023_abs_em.QUuS0u&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230618_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=2558%2E5257348%2EcvRYhW ]DONATE $3 MONTHLY

name: Kirsten, me (2)
subject: apologies for the double email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
---
Friend, it's Kirsten again. Apologies for the email on Father's Day, but I wanted to make sure that you saw my message about the FAMILY Act. (And what better way to celebrate the dads in our lives than by talking about paid family leave?).
This legislation would be groundbreaking. By establishing a national paid family leave program, we would give every single American the freedom to care for their loved ones, heal from illnesses and recover after childbirth — without the fear of losing a paycheck or even being fired. And it'll do all that while _also_ boosting our economy.
Paid family leave just makes sense — and it's hugely popular with Democrats and Republicans alike. In fact, four in five Americans support the FAMILY Act, according to a new Navigator Poll. But I need your help to get this done in Congress.
**[_So please, will you sign on to my petition before midnight tonight to show your support for paid family leave? I'm counting on another 239 signatures tonight to prove voters are on board, so I'd be so grateful if you added yours._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65019971/412051063/1423499192?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4215-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWE1YzE3ZS1lOTBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZScwf7M7TupoVwRYomR1ZzPL9E3cDd3ZhYUcRjImxJM=&emci=fadf9974-a60b-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=5ea5c17e-e90d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)**
| | [SIGN ON NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65019972/412051070/1423499192?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4215-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWE1YzE3ZS1lOTBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZScwf7M7TupoVwRYomR1ZzPL9E3cDd3ZhYUcRjImxJM=&emci=fadf9974-a60b-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=5ea5c17e-e90d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)

Thank you so much,

Kirsten
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **K. Gillibrand**
Date: Fri, Jun 09, 2023
Subject: I was lucky
| | |
---
Friend, I gave birth to my second son, Henry, after putting in a 13-hour day on the floor of the House.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65019973/412051075/1423499192?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4215-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWE1YzE3ZS1lOTBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZScwf7M7TupoVwRYomR1ZzPL9E3cDd3ZhYUcRjImxJM=&emci=fadf9974-a60b-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=5ea5c17e-e90d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)
I was proud to work right up until the day I gave birth, but in the months after Henry was born, 13-hour days simply weren't possible. I needed time at home to recover and care for my newborn son. Luckily, as a congresswoman at the time, I had a job that allowed me to take the time I needed to care for myself and my family.
But the fact is, millions of Americans don't have the basic protection of paid leave. Instead, they're forced to make impossible decisions. No working American should have to choose between a paycheck and caring for a loved one, between their job security and taking the time to recover from a serious illness.

**We're the only industrialized nation in the world that fails to provide paid family leave. It's far past time that changes.**
That's why, ten years ago, I first introduced a bill to create guaranteed paid leave for _every single American_. Over the years, I've introduced this bill again and again, working hard to build coalitions and fight for progress.
**Just a few weeks ago, I raised this issue again. And to enact real change, I need grassroots Americans like you to stand with me.[Please, will you add your name to my petition before midnight tonight to show your support for paid family leave?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65019974/412051076/1423499192?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4215-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWE1YzE3ZS1lOTBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZScwf7M7TupoVwRYomR1ZzPL9E3cDd3ZhYUcRjImxJM=&emci=fadf9974-a60b-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=5ea5c17e-e90d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)**
| | [SIGN ON NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65019975/412051077/1423499192?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4215-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWE1YzE3ZS1lOTBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZScwf7M7TupoVwRYomR1ZzPL9E3cDd3ZhYUcRjImxJM=&emci=fadf9974-a60b-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=5ea5c17e-e90d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)
---
It's impossible to overstate just how truly transformative this legislation would be for working American families.
We need a comprehensive national paid leave program, providing workers with ample support for family or medical leave. Parents shouldn't have to decide between their paycheck and staying home with their sick child. Workers deserve job security, even if they need to take time off for themselves or care for a loved one.
But that's not all: Studies have shown over and over that paid family leave would actually _benefit_ our economy, making life better for _all_ of us.
**Paid leave should be a national priority. And I won't stop fighting until it becomes a reality.[Please, will you join me by adding your name to my petition before midnight tonight? I'm counting on 5,000 engaged Democrats to sign on, so your support here would mean so much.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65019976/412051078/1423499192?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4215-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWE1YzE3ZS1lOTBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZScwf7M7TupoVwRYomR1ZzPL9E3cDd3ZhYUcRjImxJM=&emci=fadf9974-a60b-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=5ea5c17e-e90d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)**

As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever.
