clean_body: Friend, it's Kirsten again. Apologies for the email on Father's Day, but I wanted to make sure that you saw my message about the FAMILY Act. (And what better way to celebrate the dads in our lives than by talking about paid family leave?). This legislation would be groundbreaking. By establishing a national paid family leave program, we would give every single American the freedom to care for their loved ones, heal from illnesses and recover after childbirth — without the fear of losing a paycheck or even being fired. And it'll do all that while also boosting our economy. Paid family leave just makes sense — and it's hugely popular with Democrats and Republicans alike. In fact, four in five Americans support the FAMILY Act, according to a new Navigator Poll. But I need your help to get this done in Congress. | | Thank you so much, Kirsten \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: K. Gillibrand Date: Fri, Jun 09, 2023 Subject: I was lucky | | | Friend, I gave birth to my second son, Henry, after putting in a 13-hour day on the floor of the House. I was proud to work right up until the day I gave birth, but in the months after Henry was born, 13-hour days simply weren't possible. I needed time at home to recover and care for my newborn son. Luckily, as a congresswoman at the time, I had a job that allowed me to take the time I needed to care for myself and my family. But the fact is, millions of Americans don't have the basic protection of paid leave. Instead, they're forced to make impossible decisions. No working American should have to choose between a paycheck and caring for a loved one, between their job security and taking the time to recover from a serious illness. We're the only industrialized nation in the world that fails to provide paid family leave. It's far past time that changes. That's why, ten years ago, I first introduced a bill to create guaranteed paid leave for every single American. Over the years, I've introduced this bill again and again, working hard to build coalitions and fight for progress. Just a few weeks ago, I raised this issue again. And to enact real change, I need grassroots Americans like you to stand with me. | | It's impossible to overstate just how truly transformative this legislation would be for working American families. We need a comprehensive national paid leave program, providing workers with ample support for family or medical leave. Parents shouldn't have to decide between their paycheck and staying home with their sick child. Workers deserve job security, even if they need to take time off for themselves or care for a loved one. But that's not all: Studies have shown over and over that paid family leave would actually benefit our economy, making life better for all of us. Paid leave should be a national priority. And I won't stop fighting until it becomes a reality. | | With gratitude and love, Kirsten | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Republicans tried to destroy Adam Schiff for holding an investigation into Trump. We need to respond.
body:
They’re out of control
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4cae2664-9436-4305-9a06-1fe7af98bdfc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

|

| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Last week, Republicans took their treason a step further--using the House to try to destroy Rep. Adam Schiff, by attempting to censure and fine him $16 million(!) for investigating Trump-Russia.[Thankfully, they failed.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8248665d-891b-42b2-bb83-30cd21a261d2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) ** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2d4b3635-c314-4166-99c9-74d1b45cca02/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _The sponsor of the censure attempt may be the biggest fraud in the House outside of George Santos. Anna Paulina Luna_ , _or as she was known until she decided to run for office in South Florida, Anna Mayerhofer. _ _**Luna **(or Mayerhofer)** was caught lying about an impoverished upbringing, a Jewish heritage, being the victim of a home invasion **and at least a half dozen other things. A failed Instagram model who likes performing & lacks a conscience, she found her place in the GOP House Caucus._ _Then there's Schiff.__ Former Chair of the House Intelligence Committee,__ he regularly destroyed Republican lies,__ i.e., why MAGA targeted him._ _**A House Impeachment Manager, he gave a summation that'll be taught in classes for years, and served on the Jan 6th Panel exposing Trump's treason.**_ **_Now Schiff's running for the Senate,_** _and Republicans are scared as hell, as h_ _e'll bring the much-needed fire to the Senate. _ [**_Will you join us in sending Adam Schiff, $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can, so this champion of democracy, Adam Schiff, can help lead the charge in the Senate for democracy and against MAGA Republican crime and treason?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcdaf0f12-7e39-449c-8765-f082b6b00a2d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks for making the Senate--and our democracy--stronger! Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Celebrating Black fathers this Father’s Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Father’s Day and Juneteenth | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvEbYkRPEOu08TVtVoDqGJy0pMNI-KhOr62HJMEifeFTaD5XCFHIyMRYSRSdhAaqBPKfbcS1NgxHM9K3atclIXcXMKc9JFtgavsgjcoDmpjCbYN1dDMBKhyurtNeEk_idKyLAXp6c6JsY7ZAFwBJPeDrAL2oM0SRk0o6swvEHFt0GwAu-6A4J7FnTyvF66qPVX/3x5/q3KiydOHTz-l-4YO0pg8Kg/h0/Zj7xZJnDfBElxBtdcsSkMGMVUxnpqxBHnpappCEAJlw)
---
Friend, This Father’s Day and with Juneteenth coming up tomorrow, let’s celebrate Black fathers. **I want to lift up Black Men Build, an organization for Black men to heal together, to transform, and to be in service to their communities and all Black People.** Local chapters across the country (including in my home city of Detroit!) run regular days of service like clothing drives and free meal distribution, mentorship sessions with high school boys around civic engagement, and Black Men’s Circles for vulnerable conversations. Phil Agnew, a community activist and one of the organization’s co-founders, has talked about observing right-wing movements trying to recruit Black men and spread misinformation. He wants to push back against attempts to further entrench sexism and misogyny—and instead support men who find strength in love and who can fight back against patriarchy, capitalism, and white supremacy. [**This Father’s Day, please donate to Black Men Build to celebrate Black fathers and men who are fighting the patriarchy and helping to create a society where communities have everything that they need.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKMPA82hiaW1_ethsWlhWJyj1UIbh96sJN_22BvgDywYiyctCPMEr7zzlf7hbXC4b4TtnIiLQl6E772EnSdjOkppRRrLqyN1gkosJICexsJJl9g25Dbytb0-Pg0NYw89jO3hTbXmC3fH_7Wb-rLKZKW0SxFBDU8aV2nAT3Kg1w4QDrOw1b-z83-9dah2Zq5t5xe3J9tzI48GuLkFDq67Kg0_VNbZ5a2Pg-Xz5aaua8XzmsXfjO9UkZhPDIOE5OEWEV3B8STpeX8S18yPd8eIDIxwuJQMTwoyW7lLS_GqYmVN7n-BIhqY2WQR2VO_6EONzJ__Z7CeO0qZBdeXH3T8iRvA/3x5/q3KiydOHTz-l-4YO0pg8Kg/h1/HMxiLCVtNVe8kEkqs0xYlkecbRtQiRGyPhbqIakP8Xk) | [DONATE TO BLACK MEN BUILD](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKMPA82hiaW1_ethsWlhWJykdbtXhQGcuvyKyTplhMb8-RIpLZOH69q_-JN360UTTHEPn0-NIaP8RgWbQlDYourzCEMx_4YBGUdajCuTOcTHHzF5W1W6UBkR7Y0jSTrWxXrHsd0a_lUEWT_mt5UD7SOfZABhROiiQXgw-Sx1s3roc84qK16wlalm8tqh1Tp35u6sYEy5phlGH-QyHWNlOKx1R7UXK-fvM8-m5KM-VywHr98hCev6N1ft76OT3UHQ2ndnRqz8qdN006SdxQpSgXujXtHujNrtY9JaWTztinpzI7W-hTXzl6okfwG5jsPzuNYt_zOaSAuvqV19Wk8ZXaLQ/3x5/q3KiydOHTz-l-4YO0pg8Kg/h2/TgkSCG5a0lnzakiNH7w6nPeAM28YiBR3hbVjRIj8iXU)

clean_body: Father’s Day and Juneteenth | | | Friend, This Father’s Day and with Juneteenth coming up tomorrow, let’s celebrate Black fathers. I want to lift up Black Men Build, an organization for Black men to heal together, to transform, and to be in service to their communities and all Black People. Local chapters across the country (including in my home city of Detroit!) run regular days of service like clothing drives and free meal distribution, mentorship sessions with high school boys around civic engagement, and Black Men’s Circles for vulnerable conversations. Phil Agnew, a community activist and one of the organization’s co-founders, has talked about observing right-wing movements trying to recruit Black men and spread misinformation. He wants to push back against attempts to further entrench sexism and misogyny—and instead support men who find strength in love and who can fight back against patriarchy, capitalism, and white supremacy. | I’m passionate about the world that Black Men Build is trying to create, with clean water, healthcare, education, and housing for all—where living a dignified life is not based on our ability to work and produce. We all deserve to live in freedom and with dignity. Toward freedom, Rashida Tlaib Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: John Fetterman
subject: Wishing yinz a happy Father’s Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
A quick message before I step away for the day.
#
Hi Derek, I’m here to wish yinz a Happy Father’s Day! 🎉
I’m so, so excited to spend some quality time with Karl, Gracie, and August — they remind me every day why I do this work. I am *SO* grateful to be their dad. 💛
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230618-1?refcode=em20230618-1-8416&refcode2=8416_434096_3q-ICn&akid=8416%2E434096%2E3q-ICn)
But before I step away for the day, I also want to take a moment to thank you for being on our team: your support means the world, Derek.
Thank you again,
John

name: VoteVets HQ
subject: Consequences
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
Trump’s proven a hundred times over that can’t be trusted with the levers of power.
#
Hi Derek —
If you’ve been here for a while, you know that VoteVets is a group of Veterans.
What you might not know is what would’ve happened if any of us treated classified material like Trump allegedly did after he left the White House.
The answer is pretty simple: We would’ve gone to prison. Do not pass go, do not collect $200. Prison.
Now, we’ll wait to see how this indictment goes — after all, everyone is innocent until proven guilty.
But we have to make sure we’re ready for any outcome. If Trump somehow makes it out of this a free man, we have to do everything we can to keep him out of the White House.
Trump’s proven a hundred times over that he can’t be trusted with the levers of power. So if you can afford it, please:
**[Donate $3, your first contribution to VoteVets, and we’ll put it towards our efforts to mobilize Veterans, persuade voters, and beat Trump.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-june23.FJK9fc&refcode=em230618-1-15&t=1&akid=10046%2E3013755%2ESQzhLK)**

name: Replace Sinema
subject: Black voter suppression
body:
Sinema stood in the way of passing substantive voting rights legislation | | | Peter – Did you hear?**** Last week, the U.S. Supreme Court granted a major - and surprise - victory for voting rights by striking down a racially discriminatory congressional map in Alabama. Experts say the court’s decision could reverberate in other states like Georgia, Florida, Louisiana, and Mississippi – places where Republicans have drawn maps to try to suppress Black voters and other voters of color. It was a surprise decision, because conservative justices like John Roberts and Brett Kavanaugh have long sided with Republican efforts to gut the Voting Rights Act – but this time, even they knew that Republicans had gone too far. What does this have to do with Kyrsten Sinema? Well, earlier this year, she bragged on stage - in front of a room full of billionaires in Davos - that she helped stop voting rights legislation, including the _John Lewis Act_ and the _Freedom to Vote Act_ that would have addressed gerrymandering and voter disenfranchisement. In short, she was all too happy to let Republicans continue their discriminatory, racist, anti-democracy campaign against voting rights. A GOP effort that had gone so far that even the conservative Supreme Court could see it was illegal. **Arizona deserves so much better. It’s time to stop the attacks on voting rights, and pass the _John Lewis Act_ and anti-gerrymandering legislation. That’s why we’ve endorsed Ruben Gallego. ****[_Chip in to Replace Sinema now >>_](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1Whlt2pgk2Ov9aOlRPwcDPBIINDjd8BQMQcaYy4uDyQoBsF5SVST978UsAQMGFVmb7ZkLwD2HvpXDFAqxM60EOwcdpj0jhopOhYKcRjRhYdrK_bjvx-VfGCVJe0Q21ldMOA6f4fvWgZrRwRy0TYbW6KHxPCiqh-lfOtY5hnArbssCNlotgXYcvccl5nRHXyEhBpZC7itlL4QKRKq_F73NdmEmWVs6Y5UOk_DHIJp0PxhBSq4gpZqRQyC21TShdeb3-c0SwvFOmcGiPUFYbW1D7gaCjX0dIc-v6hiSqMl8qA/3x5/RurtuuL9RAy0Hp4RnKxxiA/h0/uKPI0dFzkkFDjRh8Unq5snbTlhmafQzRXonmmSBGzNw) ** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953waPv-7AHDutruj8gJPtiQl2HRjM5wIWt-pLNbEtWClUao_nyiNkF4fON3PyhrJF0PEC1HwMtn3ItWDHeojMb4BbYure2WEQsItxgCut457PFJ0KT_-yEDH_MGlQJR38MCeN9cyDxwjXNhJay7WbrREBV28avldhi0FRWHtUDnRoUtqBx6jNQPEGEL_cWgrS9E3gZ6Ua_oohH28Bwkbz_VU_n5usd60IhcXaXwlWWY8QFSliISQtxSfqi9kXRJGzd8SAZ7CQbuYqUIiNtTonfj-c9EkBXIHx3UfyoifiVanwVZfPH05UdMl3V5S7OGzU2IN4w31UfE8MD26S6INP4ZL/3x5/RurtuuL9RAy0Hp4RnKxxiA/h1/TdDkNF77NwE68_--3hbRYvVQfTZoAohfHzozTkdDjM0)

All this could be preempted by federal action– but it was BLOCKED by the GOP’s filibuster, with the help of Kyrsten Sinema.
Then she actually bragged about it on an international stage, high-fiving Joe Manchin over their obstruction. Disgusting.

clean_body: Sinema stood in the way of passing substantive voting rights legislation | | | Peter – Did you hear?** Last week, the U.S. Supreme Court granted a major - and surprise - victory for voting rights by striking down a racially discriminatory congressional map in Alabama. Experts say the court’s decision could reverberate in other states like Georgia, Florida, Louisiana, and Mississippi – places where Republicans have drawn maps to try to suppress Black voters and other voters of color. It was a surprise decision, because conservative justices like John Roberts and Brett Kavanaugh have long sided with Republican efforts to gut the Voting Rights Act – but this time, even they knew that Republicans had gone too far. What does this have to do with Kyrsten Sinema? Well, earlier this year, she bragged on stage - in front of a room full of billionaires in Davos - that she helped stop voting rights legislation, including the John Lewis Act and the Freedom to Vote Act that would have addressed gerrymandering and voter disenfranchisement. In short, she was all too happy to let Republicans continue their discriminatory, racist, anti-democracy campaign against voting rights. A GOP effort that had gone so far that even the conservative Supreme Court could see it was illegal. Arizona deserves so much better. It’s time to stop the attacks on voting rights, and pass the John Lewis Act and anti-gerrymandering legislation. name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: Stand Against Chemical Abortion
body:
Chemical abortion is being touted by abortion activists as a “safe” and “pain-free” way to abort unborn children.

| [ ](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zujr3r54kr62mpb1de0g6s8hnkjmn1tse6oc5aqo_rp22sh2s8i66o77chi6apr4cjh2bs)
---
#
Hello Friend,

As proud Americans, we stand for our values of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. However, in recent years, the** **[**sanctity of life has been under attack, particularly through the proliferation of chemical abortions.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z17dph3pttqdmt15ojm4klp1rv6aihqi6355j3f0_rp22sh2s8i66o77chi6apr4cjh2bs)

Chemical abortion is being touted by abortion activists as a "safe" and "pain-free" way to abort unborn children. The reality is that chemical abortion not only takes the life of an innocent child, but also poses grave risks to a mother's health.

For mothers, chemical abortion can cause serious health problems, including heavy bleeding, infection, and even death. Moreover, the safety of this procedure has been called into question in recent years due to the rising number of incidences of incomplete abortion, ectopic pregnancy, and other complications.

For unborn children, chemical abortion means grisly death. The drugs used in this procedure are designed to stop the heart of the developing fetus, leading to its expulsion from the womb. This callous disregard for the sanctity of human life is a tragedy that we must do all we can to prevent.

We must make sure that mothers have the truth about what chemical abortion is and the effects it can have on their health. [**Will you step forward and pledge to stand against abortion?**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6bot8r2tmljn6o899v6h2p3j6v4e5q3ecmquu5g_rp22sh2s8i66o77chi6apr4cjh2bs)

By signing this pledge, you will be joining more than 1 million concerned citizens who are taking a stand against this barbaric practice and urging lawmakers to enact legislation that protects life at all levels of government.

We need your voice to help us put pressure on lawmakers to draft and pass laws that protect the unborn and their mothers from the dangers of chemical abortion. Sign the pledge here: **[https://action.sbaprolife.org/chemical-abortion-pledge](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zbra0evfj8fbap1otkfscpc6o4ek6dmljo453v2o_rp22sh2s8i66o77chi6apr4cjh2bs)**

Please don't wait to make your voice heard. Join us today and let's fight for life together.

Sincerely,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, 2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr., PO Box 803, Arlington, VA, 22206

Deroy Murdock

name: Angela (personal)
subject: My wonderful, wise, dedicated dad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=154%2E52803%2E4XINrd)

| | [](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2564?t=9&amount=25&akid=154%2E52803%2E4XINrd) Happy Father’s Day, team! A lot of folks tell me I’m just like my father... and I tell them, “I hope you’re right!” My dad, James, is a wonderful, dedicated, wise, kind, and compassionate man. He’s always ready with a little wisdom or a clever observation. But as quick as he is with a word of advice, he’s also always eager to lend an ear or a helping hand. He’s taught me that often, you get more out of listening than talking; that it’s okay to not understand everything, as long as we’re willing to learn; and that our actions make us who we are, not our words. My dad is my original supporter, and I wouldn’t be where I am today without his guidance and love. The lessons he’s taught me have made me a better mom to Alex, a more effective public servant, and most of all, a more compassionate, understanding person. I’ll carry those lessons with me on every step of this journey. Here’s to celebrating all of the great fathers and father figures in our lives today. Happy Father’s Day from my family to yours! With love, Angela Alsobrooks

clean_body: | | | Happy Father’s Day, team! A lot of folks tell me I’m just like my father... and I tell them, “I hope you’re right!” My dad, James, is a wonderful, dedicated, wise, kind, and compassionate man. He’s always ready with a little wisdom or a clever observation. But as quick as he is with a word of advice, he’s also always eager to lend an ear or a helping hand. He’s taught me that often, you get more out of listening than talking; that it’s okay to not understand everything, as long as we’re willing to learn; and that our actions make us who we are, not our words. My dad is my original supporter, and I wouldn’t be where I am today without his guidance and love. The lessons he’s taught me have made me a better mom to Alex, a more effective public servant, and most of all, a more compassionate, understanding person. I’ll carry those lessons with me on every step of this journey. Here’s to celebrating all of the great fathers and father figures in our lives today. Happy Father’s Day from my family to yours! With love, Angela Alsobrooks | | | | We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, | | | | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please click . | Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate Alsobrooks for Senate PO Box 6058 Largo, MD 20792

name: Josh Shapiro
subject: My favorite job
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
Derek, I’m proud to have been elected by the people of Pennsylvania to do the job of being your Governor. But my favorite job? That’s being a dad.

Derek, I’m proud to have been elected by the people of Pennsylvania to do the job of being your Governor.

**But my favorite job? That’s being a dad.**

The greatest blessing of my life is being a dad to our four kids, and they guide me in everything I do.

I want my kids and every kid in Pennsylvania to know belong here, no matter what they look like, who they love, where they come from or who they do or do not pray to.

I want my kids and every kid in Pennsylvania to have access to the best schools and be supported from the day they’re born and when they enter the workforce.

I want my kids and every kid in Pennsylvania to inherit a livable planet where we’ve tackled the biggest threats of climate change.

**I want my kids and every kid in Pennsylvania to have access to real opportunity and real freedom – and that’s what I’m fighting for every day. If you agree that we must always fight for a better world for our children, I hope you’ll chip in and join me.** | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65021342/412056385/-1388000118?refcode=email_061823_fathers-day&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzk3ZTk2NS1lZDBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X8Z1aTObkdCJIOKRrWcu0vqN6X9t1UyufBP_W9ikMLk=)

name: Susan Daggett
subject: Happy Father's Day!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
Hi team,
First of all: Happy Father’s Day!
No job is more important to Michael than being a great father to our daughters.
And since today also happens to be National Go Fishing Day, I told Michael I would handle the fundraising — so he could spend time doing what he loves most with our girls.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=x_061823_FathersDay_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=x_061823_FathersDay_act]
One of Michael’s top priorities is supporting Colorado’s working families. He’s fought hard to expand the Child Tax Credit, invest money back into our schools, and improve health care for families.
This is crucial work — but it can only continue if we keep our majority in the Senate and take back the House.
Michael and his team have set an ambitious fundraising goal for this quarter. The deadline is just a few weeks away, and they still need $9,583 to get there. Can you help Michael keep fighting for Colorado’s families by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=x_061823_FathersDay_act]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Michael Bennet will go through immediately:

clean_body: Hi team, First of all: Happy Father’s Day! No job is more important to Michael than being a great father to our daughters. And since today also happens to be National Go Fishing Day, I told Michael I would handle the fundraising — so he could spend time doing what he loves most with our girls. [] One of Michael’s top priorities is supporting Colorado’s working families. He’s fought hard to expand the Child Tax Credit, invest money back into our schools, and improve health care for families. This is crucial work — but it can only continue if we keep our majority in the Senate and take back the House. Michael and his team have set an ambitious fundraising goal for this quarter. The deadline is just a few weeks away, and they still need $9,583 to get there. Can you help Michael keep fighting for Colorado’s families by chipping in now? [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Michael Bennet will go through immediately: DONATE $10 [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] OTHER AMOUNT [] DONATE $10 [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] OTHER AMOUNT [] May you and your loved ones have a wonderful Father’s Day! Thank you for your support. — Susan PS . You can still purchase an “ I caught a fish! ” shirt in the store [] if you too are celebrating today by fishing! name: Geoff Simpson
subject: Let’s talk about AIPAC
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Something sinister is taking place. AIPAC and their allies are targeting
and trying to intimidate Black and Brown women candidates across the
country, threatening to spend against them if they even slightly criticize
Israel's far-right, apartheid policies.

A new billionaire-backed Super PAC is targeting and spending heavily
against a progressive City Councilwoman in Brooklyn, New York. Another
candidate in Arizona is being attacked for voting against a bill that
identifies criticism of Israel's government as antisemitic.

AIPAC is a right-wing group. They supported Donald Trump, endorsed 106
insurrection Republicans, and spent millions to defeat progressives such
as Jessica Cisneros and Summer Lee.

Let’s be clear: AIPAC has lost the public opinion battle, all they have
left is threats and the ability to spend big against progressives who
speak out in support of Palestinian human rights. And spending money
against a candidate who doesn’t even have an opponent clearly escalates
their threats.

We have no other option but to fight back against AIPAC, support our
incumbents who are taking brave stances in support of Palestinian human
rights, and recruit and elect even more candidates who will do the same.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/135035?refcode=em20230618-29482&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=29482%2E1203867%2EWy_uj5 ]We wouldn’t be reaching out to ask if it wasn’t crucial for the future
of Justice Democrats and our candidates. Will you rush a $3
contribution right now to help us fight back against AIPAC?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/135035?refcode=em20230618-29482&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=29482%2E1203867%2EWy_uj5 ]Contribute $3

No matter what, thank you for being a part of this team.

Geoff Simpson

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you're struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1021&akid=29482%2E1203867%2EWy_uj5 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1022&akid=29482%2E1203867%2EWy_uj5 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230618-29482-footer&t=1023&refcode2=29482_1203867_Wy_uj5&akid=29482%2E1203867%2EWy_uj5

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=29482%2E1203867%2EWy_uj5

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Barbara Grassley
subject: Nobody works harder than Chuck
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc
body:
The Grassley Roots Run Deep

| Friend, On Father's Day, if there's one thing you need to know about my husband, Chuck Grassley, it's that he works and works and works. As the father of our five children, he wakes up thinking about the day's work ahead and how to squeeze every minute out of every day. No one sees his extraordinary work ethic firsthand like I do. Every morning he wakes up early and puts in a 12-hour-plus day on Capitol Hill or when holding his annual 99 county meetings across the state. That's how Iowa farmers work. I'm proud to stand shoulder to shoulder with Chuck to serve Iowa and our country. Nobody works harder, and nobody is more dedicated to service than Chuck. [**Can you pitch in to help my husband keep fighting for you?**](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=53079b37b1904f8ca46628fc2e9548bb&_e=lZAJRfAVY2kELe53LEsfGPnIDY9amvGepgjUtHm3ghBM3ypNJ8O9lp3b2oMJmP-DYfeNRLtcCaY0xz-daw2NVkYffXOC9qgFTvfGyx_pPhkrkClX0OL0gkROzV-HRz9cxKZVt5XWFL630sMkqAmQmPH5uunzgCGGPChgJZD5p9xOjN6BHzpwL2duuxuKL48BpwUw6phU3ZfRYPN6znT3iWm741FoEuoU6Fb6xrOJGzcR9wVF2dDoBVa4PZ-OUdfGdh_eIpm7wOY_HKBVgqEH6r1q2YZzw3Gys7IkUy4FZRU%3D)
| [**SUPPORT CHUCK!**](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=53079b37b1904f8ca46628fc2e9548bb&_e=lZAJRfAVY2kELe53LEsfGPnIDY9amvGepgjUtHm3ghBM3ypNJ8O9lp3b2oMJmP-DYfeNRLtcCaY0xz-daw2NVkYffXOC9qgFTvfGyx_pPhkrkClX0OL0gkROzV-HRz9c4CYBj7hyA_1nKpolEk4Eq6U5jWushaB8F6nlrAQ8Xv4CTkkR51N4AkmVZZ_uhL2uap9GjGA5VwrUhKWU7lp9eMtc4psfk58VExm3IjPc11RSGksIlpc-h-lfzSq9zRB7fqiGtzsCwdvXj92MJ29M2NpUHuKJiMfeetfGlGn1c0A%3D)
---

There is no one I trust more than my husband -- he learned his work ethic on the farm and the factory floor. **Chuck has taken these lessons and brought them to the United States Senate, where he has an unmatched record of delivering results.**
Family means everything to me and my husband. We're grateful for your support. I hope you see all the grit and integrity in Chuck that I see every day.
**On this Father 's Day, we will celebrate Chuck with our family. You can be sure ice cream is on the menu. >From the Grassley family to your family, we wish you all a Happy Father's Day. **
God Bless,
Barbara Grassley
Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc.

name: Mike Thompson
subject: Happy Father’s Day
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress unsubscribe: https://support
body:
# [#]
Peter,Father's Day is a time when we honor and celebrate the incredible role fathers play in our lives. It is a day to express our gratitude, love, and appreciation for all the ways they have shaped us into the people we are today.

On this special day, let’s acknowledge their immense contributions and create lasting memories as we celebrate the remarkable fathers in our lives.

Happy Father’s Day,

Mike Thompson

name: The Casey Family
subject: Celebrating our dad
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Happy Father’s Day
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=167%2E552475%2EH7_lrN)
Hi Peter, it’s Elyse, Caroline, Julia, and Marena.
In honor of Father’s Day, we want to take a minute to celebrate our amazing dad.
Whether it was coaching our basketball games, coming up with the most elaborate bedtime stories, or being the constant cameraman for all our home videos, he always showed up for us with love, joy, and compassion (and an endless supply of dad jokes).
But we feel especially lucky to have a dad whose compassion extends beyond our family. Our dad cares deeply not just about us and our future but also the future of individuals and families across our state and country. He cares about lowering costs for working families, advocating for seniors and people with disabilities, investing in our children and their futures, ensuring our communities are safe, and so much more.
Happy Father’s Day to all the dads and father figures across Pennsylvania.
—The Casey Family

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=167%2E552475%2EH7_lrN)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=167%2E552475%2EH7_lrN)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

name: Karen Bass
subject: re: why I was proud to join the Biden-Harris National Advisory Board last month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
In order to get the job done, Joe and Kamala need the support of this grassroots team. | | |
---
Peter, Growing up in Los Angeles during the Civil Rights Movement, I saw Americans risk everything for equality -- and witnessed true community activism drive change. That sparked my lifelong commitment to fighting for social and economic justice -- first as a U.S. congresswoman, and now, as mayor of my hometown. No matter where I went, I knew I wanted to be a part of the solution, and I know my friend Joe Biden shares the same commitment. It’s why I was proud to join the Biden-Harris campaign’s National Advisory Board last month. And it’s why I’m going to do everything I can to make sure Joe and Kamala serve for four more years in the White House and continue building a better America. **But it'll take all of us coming together to finish the job. clean_body: In order to get the job done, Joe and Kamala need the support of this grassroots team. | | | Peter, Growing up in Los Angeles during the Civil Rights Movement, I saw Americans risk everything for equality -- and witnessed true community activism drive change. That sparked my lifelong commitment to fighting for social and economic justice -- first as a U.S. congresswoman, and now, as mayor of my hometown. No matter where I went, I knew I wanted to be a part of the solution, and I know my friend Joe Biden shares the same commitment. It’s why I was proud to join the Biden-Harris campaign’s National Advisory Board last month. And it’s why I’m going to do everything I can to make sure Joe and Kamala serve for four more years in the White House and continue building a better America. But it'll take all of us coming together to finish the job. So I’m asking: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | The Biden-Harris administration has delivered for America’s cities at an unprecedented level -- on infrastructure, the environment, economic recovery, and so much more. As the mayor of our country’s second-most populous city, I know that their partnership will be vital to getting our cities moving on homelessness, public safety, affordability, and in ensuring every resident is treated equally and has an equal shot at success. But in order to get the job done, Joe and Kamala need the support of this grassroots team. So I’m asking once more: Thanks for all you do, Karen Bass Mayor, Los Angeles

name: GOP Presidential
subject: Former Home Depot CEO issues dire warning for Americans
body:
Something strange is happening in our financial system.

| Dear Reader, Something strange is happening in our financial system. According to analysts at UBS, more than 50,000 retail locations could shut their doors in the months ahead. Already, Walmart, Foot Locker, Bed Bath & Beyond, and Macy’s are cutting stores. And former Home Depot CEO Bob Nardelli recently issued a grim warning:
> "We’re going to see a lot of bankruptcies. [This is] different than anything I have seen in my 52 years..."
What does it all mean for your family and your money? Dr. Nomi Prins has dug deeper into the research, and she’s found something startling. Amid all the turmoil predicted by Nardeni and UBS, Prins has found a single firm that could be the canary in the coal mine foreshadowing the next major crisis in America. All it takes is one look at this troubling chart to see why - [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z92s2hpe4mv87a11crt1b2qhgdn0uohm6tejdvt8_rp22sh2s8i66o77chh60oj4c3h2bs) Dr. Prins says:
> ** "This chart tells you everything you need to know about the next crisis in America. In short, what we’re about to see is a currency crisis - but not the kind of currency crisis most folks expect. This firm - along with many others - will almost certainly go bankrupt as a result." **
According to Dr. Prins, our money is about to change forever... and the overhaul is set to happen in just a few weeks. To help folks prepare, she’s recorded a briefing that explains all the details of what she calls a 'reset' to our financial system. In it, she lays out all the evidence of this currency crisis, and what you can do to prepare. [Click here now to see her full (and free) presentation.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5m4f1eugb0fgqercp3jlg9g0c4rqg7u5442mft8_rp22sh2s8i66o77chh60oj4c3h2bs) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar transformations to our money, folks who failed to prepare were blindsided. But those who moved their money beforehand had the opportunity to multiply their nest-egg as a result. [Click here to see why.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmducp2vesftbor1ff7be6ssl106rmdd11u15gv8_rp22sh2s8i66o77chh60oj4c3h2bs)

| | Georgia’s a hub for electric vehicle production. It’s becoming a booming industry and creating thousands of good-paying jobs thanks to the leadership of Senator Reverend Warnock and Senator Ossoff.

**_But Donald Trump said he’d “end” the electric vehicle industry in Georgia on day one._**

At the Georgia GOP convention, Donald Trump went on the attack against electric vehicles, despite how important the industry is for Georgians and for the battle against climate change.

If we want to keep growing Georgia’s economy, fighting climate change, and creating more good-paying jobs, then we have to stop Donald Trump from returning to the Oval Office.

[**_Will you pitch in whatever you can to help us defeat Donald Trump and keep President Biden and Democrats’ green economic boom going?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65023806/412065924/710125701?refcode=20230618.1_PSU_6AB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWY0OGY1Ny1mNjBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=02xrvLeBA3dqvUXMfHAOm4CZl7EZGvuJERKH4BMRrxA=)**_

Donald Trump will put all our economic progress at risk if he’s elected next year. So let’s stop him NOW.

Thank you,

GA Dems

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Father’s Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
Hi Peter, it’s Lucas.
Happy Father’s Day to all the dads and grandpas out there, including mine! 🙂
Before Marilyn and I head over to Children’s Mercy for some baby Harvey time, I wanted to send you a quick note about Father’s Day.
When medical bills bankrupted my family growing up, my dad battled every day to provide for and protect us. Like too many Missourians, he sacrificed his American dream to give us kids the chance to have our own — and sadly, not much has changed since then.
While politicians like Josh Hawley obsess over what they think it means to be a man, they completely fail to give this generation of fathers — and mothers, and anyone who works for a living — the support they need to take care of their families and themselves.
The last couple of weeks have been an especially good reminder of that.
We deserve to live in a state where people like you and me can have kids and afford to take care of our families afterwards without the fear of being burdened by medical debt.
We deserve to live in a state where our children can live and thrive for generations — with strong communities, opportunities, and good pay.
And we deserve leaders who will fight to make that happen rather than spending their time writing books about “manhood” and telling everyone else how to live rather than supporting us as we decide for ourselves.
**That’s why I’m running for Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat — for a better future for my kids AND for yours.**
Thank you so much for being on my team, Peter. I hope you get to spend some time with your loved ones today.
Happy Father’s Day,
— Lucas

subject: Stephen Moore: To Reduce Airline Ticket Prices, ExpandWashington’s Reagan Airport

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: We’re exposing lies that kill unborn babies
body:
What Big Abortion won't tell Americans will kill precious children.

| [ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2f09093edfaf4f669f7ab9c0e5be1ba6&_e=X9a6wypgVFCor_uz1cwzpkt7jW-mU_CiGeinG5NO-BspEwBxES8rh65kr5WrC5Kf10UYuY1JpfEiXPjLpbk23xHH0UibMd5Xo_L-K6Qqjr1pSV3MHANigOHhPvtvxw0TjJIYOv95eE_mKU8flpPVmStbGUlm84tNraBXST-n_ZGRd_vdH5ESUxtV6lqYrEPseGaareE5THK4jvCL9P5ACJhKLh0ZT8dRc07vK8mn1OP9gHw4vLagqbIoWz5PkSo0JXyiOAlyK9W7HbeCTXKwvW8HgQ88NJ9esMwJbNx0epl2gEYnr6jOt83oT6a3yc-LYUsaH4zlWYzpJaINa9ZPTM243Wl-1GTOIMxysHqlbHJWaRX7HPQeXWp36cdIBr52WnJRJ3ls18LsN4Se2glLNg%3D%3D)
---
#
Friend,

What Big Abortion won't tell Americans will kill precious children.

Knowledge gaps. Lies. Distortion. Shoddy reporting. These kill unborn babies. But until the deception is exposed the killing won't stop.

That's why I invite you to learn the truth in our eye-opening new ebook [_**Five Things the Public Doesn 't Know About Abortion.**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2f09093edfaf4f669f7ab9c0e5be1ba6&_e=X9a6wypgVFCor_uz1cwzpkt7jW-mU_CiGeinG5NO-BspEwBxES8rh65kr5WrC5Kf10UYuY1JpfEiXPjLpbk23xHH0UibMd5Xo_L-K6Qqjr1pSV3MHANigOHhPvtvxw0TjJIYOv95eE_mKU8flpPVmStbGUlm84tNraBXST-n_ZGRd_vdH5ESUxtV6lqYrEPseGaareE5THK4jvCL9P5ACJhKLh0ZT8dRc07vK8mn1OP9gHw4vLagqbIoWz5PkSo0IC6NlilJnjB3rR-V-XT9XX2gSMM6UIhTArsCFE1MmzXmWNdtIvM6YOB39GYk_82RLZdrS-hB3jkVl5Cm1fAi3Oan19XaLF6JPTSzjrMMzxoHySU81oRhW8Rhj3cT49y3hT3BGSqGsQfcacTCfqh0bQ%3D%3D)

This brief, hard-hitting, fact-filled ebook is free. I urge you--as a pro-life American--to download it now and get the truth.

Scholars from SBA Pro-Life America's research arm the Charlotte Lozier Institute to reveal FIVE FACTS about abortion. **[These realities are currently being concealed or ignored](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2f09093edfaf4f669f7ab9c0e5be1ba6&_e=X9a6wypgVFCor_uz1cwzpkt7jW-mU_CiGeinG5NO-BspEwBxES8rh65kr5WrC5Kf10UYuY1JpfEiXPjLpbk23xHH0UibMd5Xo_L-K6Qqjr1pSV3MHANigOHhPvtvxw0TjJIYOv95eE_mKU8flpPVmStbGUlm84tNraBXST-n_ZGRd_vdH5ESUxtV6lqYrEPseGaareE5THK4jvCL9P5ACJhKLh0ZT8dRc07vK8mn1OP9gHw4vLagqbIoWz5PkSo0FAzb47IW8hZrmjelznwkVRXgCrTUhO2UfNlM2cSc2XZOit5wtrA6z5tZJb4MQCOwbry3O57jFAczJLlDebdy5L46y19RqhPHhyE6i8cJf6aapGvoCsovNrxTCro7MVoTZt1oBCfUPAPqUqFflvfWMQ%3D%3D)** by government agencies and the industry of Big Abortion.

That's why we're blowing the whistle--and letting you in on it. We're telling allies in federal and state governments, the media, and the American people because everyone deserves to know the truth. The truths revealed in this ebook can set women free and save unborn babies.

I'm thrilled to send you the new eBook _**Five Things the Public Doesn 't Know About Abortion.**_ You can start reading your eBook by clicking this link:

**[https://action.sbaprolife.org/five-things-ebook](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2f09093edfaf4f669f7ab9c0e5be1ba6&_e=X9a6wypgVFCor_uz1cwzpkt7jW-mU_CiGeinG5NO-BspEwBxES8rh65kr5WrC5Kf10UYuY1JpfEiXPjLpbk23xHH0UibMd5Xo_L-K6Qqjr1pSV3MHANigOHhPvtvxw0TjJIYOv95eE_mKU8flpPVmStbGUlm84tNraBXST-n_ZGRd_vdH5ESUxtV6lqYrEPseGaareE5THK4jvCL9P5ACJhKLh0ZT8dRc07vK8mn1OP9gHw4vLagqbIoWz5PkSo0X6BhLtzie6jw-7HvFVdDnGAldQSdGil2XnSPMTk4JC61ZFBJltBUhPUnQJa_iSHr1DO2GI4ltpO-DOTvw6V-K8kyA-itsBGZWZQQ6Px0JOxw_XGngGoFARKekcrvqTgF90gbDTaCxukKiQ-crYKgXw%3D%3D)**

Thank you for your support. You are helping save lives and redeem the future of America.

For _LIFE_ ,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, 2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr., PO Box 803, Arlington, VA, 22206

Defend the Constitution

| | We need your input, Peter. name: Alex Padilla
subject: My dad, Santos
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
His hard work and loyalty to his family inspire me every day
#

Hello and Happy Father’s Day!
I'm inspired by the spirit of today to share a little more about my dad Santos.
You've probably seen him standing by me during many milestones – celebrating with Angela and me on election night, cheering our three boys on at little league games, and on an occasional social media post. But what you may not know is just how big of an example he set for me.
[](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-june23.Jo0i-7&refcode=em230618-1-30&t=1&akid=1356%2E159979%2ENrBfKi)
_My dad and me enjoying pozole._
My dad came to the United States from Mexico with only an elementary school education, but he came with big dreams of a better life and an incredible work ethic to achieve them. He started working as a dishwasher before moving up to head cook at Dupar's, a legendary Los Angeles diner. After working in a hot kitchen for forty years, from Dupar's to Patys in Toluca Lake, _he's most proud of the fact that his kitchen never failed an inspection._
As a father of three growing boys and your U.S. Senator, my dad's hard work and commitment to family inspire me every day. I couldn't begin to estimate how many pancakes my dad flipped or how any eggs he scrambled to provide for our family. Seeing him head out to work each day before sunrise without complaint inspires me to work as hard as I can to ensure the American Dream remains in reach for working families.
**It’s not an exaggeration to say that my parents and the values they instilled in me have everything to do with me serving in the U.S. Senate, and I proudly bring their perspective with me every day.**
[](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-june23.Jo0i-7&refcode=em230618-1-30&t=2&akid=1356%2E159979%2ENrBfKi)
_My dad and me in his kitchen._
As I think about our work to combat climate change and protect our environment, I channel my father's love of the ocean and marine life — after all he's from Puerto Vallarta!
As I fight to raise the minimum wage, I think about the hard work and dedication it took my mother and father to raise three children on the wages of a cook and a housekeeper.
And as I fight to guarantee health care as a human right, I think about how we were able to see a doctor because my father belonged to a union. And how anxious we were when the restaurant went non-union and health benefits were the first ones to go.
So today I’m grateful for my father’s love, and for his great example. He continues to inspire me every day, as a father myself and as your United States Senator.
Thanks for reading, and Happy Father’s Day!
Alex
_👋🏽 Before you go! 👋🏽_

Alex Padilla is the son of immigrants, and California’s first Latino U.S. Senator. Now, he’s working hard to ensure that ALL Americans can achieve the American Dream — no matter where they were born or what neighborhood they live in.

[**Can you please make a $3 donation to support Alex? We’ve got a big FEC deadline at the end of this month, and we’re counting on grassroots supporters like you to help hit our goals and ensure we have the resources to support Democrats in California and across the country.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-june23.Jo0i-7&refcode=em230618-1-30&t=3&akid=1356%2E159979%2ENrBfKi) **[DONATE $3](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-june23.Jo0i-7&refcode=em230618-1-30&amount=3&t=4&akid=1356%2E159979%2ENrBfKi)**
---

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=1356%2E159979%2ENrBfKi)

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Today's Sermon: The Gay & Trans Agenda w/Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
body:
Today's Sermon On Friday, I announced I was taking our church where few churches would dare to go by addressing the Gay & Trans Agenda in America. L
| | [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22994844.12820.1.916866fde607b3d47087f7b0ddd945c0) |
---
## Today's Sermon
---
On Friday, I announced I was taking our church where few churches would dare to go by addressing the **Gay & Trans Agenda** in America. Last night in **Tulsa** something like we have never seen took place. Instead of a tornado coming through which carves a path of destruction in a town or city, the **entire** Tulsa Metro was hit with destructive **winds over 100mph** and the vast majority of the city lost power. It was as if the enemy did not want a certain message being broadcast out from Tulsa... Fortunately, we had power at [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22994844.12821.1.869d1250e904b84285dc2f07b073bc8d) for both our 9 & 11am services even though the businesses around us did not. However, our internet service was _unavailable_ and our services were not streamed live. Thankfully the services were recorded since we had power and the message is now available to be seen across America. Here is today's message: **[The Gay& Trans Agenda In America](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22994844.12822.1.829c3ecf46b92b8d278070983159427e)** Watch here: [https://youtu.be/U-Rkn14_hGM](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22994844.12823.1.01a3fc78b77ffb181b895b942e2abd2b) Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22994844.12824.1.362978563b359837c15e60802bdd5a4a), GAB, [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22994844.12825.1.a2e138358c098014adaf407088f2c0f0), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22994844.12826.1.41e0da6e105782f27ef74782b7b6e054), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22994844.12827.1.cb69174860e2ee197f8efaf44520a2f3), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22994844.12828.1.0fdc2844b6d5cf5f381e0841f049f2e7), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22994844.12829.1.4bdb93304c8e0003664f6ff0d9f96a9b)). [www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22994844.12830.1.216d0a46f3b363bf9aa53f2d77dd0af2)

## The Book Of Daniel
---

We just launched a NEW mid-week series at [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22994844.12833.1.badfdbca044ed00bc6bc8a90cf1a6016) over the [Book of Daniel](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22994844.12834.1.74eede6b4bff23c66f42a2e7275f835a).
We will go **verse by verse** through Daniel every Wednesday at 7pm CT at our Tulsa campus.

name: Tennessee Democratic Party
subject: Andy Ogles has gone too far

Peter, Happy Father’s Day to every Dad out there who has had a hand in raising and shaping the next generation. I owe a lot to my Dad who taught me and my two sisters that when the going gets tough, _the tough get going_. Thank you, Dad. And, now, I have to shout out my husband, Matt Barr, who is also lucky enough to raise some mighty little women. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65035520/412078130/-64780103?contactdata=jemQJlnbPqy/DS/uaoUl+0w+0mV7lTPyyw7n3dx2Zk7OshwRp8dHI9s8KgwrGQXkujzHSVJcMmbC+qqcsVm85VeiVXbfWFXto/JswPHNMZsEck/mD0atUFXay/ok7sTaK2ebtjiZN6T7SXFoCaJY4nmFiSNORmJc0vTfzsK6kgA=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTI4Zjk0NWYtMDEwZS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KpKYXs46bBFcZ2rDvjew7EvYClkVKxZKvXS8cERN6Ac=&emci=028989af-930d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=e28f945f-010e-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9697413)

Having kids together will put your partner in a completely different light. I can now also confidently say the same is true of running for office.
While Matt was in the Marine Corps, I held down the fort at home.
Now, I'm the one on the road for the campaign, and Matt's the one holding down the home front – and teaching our girls to be great fisherwomen. Yes, fisherwomen.
**I couldn't take on this challenge without his endless support. And so it would mean so much to me to acknowledge him in a big way.**
[So, Peter, can you take a moment to sign our Father's Day card to Matt? I'd love to give him an EXTRA big thank you this year.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65035521/412078131/-64780103?contactdata=jemQJlnbPqy/DS/uaoUl+0w+0mV7lTPyyw7n3dx2Zk7OshwRp8dHI9s8KgwrGQXkujzHSVJcMmbC+qqcsVm85VeiVXbfWFXto/JswPHNMZsEck/mD0atUFXay/ok7sTaK2ebtjiZN6T7SXFoCaJY4nmFiSNORmJc0vTfzsK6kgA=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTI4Zjk0NWYtMDEwZS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KpKYXs46bBFcZ2rDvjew7EvYClkVKxZKvXS8cERN6Ac=&emci=028989af-930d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=e28f945f-010e-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9697413)

name: Cori Bush
subject: RE: My father’s pro-Black activism
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
I grew up learning about Black history and Black role models who challenged the status quo. | |
---
Peter, This Father’s Day and the day before Juneteenth, **I’m grateful for my father’s ongoing support and his pro-Black activism. He’s been right there beside me, believing in me and in a better world.** My father taught me the meaning of public service, which is why I’m in Congress to truly serve people. On the streets during the Ferguson Uprising as a community health nurse, I became an activist and was then asked to run for Congress. The uprising upended political complacency in this country and across the world, bringing racial justice to the forefront of public conversations. That multi-racial, multi-generational movement transformed what we thought was possible for our communities. And I continue to bring that bold vision to Congress, to serve people who’ve struggled under oppressive systems. **I know that together, we have the power to bring about the change our lives depend on.** [**Can you donate today to help carry on the struggle for liberation and racial justice, as we dismantle white supremacy together?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wo00NtbdwdeVt8sTYEy1O-mUkJ_W5U2lxgzZgDf6SumRLELS7mAXlm3yZ2kpizAn36St3YD-0nVX4wpEolhKkU7YplfOthQoFtWnbt8dWBFDXVTuPex3PDffSn72iDXb270jGHP4JXa_5pBzjcoBaRG9PhhSKgVmmOIpXhs2fR0MP2SNxdN5gpZ6KdrGu9r-d3KHhuJnNZXvlkBedyu_Rs5u4qHyu6i1m04kQzeVe7auUw0_Uf5IXrkLUpmZw0Wp1fVTGqf1ejlRQwmr-CPzf8-YFDymozeqqtWnQXdarWRoLSl6mvjLWN46hq4SYT_p4/3x5/jb41j7A1RS6StAlbV7Ddvg/h0/ZBZRrNeCaUUR0iPZc1tokXs_t1MqjuPJuI6ghgi2iHY)****[****](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wo00NtbdwdeVt8sTYEy1O-mUkJ_W5U2lxgzZgDf6SumRo21q_8TqLVIYmmsZ8zujcki0y5AJXyi7YIe_4cyIFq6iLyAOk7Mu02Rdbyd959XJoqTBRBIG7--S4giIHZ0Wg_LfYJw-3_wG3rCp5Ndq-LEOrMOkeD2BdDVkYA2n7dSzZtr5B8C-_fS7l8ZqoXHLbnkUXNi43wDfsM4X_SaD--K1w8JAIL54uBlUS2nUF6hOelxk2qHCS1B9JWxdze-8aaNm_VXq7nu5M3uTVFtk1qnP1ir4bhlmy8ahV55NJe64F8TPmEzh4IidLmfucOPl0/3x5/jb41j7A1RS6StAlbV7Ddvg/h1/aamBJePr2NbHgV6jUODswIPggSus5HS2V78IC3n2f_c)**** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wo00NtbdwdeVt8sTYEy1O-CDwxc3G7QTiQ3VIWJuNXpavuRP69yRp5-TUrsOZtDQa4XGf6haRxpMeH5xbPnXsX3OioWgAiZXltMakeoQWyWYhTP2-fjYqtscJ7sWmNNrU8mtCFT4YYJwPxCfuH0cAMHaQk5ly0vZLMEw2oRPfRjcMXw29TOf51okVCOIpgZ9TVC-5F7Hvoe9Hkgw_UJbocoBfPgPsj_16sskf6ThnF_NcoXpRN4fZLWltyWUOOJ_oi7miICBH9yOuVdqQCMDS5-xrfYren-jmva1Yrdv6l19vdJpEoIQvlVkiUv6tIjNBSq9L8JA-8gZ4mwCCW5wea5hbyu-1CMsDPrihOITmKfBTufqG0ZWhsORqikgdEoPk/3x5/jb41j7A1RS6StAlbV7Ddvg/h2/e30KuSegZUK7xun1BnPqWpPp-XyV0hyIUuIvERMSRx4)

name: Britainy Beshear
subject: Celebrating Kentucky's fathers and father figures
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Happy Father’s Day to all of Kentucky's dads, caregivers, and father figures. Peter,

June is always a fun month in the Beshear household! Not only is it Father's Day today, but our daughter Lila is celebrating her 13th birthday and earlier this week, our son Will celebrated his 14th birthday.

I feel so grateful to have been blessed with such wonderful children, and I couldn't ask for a better partner than Andy to raise our kids with. Will and Lila are the light of our lives.

Today I want to take a moment to wish Andy – and all dads and father figures – a very happy Father's Day. From practicing baseball with Will to breakfast dates with Lila, Andy is always there for our kids, showing them love and support. Andy shows up every day for our children and is a great example of kindness, compassion, and love. I look forward to spending today celebrating Will and Lila's birthdays and celebrating Andy. |
---

And of course, happy Father’s Day to all of Kentucky's dads, caregivers, and father figures. The love you give your children and the sacrifices you make are priceless. Thank you for all that you do.

– Britainy

---

PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
---
Andy Beshear for Governor
PO Box 4278
Louisville, KY 40204
United States
---
If you no longer wish to receive emails from us, you can [unsubscribe](https://act.andybeshear.com/p/Izrv6dpfdE6E31zF055Smw2?unsubscribedata=HQcvmK4iseixJkNTWiXBpRlOuiLWlFbiRtHpSq4O2d07Y66d%2F7tQF2VObl4rWj2w57T%2FeT6GLPASFKnlW%2F5XdlGDnG76s6zzWHOD1t97Qxd1Hr1iBrFCTs2qAvUhMKwcarZPrYJIYKS1a4yiExq5%2FB%2F4d9flm5hu6AZgCk0gpGaNKGmMeQRP3glXHUbRMMS2sAigOAT0Xi8dP8SEhc4oxJ4oZBlkt8m%2F8w50D9uwF0IK9SgfBSV2O8nB1LfFq%2FZukPUURQweV28FCPWt0ASBlrXhfH7RonYreMXh0%2BGDEruVThBpGSbfHir9VTm7cGGE8m8O4vxorOgRrKFc%2Byy%2Btai%2B%2FENoD4i0EGZd8BeZVbRdCTXLL0%2FO860Ue%2FkUwCxN8cEBSONfcMO9L%2F18CvJ2MF1wbNAMK5dsf7psH7XCpQA%3D).

Friend, Lt. Governor Mark Robinson is running for governor of North Carolina, and it's no exaggeration to say that he's a danger to the state – and our country.

Mark Robinson is _NO GOOD_ for North Carolina and our country because:
1\. He wants to ban ALL abortions in North Carolina – with no exceptions.
2\. He hosted a homophobic, right-wing extremist group on the front lawn of a taxpayer-funded building.
3\. He mocked survivors of the Parkland Shooting, calling them "spoiled little bastards."
4\. And he supports the insurrectionists who attacked our Capitol.
That's just the tip of the iceberg, friend...__**Trump referred to him as "one of the great stars in the party, one of the great stars in politics" – we all know that can't be good.**

name: Jon Tester
subject: I’m the most vulnerable Democrat running for reelection
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Folks, it's official.

Roll Call just ranked me as the most vulnerable Democratic Senator running
for reelection in 2024.

That’s why Mitch McConnell has made this race his top target and national
Republicans are already hammering me with attacks. I know we can win in
Montana, but it won’t be easy.

Look—I’m not panicking, but I am sounding the alarm. A wave of outside
money and attacks are about to flood into Montana. This will be the most
important Senate election in the country, and it’s up to us to build a
team strong enough to win.

Montana is a top battleground and could decide whether or not Democrats
hold our narrow majority. That’s why I’m personally counting on you to
make a donation today.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18972?t=1001&akid=3318%2E346206%2E3hP9JJ ]Split a donation of $25 or more between Charles Booker and my campaign
to help my team respond to future attacks and ensure we have the resources
to reach voters and keep Mitch McConnell from taking back the Senate
majority.

CHIP IN →

So much is on the line: building an economy that works for all of us,
getting dark money out of politics, protecting a woman’s right to make her
own health care decisions, and much more.

With your help, we can get it done.

— Jon

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18972?t=1002&akid=3318%2E346206%2E3hP9JJ ][IMG]

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230618-3318-footer&t=1003&refcode2=3318_346206_3hP9JJ&akid=3318%2E346206%2E3hP9JJ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

---
Peter,
I wanted to take a moment to express my heartfelt appreciation for all the wonderful fathers in our community. This special day gives us an opportunity to recognize and celebrate the important role that fathers play in our lives, and the impact they have on shaping our families and society as a whole.

When I think about fatherhood, I am reminded of the incredible joy and blessings that come with raising a family. As many of you know, I am the proud mother of twin daughters, and I have been fortunate enough to witness firsthand the unwavering love, dedication, and support of my husband, Shawn.

Shawn has been a pillar of strength and guidance for our family, and his commitment to our daughters' well-being and growth is truly commendable. He embodies the qualities of a loving father, always ready to lend a helping hand, offer words of encouragement, and provide a safe and nurturing environment for our girls to thrive. From their earliest steps to their current accomplishments, Shawn has been there every step of the way.

This Father's Day, I invite you to join me in expressing gratitude and admiration for all the fathers, like Shawn, who go above and beyond to make a positive difference in their children's lives. It is through their love and guidance that future generations will be shaped, and our community will continue to flourish.

Happy Father's Day to all the amazing fathers out there! May your day be filled with love, laughter, and the appreciation you truly deserve.

Sincerely,

clean_body: | | | | \- - -| Peter, I wanted to take a moment to express my heartfelt appreciation for all the wonderful fathers in our community. This special day gives us an opportunity to recognize and celebrate the important role that fathers play in our lives, and the impact they have on shaping our families and society as a whole. When I think about fatherhood, I am reminded of the incredible joy and blessings that come with raising a family. As many of you know, I am the proud mother of twin daughters, and I have been fortunate enough to witness firsthand the unwavering love, dedication, and support of my husband, Shawn. Shawn has been a pillar of strength and guidance for our family, and his commitment to our daughters' well-being and growth is truly commendable. He embodies the qualities of a loving father, always ready to lend a helping hand, offer words of encouragement, and provide a safe and nurturing environment for our girls to thrive. From their earliest steps to their current accomplishments, Shawn has been there every step of the way. This Father's Day, I invite you to join me in expressing gratitude and admiration for all the fathers, like Shawn, who go above and beyond to make a positive difference in their children's lives. It is through their love and guidance that future generations will be shaped, and our community will continue to flourish. Happy Father's Day to all the amazing fathers out there! May your day be filled with love, laughter, and the appreciation you truly deserve. Sincerely, Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Lori Chavez-DeRemer 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 = \- =

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Eigel?=
subject: Welcome to Team Eigel!
body:
Welcome to our effort for a better Missouri in 2024! Thank you for trusting me with your contact information—rest assured, I will not share it with | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us21.campaign-archive.com/?e=c00a6982d2&u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=c5b441bd69)
---
| | [ ](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=62ae8b3012&e=c00a6982d2)
---
| | Dear Peter, Welcome to our effort for a better Missouri in 2024!

Thank you for trusting me with your contact information—rest assured, I will not share it with anyone and only use it to keep you informed about the latest in our exploratory campaign for Governor, events, news, and ....yes...our needs from you!

You see, YOU are critical to helping me get out my message of an economically prosperous Missouri that elects leaders that PROTECT THE RIGHTS OF ITS CITIZENS! I need to connect with like-minded, concerned patriots all over the state to share how my platform of reducing government taxation and regulation--while still staunchly defending your God-given rights--is the recipe for success in Missouri.

As you’ve probably already heard, the 2024 election for Governor for Missouri will be the MOST IMPORTANT election we’ve likely ever had as a state. You probably hear that every election cycle, right? Well, even though most politicians use it as little more than a slogan, the bold truth of it is undeniable. EVERY election is the most important because, with every cycle, government gets BIGGER and takes MORE FROM YOU. Do you feel like you get more from that bigger government every year?! Of course not!

All too often, national and state politicians use all that big government to harm your family and business. The “COVID-crazy” environment, the out of control government spending in Washington AND Jefferson City, and the woke agenda of the leftist elite have all conspired to weaken our state and our nation.

We need freedom-loving PROTECTORS in our state offices that will defend your rights to life, liberty and the pursuit of your dreams whether the threat is Joe Biden zealots in Washington DC or big government Republicans in Jefferson City.

I can’t be that protector without YOUR HELP! For the next year, I’m traveling the Show-Me State and meeting as many everyday citizens as I can to talk with them about how to make Missouri STRONG.

Here is my ask of you right now: [Would you be willing to host a small event at your house, business, church, or community center and invite your friends and neighbors to hear my message](mailto:info@billeigel.com)?

If so, [contact me](mailto:info@billeigel.com)!!!!
---
| [Contact Bill](mailto:info@billeigel.com "Contact Bill")
---
| I can be reached at [info@billeigel.com](mailto:info@billeigel.com) – just let me know what you’ve got in mind and we will contact you right away to schedule an in-person visit. I’m looking forward to meeting with you and your neighbors—we have a lot of work to do over the next year while we explore a run for Governor in 2024—let’s get there together!

Respectfully,

**Bill Eigel**
State Senator
---
| | | | | | | [](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=ea4fcb26ac&e=c00a6982d2)
---
| | [](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=2100623c59&e=c00a6982d2)
---
| | [](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=826152dab5&e=c00a6982d2)
---
|

Eigel for Missouri398 Patriotic TrailWeldon Spring, MO 63304

We need freedom-loving PROTECTORS in our state offices that will defend your rights to life, liberty and the pursuit of your dreams whether the threat is Joe Biden zealots in Washington DC or big government Republicans in Jefferson City. I can’t be that protector without YOUR HELP! For the next year, I’m traveling the Show-Me State and meeting as many everyday citizens as I can to talk with them about how to make Missouri STRONG. Here is my ask of you right now: mailto:info@billeigel.com? If so, mailto:info@billeigel.com!!!! | mailto:info@billeigel.com "Contact Bill" | I can be reached at mailto:info@billeigel.com – just let me know what you’ve got in mind and we will contact you right away to schedule an in-person visit. I’m looking forward to meeting with you and your neighbors—we have a lot of work to do over the next year while we explore a run for Governor in 2024—let’s get there together! Respectfully, Bill Eigel State Senator | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2023 Eigel for Missouri, All rights reserved.

I’m going to be honest with you, Peter: Our fundraising has taken a significant dip recently. It’s what people in politics call the “summer slump,” and it happens when the weather gets nicer and folks are spending time outside, with family, and not opening these emails as often. But the truth is, the donations we receive in response to these emails are the only way we’re able to accomplish all we want to get done. When it comes to supporting women candidates, or advocating for our legislative priorities, your donations power us every step of the way. name: Tammy Baldwin for Senate
subject: Looking for your response today:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| What issues are most important to you?
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=420%2E35263%2EcABu0S)
Peter — Far-right politicians in Washington and across the country are on a mission to roll back our rights and freedoms. LGBTQ+ protections, abortion access, voting rights, and more are all at risk under GOP majorities. That’s why Tammy is fighting to protect our Democratic majority in the Senate and continue making progress that Wisconsin’s working families are counting on. **But she needs you in this fight too, Peter. That means getting your input on the issues you’re most concerned about.** As Tammy continues making progress in Washington and running to defend our Democratic Senate majority, she wants to hear directly from you — the grassroots supporters at the heart of her reelection campaign. **[Peter, will you take two minutes to fill out our priorities survey and share the issues that are most important to you and your family with Tammy?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/survey/June_Priorities_Survey/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230618_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=420%2E35263%2EcABu0S)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/survey/June_Priorities_Survey/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230618_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=420%2E35263%2EcABu0S)
---
Thank you for making your voice heard. Your feedback is critical to Tammy’s work for progress.
— Team Baldwin

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Now that the Pittsburgh Tree of Life killer has been convicted, we must work to end anti-Semitic hate, and move forward with the Jewish Democratic Council of America to elect Democrats who’ll work to keep all our families safer
body:
Robert Bowers guilty on 63 charges
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Teba939dc-0238-4e5b-b592-05fe698aa12c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Last week, Robert Bowers was found guilty of all 63 charges in the worst anti-Semtic attack in U.S. history--the horrifying mass murder of 11 attendees of the Tree of Life Synagogue in Pittsburgh.** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7a358fa9-3082-448f-93d0-157d128960bf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _You may remember, Bowers didn't act alone. Well, he did, but the devil on his shoulder telling him to "kill all Jews" was _**_inspired, in his own words, by the anti-Semitic lie "George Soros" was funding a "Central American caravan" of "dangerous illegals" & "unknown Middle Easterners invading" the U.S._** **_Donald Trump repeated the lie endlessly, with an advisor of his calling it a "political gift._" _Fox personalities, Mike Pence, Matt Gaetz and scores of other GOPers repeated this blood libel, __leading Bowers to massacre a group of innocent people in a house of worship for peace and prayer._** _The Jewish Democratic Council of America (JDCA) fights anti-Semitism and to turn out the Jewish Democratic vote. But the JDCA also fights for gun safety, humane immigration reform, democracy & human rights_, _all factors that led to the Tree of Life Massacre. They'll never forget this horrific tragedy, as **it inspires them to fight to elect Democrats who support these key issues. **_ [**_Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or more to the JDCA to end the hate, elect progressive Democrats and never again must grieve due to terrorist attacks at a house of worship inspired by Republicans?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T072a6d85-eb2d-4ef3-b79e-9b4bceff1cd1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for fighting for equality, democracy and security. Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T60d6f82f-42fc-4466-8de1-38bfe9890113/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | | or
