body:
This Father’s Day, we wanted to send you a quick email to celebrate our dad, Adam Frisch.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65037556/412086258/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGZjMWU1My0wYTBlLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OQ6LNWsPW0o8fOxwYLk6gO8ys8jjdR64rb2-MWshm8Y=&emci=663cd9cd-330d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=00fc1e53-0a0e-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65037557/412086259/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGZjMWU1My0wYTBlLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OQ6LNWsPW0o8fOxwYLk6gO8ys8jjdR64rb2-MWshm8Y=&emci=663cd9cd-330d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=00fc1e53-0a0e-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
Hey there,
This Father’s Day, we wanted to send you a quick email to celebrate our dad, Adam Frisch.
It might sound corny (especially coming from two teenagers), but we truly wouldn’t be the people we are today without him.
Dad instilled in us everything from our love for the outdoors, to what it means to live our lives as ethical people... and yes, of course, how to hitch a trailer.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65037558/412086260/1610638071?refcode=em20230618pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=00fc1e53-0a0e-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGZjMWU1My0wYTBlLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OQ6LNWsPW0o8fOxwYLk6gO8ys8jjdR64rb2-MWshm8Y=)
Maybe you know our dad from the campaign trail, or watching his race against Lauren Boebert from afar, but it’s the quiet moments no one else sees that make our dad so special. Dad’s goofy side and his caring heart are the things that we’ll always remember and cherish.
We’re so blessed to have so many incredible father-figures in our lives. From our grandfathers to our uncles, Dad is just one of the important men in our lives – but he’s certainly the most special.
It’s hard not being able to see Dad as much when he’s on the campaign trail. But the fact that our dad decided to run for Congress isn’t surprising. He wants a better country and a better world for us – and for our future kids.
Dad’s taught us since we were young to stand up for what is right, and we couldn’t be more proud to see him dedicating so much time and energy toward building a better future for our community.
To all of the fathers, grandfathers, uncles, and father-figures: Happy Father’s Day.
Thank you for supporting our dad’s campaign, and for letting us celebrate him with you today.
Felix & Quintessa Frisch (and Padme too!)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65037559/412086261/1610638071?refcode=em20230618pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=00fc1e53-0a0e-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGZjMWU1My0wYTBlLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OQ6LNWsPW0o8fOxwYLk6gO8ys8jjdR64rb2-MWshm8Y=)

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: Dreamers are here to stay
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
For 11 years Dreamers have been in limbo — allowed to contribute to America’s success, but not offered a path to citizenship. | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65037684/412087014/-730477937?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230617daca_gv_actives_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDYwZjk0ZC0wYjBlLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I5RuSKQmgsuxqHtYW1i9J8LpLPFD-qLx4tAX0JPq70A=)
---
“We ask only to let us contribute freely. Let us walk along you, shoulder to shoulder, on that same road our hands help to pave.”
— Denis Montero Diaz, Dreamer
* * *
**Friends, 11 years ago this week President Obama created the Deferred Access for Childhood Arrivals (DACA) program** — allowing individuals who were brought to the U.S. as children, to stay and work in the only country they’ve ever called home.
Most Dreamers have now graduated college, opened businesses, and started families. Together, they’ve paid over $33 billion in government taxes. **For 11 years Dreamers have been in limbo — allowed to contribute to America’s success, but not offered a path to citizenship.**
As I write this, a Trump-appointed federal judge in Texas is considering ruling DACA unlawful — a decision that would put 580,000 Dreamers across our country in danger of deportation.
**In Congress, I’m fighting for a path to citizenship for DACA recipients.** Unfortunately, many politicians would rather push anti-immigrant and hateful propaganda than come to the negotiating table.
**Here in New Mexico, I’m in a rematch campaign against Yvette Herrell who wants to deport Dreamers.**
[**I only beat Herrell by 1,350 votes last year, and pundits are saying our rematch will be the tightest race of 2024. clean_body: For 11 years Dreamers have been in limbo — allowed to contribute to America’s success, but not offered a path to citizenship. | | = “We ask only to let us contribute freely. Let us walk along you, shoulder to shoulder, on that same road our hands help to pave.” — Denis Montero Diaz, Dreamer Friends, 11 years ago this week President Obama created the Deferred Access for Childhood Arrivals (DACA) program — allowing individuals who were brought to the U.S. as children, to stay and work in the only country they’ve ever called home. Most Dreamers have now graduated college, opened businesses, and started families. Together, they’ve paid over $33 billion in government taxes. For 11 years Dreamers have been in limbo — allowed to contribute to America’s success, but not offered a path to citizenship. As I write this, a Trump-appointed federal judge in Texas is considering ruling DACA unlawful — a decision that would put 580,000 Dreamers across our country in danger of deportation. In Congress, I’m fighting for a path to citizenship for DACA recipients. Unfortunately, many politicians would rather push anti-immigrant and hateful propaganda than come to the negotiating table. Here in New Mexico, I’m in a rematch campaign against Yvette Herrell who wants to deport Dreamers. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | =** As long as I’m your representative in Congress, I’ll continue to do what we all know is right. It’s been a while since we’ve spoken, Peter, but I have something very important for you. Senate Republicans and our nation are facing the most consequential election of our lives in 2024. If we’re going to _**save America**_ as we know it, it’s going to take a united effort among ALL of us. We**know** the radical Left and the Fake News media will pull out all the stops._ __We’re not even halfway through the year, but**KEY** America First Republicans have already **endorsed** our movement to **Make America Great Again.** Senator and Chairman of the NRSC, Steve Daines, the great Senator from Ohio, JD Vance, Senator Marsha Blackburn, AND more are already on board. _ I know you’re a dedicated Republican and supporter of the America First Movement, so I have an essential ask of you, Peter. name: Mark Warner

body:
Help me re-elect Senator Tammy Baldwin

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65038105/412088811/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmYzNGMwZC0xMDBlLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kTj4h3zAsLd5gEX1RxRiGWl69nYYnmaWFobnLnIBnDg=&emci=7111b438-920c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=d6f34c0d-100e-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, Throughout my time in the Senate, I’ve been lucky enough to build some pretty exceptional friendships – one of those being with Senator Tammy Baldwin of Wisconsin. I value her friendship more than I can express. Not only is she one hell of a charades player (I’m convinced she’s the best in the Senate), but as the first openly gay Senator in our nation’s history, she’s done a lot of really incredible things for our LGBTQ+ community. From protecting same-sex marriage through the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , to creating legislation to collect data to get a better sense of how the health care crisis is affecting LGBTQ+ groups, she’s one of the Senate’s most outspoken LGBTQ+ advocates – and someone we need back in Washington next year. **_[**Can you join me in my work to re-elect Sen. Baldwin? Chip in today if you’re with me >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65038106/412088812/-1520757677?refcode=mw_em_230618_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmYzNGMwZC0xMDBlLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kTj4h3zAsLd5gEX1RxRiGWl69nYYnmaWFobnLnIBnDg=)_** It’s not just her fight for LGBTQ+ equality either. Senator Baldwin has been working tirelessly to address the issues that matter most to working families – lowering the cost of insulin and other prescription drugs, protecting Social Security and Medicare, and safeguarding healthcare access for veterans. I’m proud to have worked with her on these issues and am committed to making sure she’s able to continue this important work. We can’t afford to lose her seat next year. But with news outlets around the country naming her one of the most vulnerable Senators up for re-election in 2024, this is an all hands on deck situation. **_[**So please folks, can you donate $5 today to support Tammy Baldwin’s re-election campaign so we can protect our Senate majority and keep making progress for working families in Wisconsin and around the country?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65038107/412088813/-1520757677?refcode=mw_em_230618_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmYzNGMwZC0xMDBlLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kTj4h3zAsLd5gEX1RxRiGWl69nYYnmaWFobnLnIBnDg=)_** Thank you, Mark Warner ** ** ****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65038108/412088814/-1520757677?refcode=mw_em_230618_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmYzNGMwZC0xMDBlLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kTj4h3zAsLd5gEX1RxRiGWl69nYYnmaWFobnLnIBnDg=)****

body:
What Big Abortion won't tell Americans will kill precious children.

| [ ](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkb2K3DAURp9G7mz0Z8lTuFgw020IYSGluJLveMTqD0mTvH7wzgRSpj06fOhwf76bd_DBp-MbRFx77aY2k8A0C-PN_8Kx3306muGUi5GqkS1GDPsqNd-FGnBlatFMUKXn4b5a4eyFS8bkxc7MMVz4TgUKx2clpZWDX88dqtjCLlLLyzQjt2xZNErtUOkbkRQC1t6mfseK5WGDd5A6QpxcjkNY772XRsQb4VfCr-C6z2lqFkrNwd9wyvUg_PrP10e0OX8ScX30aBzEAv5IRGynYl51T4WrU2n5UR0SsZWaW0HXfTpeTxF3_4hEbBjBhxd0OXVMnYjt-9v48eNj_JtIuIJSEILxOxEbo1-ogPuEA5-MC6Xmoa57-e1D8E1pIulxjn_V9v88yJ8AAAD__2Dukuo)

#
Friend,

What Big Abortion won't tell Americans will kill precious children.

Knowledge gaps. Lies. Distortion. Shoddy reporting. These kill unborn babies. But until the deception is exposed the killing won't stop.

That's why I invite you to learn the truth in our eye-opening new ebook [_**Five Things the Public Doesn 't Know About Abortion.**_](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkb2K3DAURp9G7mz0Z8lTuFgw020IYSGluJLveMTqD0mTvH7wzgRSpj06fOhwf76bd_DBp-MbRFx77aY2k8A0C-PN_8Kx3306muGUi5GqkS1GDPsqNd-FGnBlatFMUKXn4b5a4eyFS8bkxc7MMVz4TgUKx2clpZWDX88dqtjCLlLLyzQjt2xZNErtUOkbkRQC1t6mfseK5WGDd5A6QpxcjkNY772XRsQb4VfCr-C6z2lqFkrNwd9wyvUg_PrP10e0OX8ScX30aBzEAv5IRGynYl51T4WrU2n5UR0SsZWaW0HXfTpeTxF3_4hEbBjBhxd0OXVMnYjt-9v48eNj_JtIuIJSEILxOxEbo1-ogPuEA5-MC6Xmoa57-e1D8E1pIulxjn_V9v88yJ8AAAD__2Dukuo)

This brief, hard-hitting, fact-filled ebook is free. I urge you--as a pro-life American--to download it now and get the truth.

Scholars from SBA Pro-Life America's research arm the Charlotte Lozier Institute to reveal FIVE FACTS about abortion. **[These realities are currently being concealed or ignored](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkb2K3DAURp9G7mz0Z8lTuFgw020IYSGluJLveMTqD0mTvH7wzgRSpj06fOhwf76bd_DBp-MbRFx77aY2k8A0C-PN_8Kx3306muGUi5GqkS1GDPsqNd-FGnBlatFMUKXn4b5a4eyFS8bkxc7MMVz4TgUKx2clpZWDX88dqtjCLlLLyzQjt2xZNErtUOkbkRQC1t6mfseK5WGDd5A6QpxcjkNY772XRsQb4VfCr-C6z2lqFkrNwd9wyvUg_PrP10e0OX8ScX30aBzEAv5IRGynYl51T4WrU2n5UR0SsZWaW0HXfTpeTxF3_4hEbBjBhxd0OXVMnYjt-9v48eNj_JtIuIJSEILxOxEbo1-ogPuEA5-MC6Xmoa57-e1D8E1pIulxjn_V9v88yJ8AAAD__2Dukuo)** by government agencies and the industry of Big Abortion.

That's why we're blowing the whistle--and letting you in on it. We're telling allies in federal and state governments, the media, and the American people because everyone deserves to know the truth. The truths revealed in this ebook can set women free and save unborn babies.

I'm thrilled to send you the new eBook _**Five Things the Public Doesn 't Know About Abortion.**_ You can start reading your eBook by clicking this link:

**[https://action.sbaprolife.org/five-things-ebook](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkb2K3DAURp9G7mz0Z8lTuFgw020IYSGluJLveMTqD0mTvH7wzgRSpj06fOhwf76bd_DBp-MbRFx77aY2k8A0C-PN_8Kx3306muGUi5GqkS1GDPsqNd-FGnBlatFMUKXn4b5a4eyFS8bkxc7MMVz4TgUKx2clpZWDX88dqtjCLlLLyzQjt2xZNErtUOkbkRQC1t6mfseK5WGDd5A6QpxcjkNY772XRsQb4VfCr-C6z2lqFkrNwd9wyvUg_PrP10e0OX8ScX30aBzEAv5IRGynYl51T4WrU2n5UR0SsZWaW0HXfTpeTxF3_4hEbBjBhxd0OXVMnYjt-9v48eNj_JtIuIJSEILxOxEbo1-ogPuEA5-MC6Xmoa57-e1D8E1pIulxjn_V9v88yJ8AAAD__2Dukuo)**

Thank you for your support. You are helping save lives and redeem the future of America.

For _LIFE_ ,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, 2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr., PO Box 803, Arlington, VA, 22206

The Republican Team

body:
It’s happening on our southern border | | | Fellow American,[](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=93ef292e7c1c4367b5b8f3f89438d55e&_e=Hb9RlvWFVTk4cvHlW4n17t2cvCpZJjDdzYZnEkFxMtiZCQLzES7CSIcWMTK1pTyq7efbrK4lK7YtkZ2np8Aq4sscF94TesFjNTF4YxFv-sXX-Cv11b0AvoRG4vwMSUn3ks7uXjUPVvaHyUWB21zf1o82v-ZYU98XN41arBam2tnFt9SN9iBDJOwYjJriOT01IKww2GANnl3vxMGN34jv1qBe2OGOnQt-rhjCfwjbB2F_nM4gVim5FYYFEhVRyK8A9vSO3dFjqEgjdffVizk9xJsEXvl3rVVc2ROdzlsZlM17Lo1WCHddWC02RmbA3Nr_MEH67MjYEKA5LwjEjMZ3pAjCVWg4MPo28TRQ5Cfy0P2iJ0v_QRvZsK5-zTlBnLT6ZViDVWzdwFRXBSMka4A0ogGxoB-6TnhMVZ5FARccXwuOJ8cYp0iKzq-RQM4hgvHvvT6Dqzm5_w22iUGcM9HJNnyd0pk0jot-jkUrdslpxtE%3D) This is Congresswoman Maria Elvira Salazar. I’ve visited our southern border many times throughout my life, meeting the brave men and women in the border patrol who work tirelessly trying to keep our country secure. But between you and me, there’s something that the mainstream media and the Beltway Establishment refuse to show to the American people, and that’s the unhinged human trafficking taking place on the border 24/7. Cartels are smuggling thousands of people every month, some of whom are sentenced to a life of indentured servitude, including children - This is just disgusting. As the daughter of Cuban exiles, immigration reform has always been a lifelong passion of mine, and when I hear the nonstop horror stories from illegal crossing, it shakes me to the core. I know you’re like me and want this to stop immediately. I’m receiving some serious flack for **calling** **out** the atrocities taking place because of their negligence - and now the radical-left is moving to silence me for good. Socialist billionaires want to throw me out of office in 2024. If I want to keep up this uphill fight I’m going to need your help. | **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

I’m PAW-sitive we CAN defeat Joe Manchin and get America back on track, Truthfully, we need to get supporters in the doggy door so we can run the campaign it will take to compete with Manchin’s fundraising machine and FLIP this Senate seat. Any time you can spare to offer your opinions would be a real treat, Fellow Conservative. This race will be the BIGGEST Senate race of 2024, and the Democrats will spend whatever it takes to keep my Dad from WINNING. Your four-legged friend, Babydog Justice | MEET JIM Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs. Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team. Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog. Join the Conversation: | Paid for by Jim Justice for U.S. Senate

name: GIFFORDS PAC
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
That’s the donation we’re asking you to make to GIFFORDS PAC today.
#

Friends -
We are writing to humbly ask if you can make a $1 donation to GIFFORDS PAC today. Yes, just $1.
$1 to help us reach our quarterly fundraising goal as we’re facing a slow fundraising month this June during Gun Violence Awareness Month.
$1 to stand up to the gun lobby, their harmful rhetoric, and their large sums of money.
$1 to help us continue fighting for gun safety legislation at the federal level and in every state across our nation—legislation that has the power to save someone’s life.
We know that $1 may not seem like the kind of money that can do all those things, but by the time you get to this point in the email, a number of people have already donated their $1.
Now they’re hoping you’ll do the same. We all are. Because the only way we’ll be able to see a future free from gun violence is if we work together.
So please:
[**Can you use this link to contribute $1, or whatever you can afford, to GIFFORDS PAC today? We will put it right to work on behalf of our shared goal of making our communities safer from gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jun23.dfqeaL&refcode=em230618-1-15&amount=1&t=1&akid=5990%2E3935704%2EvjlMUa)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
**[CONTRIBUTE $1](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-jun23.jpif6I&amount=1&refcode=em230618-1-15&t=2&akid=5990%2E3935704%2EvjlMUa)**
Thank you,
The team at GIFFORDS PAC

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=5990%2E3935704%2EvjlMUa) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Sharice Davids
subject: I need you with me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| **_Message From Sharice:_**

The contrast between the work my colleagues and I are doing and the actions of the House Republicans is stark, friend.

While we work to deliver manufacturing jobs, streamline supply chains to lower costs, improve the lives of farm workers, and more, they’re willing to push our economy to the brink of disaster in order to push through an all-out attack on early childhood education, veterans care, the environment, and health care affordability.

**Folks in Kansas and nationwide have made it clear that they want their representatives to do their jobs and work for _the people,_ not work to increase their own political power or get on TV.**

I need you with me to ensure we don’t end up in this position again, and a 2024 victory in key races like mine is the only way to do that. [**Will you help my team raise the $5,000 we need this week to ramp up our field organizing? Chip in $10 now.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47863?t=6&akid=8551%2E878179%2E_sM64G) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Sharice Davids and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47864?t=7&akid=8551%2E878179%2E_sM64G)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47865?t=8&akid=8551%2E878179%2E_sM64G)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47866?t=9&akid=8551%2E878179%2E_sM64G)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47867?t=10&akid=8551%2E878179%2E_sM64G)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47868?t=11&akid=8551%2E878179%2E_sM64G)
**We’ve heard it loud and clear: People want their rights to be protected. But the attacks aren’t going away.**

We must remain vigilant to stop the worst from happening. It’s been exciting to see people across our state make their voices heard in every aspect of our society. We can’t let up now if we’re going to win in the swing districts that will make it possible for us to take back the majority in the House.

[**Every dollar matters when we have so many voters to reach. Can I count on you?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47863?t=12&akid=8551%2E878179%2E_sM64G)

Thank you,
Sharice
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=8551%2E878179%2E_sM64G). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=8551%2E878179%2E_sM64G).**

Friend, I am sick and tired of seeing the most incompetent and corrupt politicians DESTROY the greatest country in history.
But I promise you this – no matter how much damage these left-wing lunatics do, WE will be able to FIX it and make America _greater_ than EVER before!

subject: Will you split a donation of $10 or any amount you can between my campaign and the DLCC’s Grassroots Victory PAC?
body:
No one knows better than I do that winning here in PA will be tough. That’s why we need to put this re-election campaign on the strongest footing possible. | | |
---
| | After I announced that I was running for re-election, national Republicans targeted me with negative ads to make it clear that flipping this seat is a top priority in their plan to retake Senate control in 2024. Well, I’m not done fighting for Pennsylvania’s hard-working families, and I won’t back down to anyone – including Republicans in the Senate working to chip away at critical programs like Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid. **The stakes of this race are high, so we can’t afford to fall short. clean_body: No one knows better than I do that winning here in PA will be tough. That’s why we need to put this re-election campaign on the strongest footing possible. | | | | | After I announced that I was running for re-election, national Republicans targeted me with negative ads to make it clear that flipping this seat is a top priority in their plan to retake Senate control in 2024. Well, I’m not done fighting for Pennsylvania’s hard-working families, and I won’t back down to anyone – including Republicans in the Senate working to chip away at critical programs like Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid. The stakes of this race are high, so we can’t afford to fall short. That’s why I’m reaching out now. No one knows better than I do that winning here in PA will be tough. That’s why we need to put this re-election campaign on the strongest footing possible. So, can you help out? | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between the DLCC and Sen. Bob Casey's re-election campaign. | | | | | Our team is capable of great things if we work together. It’s going to take all of us to defend this seat and our Senate majority. subject: Andy’s committed to standing up for working families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
|
---
| | Alysa here from Team Andy. Andy's hanging out with his kids right now, but **I wanted to make sure you didn't miss[Andy's appearance on Good Morning America on Friday](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65038989/412095220/770463438?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWEwMWQ3OC0xNjBlLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f1YDyflPC3ws2tNGg-hfygBULV1wW963x2d-b4qvkkg=&emci=265904fb-140d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=8aa01d78-160e-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=26261389).** Andy really loves being a dad. In his office, you can see pictures of his kids and their cute drawings plastering the walls. **For Andy, being a dad means more than just telling corny jokes.** It's about the immense responsibility he feels to his sons, to their generation, and future generations. **That's why in Congress, he's fighting for things like increased access to child care for families, a permanent child tax credit, and paid family leave.** **[Click here to watch the full interview!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65038990/412095221/-821065315?refcode=2023-06-18-gma-fathersday&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=8aa01d78-160e-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWEwMWQ3OC0xNjBlLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f1YDyflPC3ws2tNGg-hfygBULV1wW963x2d-b4qvkkg=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65038991/412095222/770463438?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWEwMWQ3OC0xNjBlLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f1YDyflPC3ws2tNGg-hfygBULV1wW963x2d-b4qvkkg=&emci=265904fb-140d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=8aa01d78-160e-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=26261389) Andy's committed to standing up for working families so that everyone, no matter their background, can pursue their American Dream. **Wishing you and your loved ones a Happy Father's Day as we celebrate the caregivers in our lives.** _Alysa_
_Team Andy_ [Support Andy](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65038992/412095223/-821065315?refcode=2023-06-18-gma-fathersday&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=8aa01d78-160e-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWEwMWQ3OC0xNjBlLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f1YDyflPC3ws2tNGg-hfygBULV1wW963x2d-b4qvkkg=) Forwarded Message | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65038993/412095224/1642521363?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWEwMWQ3OC0xNjBlLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f1YDyflPC3ws2tNGg-hfygBULV1wW963x2d-b4qvkkg=&emci=265904fb-140d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=8aa01d78-160e-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=26261389)

Andy is the father of two _adorable_ little boys. He always says he's in this fight for his kids and for future generations everywhere.
**Yesterday Andy was on Good Morning America! During the show, he opened up about how being a dad has influenced his work in Congress. You won't want to miss it!**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65038994/412095225/770463438?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWEwMWQ3OC0xNjBlLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f1YDyflPC3ws2tNGg-hfygBULV1wW963x2d-b4qvkkg=&emci=265904fb-140d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=8aa01d78-160e-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=26261389)
[**Click here to watch!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65038995/412095226/770463438?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWEwMWQ3OC0xNjBlLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f1YDyflPC3ws2tNGg-hfygBULV1wW963x2d-b4qvkkg=&emci=265904fb-140d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=8aa01d78-160e-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=26261389)
As a dad, Andy has first-hand experience with many of the challenges that families face, including child care. That's why he's a founding member of the Congressional Dad's Caucus. Together, they're advocating for policies to improve the lives of hardworking families all across the country.
More soon,

clean_body: | | | Alysa here from Team Andy. Andy's hanging out with his kids right now, but I wanted to make sure you didn't miss. Andy really loves being a dad. In his office, you can see pictures of his kids and their cute drawings plastering the walls. For Andy, being a dad means more than just telling corny jokes. It's about the immense responsibility he feels to his sons, to their generation, and future generations. That's why in Congress, he's fighting for things like increased access to child care for families, a permanent child tax credit, and paid family leave. = Andy's committed to standing up for working families so that everyone, no matter their background, can pursue their American Dream. Wishing you and your loved ones a Happy Father's Day as we celebrate the caregivers in our lives. Alysa Team Andy = Forwarded Message | Andy is the father of two adorable little boys. He always says he's in this fight for his kids and for future generations everywhere. Yesterday Andy was on Good Morning America! During the show, he opened up about how being a dad has influenced his work in Congress. You won't want to miss it! As a dad, Andy has first-hand experience with many of the challenges that families face, including child care. That's why he's a founding member of the Congressional Dad's Caucus. Together, they're advocating for policies to improve the lives of hardworking families all across the country. Friend,

Whoever is the Republican nominee for President, is going to have to go head-to-head with Joe Biden.

We can’t afford to nominate someone who’s going to take it easy on the many whose lack of judgment and poor leadership have led to so many problems - and Chris Christie doesn’t plan to.

But we want to hear from you –
**Who do you think would win if it came down to Chris Christie vs. Joe Biden for President?**

## Why Chris Christie:

Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. name: Mike Pence
subject: Being Christian isn’t easy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Pence for President
body:
I will always put my faith first

| |
---
| | | Today in America, being Christian isn't easy.

In recent years, we've seen the faithful attacked by the radical Left, Hollywood elites, and the mainstream media.

They want to ostracize people from their beliefs - why? To disenfranchise the American people and take away our resolve. The disenfranchised are more malleable and less likely to stand up to their regime.

**But as the Bible says in Psalm 15, we must be prepared to keep our oath even when it hurts.** If you're standing where I'm standing, it's obvious America needs faith now more than ever.
---

This critical mission **pits us against the most powerful forces in our country.** One of the tools we need to counter their wealth is the money we raise by tapping into a broad base of supporters. **[Donate today! name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Needed: The fate of bees if the EPA approves neonics for another 15 years
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1830458?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: The EPA is set to APPROVE bee-killing pesticides for another 15 years -- but we can still STOP this!** Over the last two decades, the populations of critical wild bee species have PLUMMETED: **The Rusty-Patched Bumblebee population has dropped by 87%, the American Bumblebee by 89%, and the Western Bumblebee by 93%.** Research points to __**neonics**__ as a leading cause of these massive bee die-offs. The most widely used pesticides in the world, neonics have made agriculture **nearly 50 times more toxic** to insects. Neonics are __**EXTREMELY DEADLY TO BEES.**__ They attack bees’ nervous systems and can harm their ability to navigate, find food, fight pests and diseases, and even reproduce. [**If we’re going to protect wild bees and other pollinators from being wiped out, we MUST demand an end to the widespread use of bee-killing neonics. Will you take action NOW to help SAVE WILD BEES before it’s too late?**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1830459?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1830460?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Bees are essential for our food chain and way of life. We rely on these helpful little pollinators for **1 out of 3 bites of food** that we eat and _**75% of the world’s most nutritious food crops**_ like fruits, veggies, and nuts. Almonds wouldn’t even EXIST if it weren’t for bees! And without bees and other pollinators, crops like coffee and chocolate would be in short supply, making them more expensive and harder to obtain.
But TOXIC bee-killing neonics are threatening critical pollinators and the health of our ecosystems. Recent studies have even shown that widespread use of neonics may be harmful to humans -- _**especially to children.**_
The EU has already banned the worst neonics, and states like MD and NJ have implemented restrictions on them. **Yet the EPA is still preparing to APPROVE these DANGEROUS pesticides for _ANOTHER_ 15 years. Wild bees can’t wait that long, Friend, so we urgently need you to take action with us before it’s too late. [Add your name right now to PROTECT POLLINATORS from TOXIC NEONICS! >> ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1830461?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1830460?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for taking urgent action.
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Sherrod
subject: This is all possible thanks to supporters like you

**$26.**

I'm proud to share that $26 is the average grassroots donation to our campaign, friend.
I know that might not seem like much when you think about the tens of millions that GOP super PACs are going to spend to try to defeat me and flip the Senate. But that's the power of this grassroots movement – it's made up of folks like you who believe in this fight and chip in what they can, when they can.
This movement is how we're going to defy the pundits who are calling me one of the most vulnerable senators in the country, win in Ohio, and defend our Senate majority._ _

But here's the problem: **_The Cook Political Report_ ranks this race a toss-up – and Washington Republicans are already launching attack ads against me. We need all hands on deck to fight back – but right now, we're coming up short.**

**If everyone reading this email chipped in $26 – or even just a few dollars – we could reach our $15,000 fundraising goal before the day ends. But not everyone will, so I'm personally asking if I can count on you, friend.**
**[Please, will you chip in $26 – or as much as you can right now – to help me fight back against GOP attacks, defend this seat, and keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65039688/412097978/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=26&refcode=jtk273-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODgwYmNjNi0xYjBlLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wWJpvaDZYg1qp-MsRbErWLjhycLsP359ZSzjWTrWklM=)**

**Please read on for a personal message from Sen. Sherrod Brown: **Friend – thank you for being a part of our grassroots movement and for sharing our commitment to the Dignity of Work.

Fighting for workers means building an economy that prioritizes the needs of workers over tax breaks for billionaires and corporations. No matter who you are or what kind of work you do, I promise to fight for you. But I need your help: Experts say I'm one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection and Senate control could come down to Ohio. The only way we can defend this critical seat is with grassroots contributions from supporters like you.

**[If you're with me in this fight, please chip in any amount today to win in Ohio and defend our Democratic Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65039694/412097985/-1256022338?refcode=jtk273-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODgwYmNjNi0xYjBlLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wWJpvaDZYg1qp-MsRbErWLjhycLsP359ZSzjWTrWklM=)**

If you’d like to become one of my TOP supporters and receive exclusive updates from our campaign team, text “OH” to 44105.

Thank you! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65039696/412097986/-1256022338?refcode=jtk273-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODgwYmNjNi0xYjBlLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wWJpvaDZYg1qp-MsRbErWLjhycLsP359ZSzjWTrWklM=)

| How much do you value your freedom? Most candidates are bought for and paid for by political action committees and lobbyists. Not me. I rely on the generous donations from you. So please answer this call for help. Anyone can donate and you don't have to live in the district to give. You may not be able to vote for me but I can still vote for you.
---
| | [VOLUNTEER TO WORK A POLLING LOCATION](mailto:chris@chaseforva.com)
---
| We need volunteers willing to work inside the polls as poll watchers and outside the polls handing our Election Day flyer. You may bring a tent for shade or a chair to sit during slow times. It's very important to dress comfortably and come prepared for the weather. Sign-up today at [chris@chaseforva.com](mailto:chris@chaseforva.com)
---
| Amanda, Where Do You Need Me?
---
| (You don't have to live in the district to help)
---
| Senate District 12 is below and in Purple. This is where we need the help. If you can help out on Election Day we have needs for:
1. Volunteers to put up signs before the polls open at 6am.
2. Volunteers to work a 3 hour shift between 6am and 7pm.
3. Volunteers to take down the signs when the polls close at 7pm
4. Volunteers willing to stay after the polls close at 7pm to watch the count take place inside the precinct.
5. Volunteers to work in our office on Lucks Lane which will be open from 6am to 7pm.

clean_body: Sign up today to help at the polls | | | | == | CAN YOU VOLUNTEER ON ELECTION DAY? Tuesday, June 20 HOW CAN YOU HELP? | | | How can I help Amanda? | Is there anything you can do today to help us win this June 20 Primary? | | == | How much do you value your freedom? Most candidates are bought for and paid for by political action committees and lobbyists. Not me. I rely on the generous donations from you. So please answer this call for help. Anyone can donate and you don't have to live in the district to give. You may not be able to vote for me but I can still vote for you. | | mailto:chris@chaseforva.com | We need volunteers willing to work inside the polls as poll watchers and outside the polls handing our Election Day flyer. You may bring a tent for shade or a chair to sit during slow times. It's very important to dress comfortably and come prepared for the weather. Sign-up today at mailto:chris@chaseforva.com | Amanda, Where Do You Need Me? | (You don't have to live in the district to help) | Senate District 12 is below and in Purple. This is where we need the help. If you can help out on Election Day we have needs for: 1. Volunteers to put up signs before the polls open at 6am. 2. Volunteers to work a 3 hour shift between 6am and 7pm. 3. Volunteers to take down the signs when the polls close at 7pm 4. Volunteers willing to stay after the polls close at 7pm to watch the count take place inside the precinct. 5. name: Working Families Party
subject: Sign the petition: Congress should defend the human rights of Palestinian children and families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
U.S. military aid should not be allowed to contribute to human rights abuses. | | | Peter, Millions of Palestinians have lived their entire lives under systemic oppression. For decades, multiple Israeli governments have flaunted international law and human rights. Yet for all of that time, U.S. funding has flowed to the Israeli military, currently to the tune of $3.8 billion every year. U.S. military aid should not be allowed to contribute to human rights abuses. **That’s why the Working Families Party is joining more than 75 organizations who have endorsed Rep. Betty McCollum’s bill, the _Defending the Human Rights of Palestinian Children and Families Living Under Israeli Military Occupation Act_.** **[Will you join us in calling on all progressives in Congress to support this bill? Click here to sign the petition now and urge Congress to take a stand for human rights by co-sponsoring H.R. 3103:](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlVQJOrztnCQ3DRnwta1VT4zAyRF1BGDW7lKKL_7OROx7gFoIqrxBwMjHxiFQme3RV_vMITpOiBpTQ0BSaZ8pCbYR6wrqUksvzq767yffepXyWbcaP2ILFZiM8qRR7oAQ-o3kiUm_s5yHcWpBETCihnHoVZq8K4TMOTZBNMteaPWtr4NjNZUn_KPXoMc9Cg-xVzkVHQAwsyn8gtg6yOcNT4MJHKW6ODyP4c-X8JmymicoZzBttnUi3Ougd8NpCF6nCFdPGhKDVxG4aco1vYDP_6cBLSVCbvAX4Ehe97B0njrQZubLzKzOsp7f5FQO6B4zNVT73UVH9cE98JHWP-ZGfXu01WoPWsR9fNpEkXwi-zyuokKd3wR5jQuHqs59HytrPMRq4VtWuSV59RF75FXC8sI4dsZln-2kRE2EFjZnowBdBS2oJGd3MNORu85J8HgscPfkQH4ggPztdep_X-wm4k16TMZsDQS3JKEtj1Nufr2g3jFyMsup8jRwEgMKVoN6fw4bnbhiL9CVue-ADRIds-ihkLRjpgAzWknXX_E3hwoJSESidxAXHfMPH5oXrJLh30va6xT7r6-2Mxv_WBpEtdvRpi9QNdscKd2-IiXQpvL83d9XZi14ldrScTr6ipfZgt81EnNu6RVKDUPrs1_SYTYYyKKUNfoX7xuzcpE8UgppW57vy9mciDCKTLplUJXDI/3x5/8TQ1s-8aSrK-RUqf5GcDzQ/h0/JmcSd5T6LTsb2uNSDXxXr-Ha2WLywhiSRYRBMotWz4E)** **[Sign the petition](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlVQJOrztnCQ3DRnwta1VT4zAyRF1BGDW7lKKL_7OROx7gFoIqrxBwMjHxiFQme3RV_vMITpOiBpTQ0BSaZ8pCbYR6wrqUksvzq767yffepXyWbcaP2ILFZiM8qRR7oAQ-o3kiUm_s5yHcWpBETCihnHoVZq8K4TMOTZBNMteaPWtr4NjNZUn_KPXoMc9Cg-xVzkVHQAwsyn8gtg6yOcNT4MJHKW6ODyP4c-X8JmymicoZzBttnUi3Ougd8NpCF6nCFdPGhKDVxG4aco1vYDP_6cBLSVCbvAX4Ehe97B0njrQZubLzKzOsp7f5FQO6B4zNVT73UVH9cE98JHWP-ZGfXGp5T5xxOAEtnDoDpro-wHv2sGJN-R0ZMSB4Oj_nyFJPQk7erY-Y4HPLwbRzrw0sch5gB4oZlKrmPMzvqThlmTPwmx8G7o1EsMdIcNl-aswSB2GzAo5dwPJUlFZPj0722oA_dPfdDuonl-N462mS8FZxXz-raHO3kn019OcwtCnsrhW-u_ZjlfKqQ3glpFUOc14iiwWvnrpW8IkbgWXwaQO5DQnYGjA_zXaYWG8j1Qd7KI6sbGIEBf5j9OFdsWtFagjMKFv-jrBf-rmvQ-PLhrEDCLdddSUBhE7Gb8Wj8iy5PtwlBrupRO7jcTdA2cH68YeD_rpH8U5j0bhsoqfXPVQQMp3B24eT4FQuRcNlQguM/3x5/8TQ1s-8aSrK-RUqf5GcDzQ/h1/aSjTJ5rkT9NYcvDTeFn13RPIdDvLu8YeSv6HghAB8No)** Just a few days ago, the Israeli government told the U.S. of its plan to build thousands of new housing units in settlements in the West Bank — settlements that much of the world considers to be a violation of international law.1 That would mean even more Palestinians would likely have their homes and livelihoods destroyed, their physical movement restricted, and their access to water and other natural resources blocked.2 If passed, H.R. 3103 would make sure that U.S. taxpayer dollars could no longer support:
* The military detention, abuse, or ill-treatment of Palestinian children in Israeli military detention;
* The seizure and destruction of Palestinian property and homes in violation of international humanitarian law; or
* Any assistance for Israel's unilateral annexation of Palestinian territory in violation of international humanitarian law

**It is urgent that we take a stand against these injustices and protect Palestinian children and families living under military occupation.** **[Can you sign the petition demanding that progressive members of Congress co-sponsor this critical legislation? Our taxes should never be used to fund human rights clean_body: U.S. military aid should not be allowed to contribute to human rights abuses. | | | Peter, Millions of Palestinians have lived their entire lives under systemic oppression. For decades, multiple Israeli governments have flaunted international law and human rights. Yet for all of that time, U.S. funding has flowed to the Israeli military, currently to the tune of $3.8 billion every year. U.S. military aid should not be allowed to contribute to human rights abuses. That’s why the Working Families Party is joining more than 75 organizations who have endorsed Rep. Betty McCollum’s bill, the Defending the Human Rights of Palestinian Children and Families Living Under Israeli Military Occupation Act. Just a few days ago, the Israeli government told the U.S. of its plan to build thousands of new housing units in settlements in the West Bank — settlements that much of the world considers to be a violation of international law.1 That would mean even more Palestinians would likely have their homes and livelihoods destroyed, their physical movement restricted, and their access to water and other natural resources blocked.2 If passed, H.R. 3103 would make sure that U.S. taxpayer dollars could no longer support: The military detention, abuse, or ill-treatment of Palestinian children in Israeli military detention; The seizure and destruction of Palestinian property and homes in violation of international humanitarian law; or Any assistance for Israel's unilateral annexation of Palestinian territory in violation of international humanitarian law It is urgent that we take a stand against these injustices and protect Palestinian children and families living under military occupation. In solidarity, Working Families Party P.S. Sources: 1\. , Axios, June 12, 2023 2\. , Amnesty International Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. But we can pool our resources too. ** Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . name: Al Franken via Blue Amp Action
subject: NY-19 is a must-win for Democrats to take back the House.
body:
House seat pickup
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tecd9f262-6b2b-412f-bab9-1db418e9ea77/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, I got a favor to ask you. [My friend and former Senate counsel Josh Riley is running for Congress in NY-19, and his first FEC deadline is just weeks away. Will you join me right now by splitting a contribution of $20 or more between Josh Riley and Blue Amp Action?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf8082e1b-490b-47f6-a99f-c48e223568da/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T13351008-f5a8-4d99-ad5c-54f2b8ea3969/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I can’t say enough good things about Josh. Josh is the hardest working person I know. Together we passed bills expanding rights for survivors of domestic abuse and providing new funding for addiction treatment and mental health programs. We also made a lot of Republican witnesses look very bad. Josh really cares about all the stuff I care about – and probably the stuff you care about too!
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc03c6e3a-2f8b-462f-b11d-56e56ad61607/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| If that isn’t enough to convince you, NY-19 is a must-win for Democrats to take back the House. Cook Political Report, Sabato’s Crystal Ball, and all the other smart people who know this stuff have already rated it a “toss-up.” It’s a true swing district, but Biden won it by 4% in 2020 and I know Josh can win it in 2024 – with our help! So this is pretty much the full package: a great candidate who will always do what’s right, and a big race we absolutely have to win. [Can Josh and I count on your support? The first big fundraising deadline of Josh’s campaign is coming up, and all eyes are on him. Please split a contribution between Blue Amp Action and Josh’s campaign today.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te13a3bb0-47a0-4cb7-b5a6-01d22692007b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks, Al **[PS - As you may know, I always end with a P.S. that’s just an excuse for another ask. This is a super important deadline, so please chip in what you can!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T65b29fa0-f8dd-4292-9104-6380a3891389/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T240993ee-2d1a-436a-a3fa-61d4579f2208/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/alfrankenforjoshriley1stquarter2-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=2178059f-3d9a-4e0e-bbd8-afdd90dd339c&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=2178059f-3d9a-4e0e-bbd8-afdd90dd339c&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

subject: Why I’m running for re-election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65040503/412101448/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzNlZDc5My0yNDBlLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cdVeLgKlG6CP-Eus3xRnXCQ8OCFj3x0odXFmn0Lncho=&emci=a4a7f41a-810c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=573ed793-240e-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | Hi, Peter, it’s Sen. Sherrod Brown from Ohio. I’ve spent my life fighting for the Dignity of Work – and I mean _all_ work. Whether you punch a time clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips, are raising children or caring for an aging parent, I’ll fight for you.

I’m running for reelection so I can _keep_ fighting for workers and families in the Senate – but I need your help. As the only remaining statewide Democrat in Ohio, analysts at _CNN_ say I’m one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot – and national Republicans are already launching attack ads against me.

**The battle for Senate control could all come down to Ohio – so please, I’m personally asking:** [**_Will you give $25 or more right now – split between my campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia – to help defend this battleground seat and keep Georgia and the Senate blue?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65040504/412101449/-843865763?refcode=20230618.2_ShB_6AA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzNlZDc5My0yNDBlLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cdVeLgKlG6CP-Eus3xRnXCQ8OCFj3x0odXFmn0Lncho=)

I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio, in a community of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers and electricians. And I’ll be honest with you: The Ohio I live in now looks a lot different than the one I grew up in. I’m fighting in the Senate every day to bring those jobs back, to build our economy by investing in the middle class, and to ensure hard work pays off for every American.

But I’m facing my toughest race yet – in a state Donald Trump won by 8 points. Last year’s Ohio Senate race was one of the most costly and competitive in the nation, and _NBC News_ reports that this one could be “even nastier and more expensive.”

The long and short of it is, I can’t win – and Democrats simply can’t hold onto our narrow Senate majority – if we don’t have strong grassroots support from folks like you.

[**_That’s why I’m asking for your support today, Peter: Please, will you chip in $25 or more now – split between my campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia – so we can win in Ohio and Georgia and defend the Senate?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65040505/412101450/-843865763?refcode=20230618.2_ShB_6AA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzNlZDc5My0yNDBlLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cdVeLgKlG6CP-Eus3xRnXCQ8OCFj3x0odXFmn0Lncho=)

With gratitude,

Sherrod Brown

**The left's extremists are at it again, Fellow American.**

The culture war has turned into a full-blown modern-day Spanish Inquisition. It is run by a new church. It's not a church of God; it's a new secular cult - aiming to cancel everyone that disagrees with them.

| [** ABOLISH THE CULTURE WAR ->**](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=2c1568e978744edcba4df32e86bf2fe0&_e=s3zOSG4ohyyPXG5OxiONw_schClWcnYwfOl7FurvOXBRwu6ajhgbx_-9uJlH8bv4BqWiPw0flvs4t8sv8lHUWWZIZDLfl7EBd-Fx9T7RQpqMdwH4JydBHlUUpNs48KYvHG6f8PORNt007sDg8FmxoABXk5cOQXv9r9Rw2DPtZ7YMYzhPce5__SVHz43GyGfvcXOS0ACNJkfXG1DGLwU-NPJvyYci6ioucgx9qci_-tG689yHV5hB8e-2Ui0NOKz7xt662zO4cknJE4NMOh5a2ow3LmEHrz1sicvEjBSfbRjyic55UWhOeWXJU6VaW2xqWCi10S4RGLQfXHH3J-TVSPkMLSOeUUSuozbc_bVfVba7aTvPcogfzKNxapIK0T1-Kc3LIHfFE8BI3LPYEYG7Vm2GJkXWgMYl2lI8W_cS1GQ%3D)
---

In the course of woke history, we have seen:
> **1995:** "Love is love. We just want to be accepted."
> **2005:** "We're just after equality."
> **2012:** "Bake the cake, or see you in court."
> **2015:** "Get my pronouns right or clean out your desk."
> **2022:** "Little kids can pick their own gender."
>
And now, companies and corporations are partnering with transgender activists and influencers to appeal to the "TikTok" generation. Biden will ban people that show up topless at the White House but won't take the same action against the trans-cult agenda in schools. The culture war plaguing America has turned things upside down.

Time to emancipate ourselves from this toxic dogma - once and for all. **_We need to restore order and a true American identity starting at the top._ [If you think it has gone too far, I need you with me, Fellow American. Now is the time to act.](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=2c1568e978744edcba4df32e86bf2fe0&_e=s3zOSG4ohyyPXG5OxiONw_schClWcnYwfOl7FurvOXBRwu6ajhgbx_-9uJlH8bv4BqWiPw0flvs4t8sv8lHUWWZIZDLfl7EBd-Fx9T7RQpqMdwH4JydBHlUUpNs48KYvHG6f8PORNt007sDg8FmxoABXk5cOQXv9r9Rw2DPtZ7YMYzhPce5__SVHz43GyGfvcXOS0ACNJkfXG1DGLwU-NPJvyYci6ioucgx9qci_-tG689yHV5hB8e-2Ui0NOKz7xt662zO4cknJE4NMOh5a2mzjEpqahFNEx2MC9pQtYuys09garsQ8VNXRzDRdU3jl4kwN54fyoSUTQ2VFQ0Zeg_gFtiF4sDJwZnsnGxIhOJfsQ_nqmw07vJoh1Gr7NIjrH1PGSJ1kPhjtx4EVP-S47ogqH0IHWsnVhz0-2hX4BlU%3D) **

Vivek Ramaswamy

---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=2c1568e978744edcba4df32e86bf2fe0&_e=s3zOSG4ohyyPXG5OxiONw_schClWcnYwfOl7FurvOXBRwu6ajhgbx_-9uJlH8bv4BqWiPw0flvs4t8sv8lHUWWZIZDLfl7EBd-Fx9T7RQpqMdwH4JydBHlUUpNs48KYvHG6f8PORNt007sDg8FmxoABXk5cOQXv9r9Rw2DPtZ7YMYzhPce5__SVHz43GyGfvcXOS0ACNJkfXG1DGLwU-NPJvyYci6ioucgx9qci_-tG689yHV5hB8e-2Ui0NOKz7xt662zO4cknJE4NMOh5a2vvGwOtZEo9QRZcpLjrgSuTrnqsEjWT9w2HKBFVIluwz5Xw_ZehWVlXJ9R4hWfalBTMkKzD20ar-d8cKeyBnfN9V3THSHsGr9MunBvYHC6Wu3WA7lun-bMb55-RcoFLW_3Vu6tk46NnaUII6kwe6TL4%3D)

Time to emancipate ourselves from this toxic dogma - once and for all. We need to restore order and a true American identity starting at the top. Thank you, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

| | | Hi friend, it’s Chuck Schumer. I’m reaching out because I just checked our June membership list, and **I didn't see your name.**

Look: We absolutely _cannot_ let MAGA Republicans roll back all of our progress. We’ve come _way_ too far, and there is _way_ too much at stake to let the Senate fall back into the hands of Mitch McConnell and the GOP.

But that’s exactly what could happen if we don’t have _every_ Democrat with us in this critical fight -- and that includes YOU. **So please, I’m personally asking:**

**[Will you take action now and join our _essential_ grassroots team by activating your June membership before midnight?](https://go.dscc.org/go/14072?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20230618-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongformMembership23-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230618-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongformMembership23-Pros-sl1&akid=11086%2E9716520%2ErEDmHm)**

name: Jill Biden
subject: Hopefully we can tell you this in person:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I’m so excited about our campaign’s new contest, where Joe and I will get the chance to meet one supporter (and a guest!) in Washington, D.C. | | |
---
Peter, It’s been a little over a month since Joe and Kamala announced their reelection campaign, and I’ve spent a lot of time over these past few weeks reflecting on how this all started in the first place -- remembering all the people who came up to me in grocery stores and cafes and airports, saying: "Tell Joe he has to run." From the very beginning, that's what this campaign has been about. It's been about _you_ , about your hopes for our country, about your belief in our ability to move forward together and build a better future for all Americans. So I can tell you for a fact, Peter, that the conversations Joe has with supporters like you truly power his work. [That’s why I’m so excited about our campaign’s new contest, where Joe and I will get the chance to meet one supporter (and a guest!) in Washington D.C. clean_body: I’m so excited about our campaign’s new contest, where Joe and I will get the chance to meet one supporter (and a guest!) in Washington, D.C. | | | Peter, It’s been a little over a month since Joe and Kamala announced their reelection campaign, and I’ve spent a lot of time over these past few weeks reflecting on how this all started in the first place -- remembering all the people who came up to me in grocery stores and cafes and airports, saying: "Tell Joe he has to run." From the very beginning, that's what this campaign has been about. It's been about you , about your hopes for our country, about your belief in our ability to move forward together and build a better future for all Americans. So I can tell you for a fact, Peter, that the conversations Joe has with supporters like you truly power his work. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | I know Joe is so incredibly grateful to be able to count you as part of this grassroots team. Hopefully, we’ll get the opportunity to tell you that in person! Thank you for everything, Jill Jill Biden

| _**Greg Abbott

Ron DeSantis

Ted Cruz**_
